Derek —

We’re coming up on our August fundraising deadline, and I’m going to ask for your support, but first I hope you’ll give me the time to explain why it’s so important.

Last month, another Republican announced his candidacy for 2022, this time with a $10 million super PAC at his back. That means we now have FOUR opponents running to defeat me and take back this Senate seat.

With this much competition, we can’t afford to fall short of our fundraising goals even once.

My team tells me we need 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to stay on track.

**[If you can, will you split a $25 contribution between Common Good VA and my people-powered campaign to help us defend this seat?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FnJ1cuSgCxC832DjWz68tXjZRB0EqXF9YpC1BMM8wA7frM9jfEZsIDSQkxkkDxZPsJb_O_91NOqbrCM3AHYotBWM_qVUf99ZNvFgWeiSkdCmoToBNUZqyZaf1dNHhyr6m7fRA-F0-T3d351lraoNh2HefOVGxMxALmfJTougAZkrowbJKtvJWU2HQ7QpieRqbjc1P8ctPDgOddFCUrubJzJGkwbDMB23jyprMrSeSB_c5ROwDOJsg4J3YeWuDQ1jTO4X0AtOG88Rb38febnOuGbsJJPwaytoal9BK-ZLNmjv-H5ZnwDnQ9TogHFi4MF_MA/3em/LuiI2VsrT_y1RzsACoy6tA/h1/R65RUdITESI7Lqa58lbFLEMi_fGseXBksyL2fPWm-2U)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FnJ1cuSgCxC832DjWz68tXjZRB0EqXF9YpC1BMM8wA7f1u7DvqCPfxDaG5wrJXUbTi5Q4HxlZoLv7w-kigV43MpId3c8l0LR96pvOckq3L3C9wGVSz1A4GbrVV-FRlShLSaHBtBxwoJ6PE8GRV6y5sJsb3ZR79z9xNKzwk0d6dRjPPBdjHDamJ6gZ7epXL_nbruMFQx_Qcs8toRmmdtydm-X0YJeWP2TlfJKe_wG2JKKsdS0ZeKp2MZuf5Nw1jhRcuJXs1cHEOj_fAFaY0klsSprsPC_EKMz4VdTdLTpcQuAEAtwzaYvHKdN0MtN0hZlmw/3em/LuiI2VsrT_y1RzsACoy6tA/h2/QDXw7gx2FYUeNVB6cXmalT8Lv2q_uRMMmDpreFBZrek)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: How You Can Stop Vaccine Mandates
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **_This is getting out of hand! More and more employers are starting to mandate vaccinations and a growing amount of Minnesotans are worried about losing their job or losing their freedom._** Is this still America?!?! We absolutely cannot let the authoritarians win on this issue. Health freedom is a fundamental right. It must be protected! _If you have been following us for awhile, you know that we are an ACTION GROUP. We don't sit around and complain about the loss of freedoms...we do something about it._ Many people didn't believe we would be able to End Walz' Emergency Powers, but your phone calls and emails put pressure on legislators, and we succeeded in June. And now it's extremely obvious that if Walz would still have those powers, he'd be masking us all up again. **Politicians in St Paul are afraid of you! That's why you still have the power. If you do not like what they are doing, they know you can remove them from office.**
## So here's what we need to do...
The legislature is meeting for a Special Session, most likely at the end of September (date is not set yet). They plan on a very short, one-day session to pass a $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill to give bonuses to healthcare workers and others for their work in 2020. At the same time, those frontline workers are about to lose their job because they don't want to take an experimental vaccine. That's not right. **We MUST tie these two things together. I need you to DEMAND that your state representative and state senator do not agree to sign the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill unless it includes the Rep Erik Mortensen's [Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=V4aZFzq5K-w4VJa-OkXRhTEcv1j4M28abuOZAzCZnWxBec-v0mwLjQjWjXri1Skww_PhIMyQ2_QxDfNofywEyQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=2) with it.** And this isn't only a problem coming from the authoritarians in our state. Joe Biden just announced an [illegal federal mandate that requires health care workers](https://www.action4liberty.com/biden_s_illegal_vaccine_mandate_for_healthcare_workers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=3) in nursing homes to get the vaccine. Rep Erik Mortensen's **Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment** would make Biden's order unenforceable in Minnesota. We MUST get this passed!
## **Here's what it does:**
**== > Restricts government, business, educational facilities and medical facilities from mandating vaccination as a requirement for work** **== > Stops vaccine passports implementation in Minnesota to protect private health rights** **== > Nullifies any President Biden executive orders or laws by the U.S. Congress in the state of Minnesota; makes them unenforceable** You want to see this thing become law? We don't have much time, we must ACT NOW! A lot of people, putting pressure on their legislators with phone calls and emails makes a HUGE difference. That's how we were able to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Demand that your state representative and state senator signs the [**Stop Vaccine Mandates Pledge**](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=4) and sends the signed pledge to pledge@action4liberty.com | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=5 "FIND MY REP & SENATOR") [FIND MY REP & SENATOR](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=5)
---
**Sample Script**
Dear ______, do not agree to pass the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill in the upcoming Special Session until you protect health care workers' jobs by adding the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment to it. Show you are on our side by signing the Stop Vaccine Mandates Pledge at this link: https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge.
**Alternate Script**
Dear ________, there is no issue more important that protecting our health rights and privacy. That's why I want you to pledge to us that you will not support the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill unless it has the **Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment** attached to it. We expect you to sign this or we will make sure all your voters know that you wouldn't stand up for health freedom. Here's the pledge: https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge
**Don't let your representative and senator try to divert from what you are asking them to do. They will likely make false accusations at us or say this isn't possible. BUT THESE ARE LIES! If we don't use this opportunity RIGHT NOW to pass it, we will lose this freedom! They MUST do the right thing.**
Once you are done contacting your legislator, please send me an email. I love hearing from you!
Peter, I can't thank you enough for putting pressure on these legislators. It WILL make a difference. If you haven't signed our Stop Vaccine Mandates petition yet, please add your signature on it. And send it to friends and family.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=6)
Make sure to visit **[action4liberty.com](https://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=7)** every day as we keep you updated on this battle.
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=how_to_stop_vaccine_mandates&n=10), software for leaders.

Donald J. Trump August 19th, 2021

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Are you with me or Cori Bush?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58159539:66i3_Ol2N:m:1:3103520637:C8A3E799B6D0CC973C04B5AEF212D138:r "Headline") Peter, I am pleased to inform you that thanks to your help, all but one Senate Democrat voted for my amendment to put 100,000 new cops on our streets. Now, I am inviting them to put their money where their mouth is and co-sponsor this legislation. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58159539:66i3_Ol2N:m:1:3103520637:C8A3E799B6D0CC973C04B5AEF212D138:r "Tweet")Instead of defunding the police, the Democrats have a chance to put the safety of American Citizens above their partisan and dangerous defund agenda. **_But I 'm not waiting for them because the safety and security of your family and mine depend upon its passage and that's why I'm moving this bill forward until Joe Biden signs it._** **[Will you stand with me and help keep the pressure on everyone in Washington to support our law enforcement officers and pass S.2246?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58159539:66i3_Ol2N:m:1:3103520637:C8A3E799B6D0CC973C04B5AEF212D138:r "Will you stand with me and help keep the pressure on everyone in
Washington to support our law enforcement officers and pass S.2246?")** Our small victory is proof that no matter how many times the left attacked me, No matter how many times the left called me names, No matter how many times the left tried to cancel me, **And no matter how many times the Squad members told us to "suck it up," our pro-cop, anti-crime movement is winning.** _But we can 't give up just yet. There is still plenty of work left unfinished._ All but one Senate Democrat voted to support my measure in a vote the other day. We still need Nancy Pelosi's Democrats to get on board too. American families aren't safe, but they deserve to be. And they can be if we all act today and force the defund Democrats in both the House and Senate to do what is best for our nation. **[Will you help me keep the pressure on Washington to stand by our law enforcement officers and keep our nation safe?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58159539:66i3_Ol2N:m:1:3103520637:C8A3E799B6D0CC973C04B5AEF212D138:r "Will you help me keep the pressure on Washington to stand by our
law enforcement officers and keep our nation safe?")** This is not the time to defund the police or vilify them, but to support the brave men and women in blue - and put more of them on the streets. Immediately. We need all the support we can get to ensure it passes and Joe Biden signs it. I want to thank you again for your help. None of this would have been possible without your steadfast support. **[Please continue to help me shepherd this proposal for 100,000 new cops through Congress without delays!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58159539:66i3_Ol2N:m:1:3103520637:C8A3E799B6D0CC973C04B5AEF212D138:r "Please continue to help me shepherd this proposal for 100,000 new cops through Congress without delays!")** Our success on this issue is the first of many we will deliver for America, and it is proof that our nation is filled with patriotic citizens who still cherish law and order as well as the brave men and women responsible for ensuring it. Thank you again for your continued support. With much gratitude,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58159539:66i3_Ol2N:m:1:3103520637:C8A3E799B6D0CC973C04B5AEF212D138:r "Josh Hawley") Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58159539:66i3_Ol2N:m:1:3103520637:C8A3E799B6D0CC973C04B5AEF212D138:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
---

name: Candace Owens
subject: [Petition] Joe Biden proved he's unfit for office
body:
---
| | | | | |
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161294:6_yZxOlzN:m:1:3253819041:16E5B7B7D9C174D7A331FC3007618CA0:r)
---
| Peter,
---
| **Joe Biden gave Afghanistan to the Taliban** ... _abandoning_ tens of thousands of our citizens and allies to brutal terrorists. Then, **he went on vacation.** Joe Biden is unfit to serve as Commander-in-Chief, and I'm calling on you--as a patriot--to **[sign the petition demanding his Cabinet REMOVE him from office under the 25th Amendment.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161294:6_yZxOlzN:m:1:3253819041:16E5B7B7D9C174D7A331FC3007618CA0:r "sign the petition demanding his Cabinet REMOVE him from office under the 25th Amendment.")**
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161294:6_yZxOlzN:m:1:3253819041:16E5B7B7D9C174D7A331FC3007618CA0:r)
---
| Don't let the media fool you: this has _nothing_ to do with whether the U.S. should have left Afghanistan. It's about **how Joe Biden so badly bungled this mission** and**failed to protect our allies, our people, and our military secrets.** Or as Barack Obama once put it, **" Don't underestimate Joe's ability to f*** things up."** Joe Biden has disgraced our nation, betrayed our allies, and destroyed all international trust in America... and then, he refused to take responsibility. **[American patriots must hold him accountable. Sign the petition to DEMAND the Cabinet REMOVE Joe Biden from office under the 25th Amendment>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161294:6_yZxOlzN:m:1:3253819041:16E5B7B7D9C174D7A331FC3007618CA0:r "American patriots must hold him accountable. Sign the petition to DEMAND the Cabinet REMOVE
Joe Biden from office under the 25th Amendment >>")**
---
| | | [SIGN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161294:6_yZxOlzN:m:1:3253819041:16E5B7B7D9C174D7A331FC3007618CA0:r)
---
| Thanks,

Candace
---

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: I served in Afghanistan. Joe Biden Is Lying.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161688:JZ15qOljN:m:1:3253819041:7C6201E0CCD4D77B305530F02C18D4CD:r)
---
| Peter,

I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. Since then, many have asked me if it was worth it. Here's what I tell them:

Those of us that served, we fought for our country. We fought for those on our left and right, and we'll keep our heads high knowing that.

But Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. And now, he's even blaming Donald Trump for the disaster Joe Biden himself caused.

Joe Biden is a liar, and he deserves 100% of the blame for the oncoming humanitarian crisis.

So, in a minute, I'm going to ask you to [join me in fighting to defeat Joe Biden](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161688:JZ15qOljN:m:1:3253819041:7C6201E0CCD4D77B305530F02C18D4CD:r), but first let me tell you how I know he's lying...

On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. I'd step left...and then right...left...and then right. Then...BANG!

The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't. And every day since then when I wake up, I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home.

One member of our team was an Afghan interpreter. Once, he was on a mission and his tennis shoes got stuck in the mud so he finished the mission barefoot. He had a young son and daughter. He fought alongside us and was a friend to America.

Now, Joe Biden has sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. Instead, he is more focused on the "optics" of the situation. Trying to blame everyone but himself.

**Another lesson I learned in the Army is that leaders take responsibility for their actions. Joe Biden is refusing to do that, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title. **

[If you agree, please help me hold him accountable and stop his disastrous America Last agenda](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161688:JZ15qOljN:m:1:3253819041:7C6201E0CCD4D77B305530F02C18D4CD:r):

name: Rand Paul
subject: When did YouTube start working for the government?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161811:6XNhUOlN6:m:1:3253819041:A6D37C36568B77545D8343FBA7F107DC:r) | |
---
Peter, YouTube and Google have become an entity so huge that they think they are the arbiter of truth.

And when I spoke out about the complete absurdity of mask mandates, they responded.

By banning me on YouTube for 7 days. **[FIGHT BACK>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161811:6XNhUOlN6:m:1:3253819041:A6D37C36568B77545D8343FBA7F107DC:r)**

As a libertarian-leaning senator, I think private companies have the right to ban me if they want to. But I think it is really anti-free speech, anti-progress of science, and it's really unhelpful to the overall conversation.

Both sides _should_ be able to present facts on either side of a question and complete an adversarial process to reach the truth.

But that's just not what's happening these days in big tech.

I'm not sure when YouTube became an arm of the government... but I am sure that it is an absolute disgrace for our government to proceed with their nonsense, anti-science policies without any repercussions or push back.

_They shouldn 't be protected by big tech giants._

If you agree, please chip in today to fight the censorship and share the truth: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2741522/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161811:6XNhUOlN6:m:1:3253819041:A6D37C36568B77545D8343FBA7F107DC:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

| | Friends-

Since Joe Biden took office, we have endured

* Surging illegal immigration, with more than 200,000 illegal border crossings in July.

* Rising inflation, with prices increasing by nearly 5.5% since last year.

* Burdening future generations with trillions of dollars in wasteful new government spending that will be impossible to repay.

* The catastrophic failure in Afghanistan that’s jeopardized the safety of American citizens and allies and sacrificed our standing across the globe.

With New York City imposing its vaccine passport and the state’s new governor openly talking about mask mandates in our schools, the Biden Administration has also failed in its handling of the pandemic.

We can take back our country—but we need to start right now.

Rising inflation, with prices increasing by nearly 5.5% since last year. Burdening future generations with trillions of dollars in wasteful new government spending that will be impossible to repay. The catastrophic failure in Afghanistan that’s jeopardized the safety of American citizens and allies and sacrificed our standing across the globe. With New York City imposing its vaccine passport and the state’s new governor openly talking about mask mandates in our schools, the Biden Administration has also failed in its handling of the pandemic. We can take back our country—but we need to start right now. | | | | | | | | | | To stop the Biden Administration and get America back on the right track, we need to elect a Republican Majority in the House of Representatives. That starts with New York’s 11th Congressional District. We fought hard to win this district last November and Nancy Pelosi and her political machine are going to do everything they can to take it back. The only way we ensure we hold this district is to raise more money than our Socialist opponents. And that’s where I need your help. Please chip in today to protect this seat and do our part to win a Republican Majority in Congress. That’s the key to shutting down the liberal Biden agenda. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Nicole | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306, United States

name: Team Greitens
subject: Navy SEAL Eric Greitens Releases New Bombshell Ad Slamming Biden's Afghanistan Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Navy SEAL Eric Greitens Releases New Bombshell Ad Slamming Biden's Afghanistan Crisis
---
| On Wednesday, former Missouri Governor & US Navy SEAL Eric Greitens released a new bombshell ad slamming Joe Biden's handling of the crisis in Afghanistan.
On Twitter, the current frontrunner for Missouri's 2022 US Senate contest accused the Biden administration of failing to properly prepare and respond to the rapid Taliban takeover.
"Days before Taliban captured Afghanistan, Joe Biden & his team were busy making TikTok videos.As Americans were hiding for their lives, he couldn't be bothered on vacation.As Senator, I'll hold weak liberals accountable & fight for all Americans-- at home & around the globe," wrote Greitens.
In the first 24 hours, he video was viewed over 200K times across Greitens' social media platforms and was shared by several prominent conservatives including Kimberly Guilfoyle, former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani, Newsmax TV host Steve Cortes, OANN TV host Christina Bobb, radio host Dr. Sebastian Gorka, and former advisor to President Trump Boris Epshteyn.
Greitens served 4 tours of duty as a US Navy SEAL officer, including deployments to southeast Asia, the Horn of Africa, Iraq & Afghanistan. Greitens is the recipient of the Bronze Star and the Purple Heart.
WATCH Governor Greitens' new ad below:

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: What $51,000 from Juul can buy
disclaimer_text: paid for by the e-cigarette industry, which is effectively Big Tobacco 2
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vogTtE0QRu7AmwhDOLrcMoPndRN4NcFA&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Something strange happened this summer.
The American Journal of Health Behavior, a respected academic journal, seemingly dedicated its entire May-June issue to validating Juul e-cigarettes as a "healthy" alternative to smoking traditional cigarettes.
You may be asking yourself: In what world does an academic health journal give its support to e-cigarettes, a substance that contains dangerous toxins and draws younger generations into a lifetime of nicotine addiction?
The answer lies in a $51,000 payment from Juul to the academic journal, which allowed Juul to buy out an entire issue and fill it with their own "research" - research paid for by the e-cigarette industry, which is effectively Big Tobacco 2.0.
**It 's an egregious and deceptive tactic, Friend, which is why I called on the FDA and FTC to launch an investigation - but I need you to join me in fighting back against Big Tobacco 2.0 to protect kids from harmful e-cigarettes. I've put together a petition and I am counting on 567 members of this team to add their names before midnight. Will you sign on now?**
**[Add your name now to condemn the e-cigarette industry- Big Tobacco 2.0 - and hold them accountable for poisoning our children.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-juul?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1061-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0721voting%3Fcode%3Djtk1061-su-nd)**
**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-juul?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1061-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0721voting%3Fcode%3Djtk1061-su-nd)**
When I was Attorney General of Connecticut, I led and won against Big Tobacco in a 46-state lawsuit - holding the industry accountable for deceiving the public about the health dangers of smoking. The threats to health and safety we faced then are eerily similar to the e-cigarette industry now, as are the sickeningly deceptive advertising practices.
By masquerading their own biased research and advertising as "academic journal articles," Big Tobacco 2.0 is furthering their ability to cause significant harm. Every day, teens who have been led to believe that vaping is harmless are being tricked into a lifetime of nicotine addiction and disease.
We can't let these wealthy corporations get away with poisoning a new generation. **[So please, before midnight tonight, will you add your name to my petition condemning the e-cigarette industry? I'm counting on you to join me in the fight against Big Tobacco 2.0, so sign on now.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-juul?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1061-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0721voting%3Fcode%3Djtk1061-su-nd)**
Grateful for your advocacy,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1061-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wSgIcBXwFaIEF3Ff%2BWSZcIPndRN4NcFA&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34361669/301734533/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTA2NjhjNC1iYTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gneZ-rbqFSii8UYjZYrVsWzVzrB9NR94P99TzB4vRRI=)

Friend,

**After I announced my campaign for Senate, we did a weeklong tour across Pennsylvania -- the first of many.**

I visited a dozen counties, and everywhere I went I met Pennsylvania Democrats who are energized, engaged, and determined to win this Senate race in 2022.

[**We talked about a lot of different issues all over Pennsylvania. But now that we've wrapped up our statewide tour, I also want to hear directly from you. Can you take this quick survey to let me know what issues you want to see front and center of this campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34361670/301734534/667112101?ms=em21_210820_tourrecap&refcode=em21_210820_tourrecap&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTA2NjhjNC1iYTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gneZ-rbqFSii8UYjZYrVsWzVzrB9NR94P99TzB4vRRI=&emci=e2526da0-2901-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=fa0668c4-ba01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18516396) [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34361671/301734535/667112101?ms=em21_210820_tourrecap&refcode=em21_210820_tourrecap&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTA2NjhjNC1iYTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gneZ-rbqFSii8UYjZYrVsWzVzrB9NR94P99TzB4vRRI=&emci=e2526da0-2901-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=fa0668c4-ba01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18516396) I heard two things everywhere I went. First, that Pennsylvania Democrats believe our democracy is in serious trouble. And second, that Pennsylvania Democrats are ready to defend it -- defend the right to vote, and defend the right to organize and bargain so that working people have more of a say in their workplace and with their wages.

That’s what this campaign is all about -- because that’s what’s on the line in November 2022.

We face a lot of challenges right now, especially as we try to put an end to this pandemic. Too few good jobs, income inequality, weakened unions, health care disparities, gun violence that terrorizes too many communities -- the list goes on.

We can solve these problems. We can make this democracy and this economy work for all Americans.

[**That’s what I’m focused on in this campaign, and that’s why I want to hear from you about the biggest problems you face and the issues you care about most. Let me know by taking this short survey today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34361672/301734536/667112101?ms=em21_210820_tourrecap&refcode=em21_210820_tourrecap&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTA2NjhjNC1iYTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gneZ-rbqFSii8UYjZYrVsWzVzrB9NR94P99TzB4vRRI=&emci=e2526da0-2901-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=fa0668c4-ba01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18516396)

\-- Conor

name: Larry Elder | Recall Newsom
subject: Voting has begun!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161849:J0LAROlNw:m:1:3253819041:44F25E005FCBC7DB7AF8DFBB03DF529A:r)

---
**URGENT: Voting by mail is underway and the deadline to return your ballots is less than 30 DAYS away.**

[**Peter, we need your help reaching as many voters as possible before they mail in their ballot, so we can be sure they vote YES on the recall question. Can we count on you to send in $10, $20, $30 so we can fund our get-out-the-vote efforts in this final stretch?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161849:J0LAROlNw:m:1:3253819041:44F25E005FCBC7DB7AF8DFBB03DF529A:r)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58161849:J0LAROlNw:m:1:3253819041:44F25E005FCBC7DB7AF8DFBB03DF529A:r)
The latest polls are showing that this recall is neck and neck, and we need you to help us reach and sway voters before they turn-in their ballots. It's imperative to the future of California that we make sure to get as many recall ballots returned as possible, but we can't do it without you.

Terry’s already been a great governor for Virginia, and I have no doubt he will be once again with your help.

But right now, Terry’s got a tough road ahead of him. His opponent is promising to spend up to $75 million to buy the Governor’s office. And national Republicans are pouring money into the state.

And the scary part is, it’s working.

The polls are razor thin and all of Virginia’s progress is in danger.

That’s not good enough for me. Like President Biden, I believe in fighting for the soul of our country, and I believe that one of 2021’s most important fights is making sure Terry becomes Virginia’s next governor.

subject: Here's the situation:

body:
We wanted to send you a quick update on what’s happening in the North Carolina Senate race.
#

We wanted to send you a quick update on what's happening in the North Carolina Senate race.
**The Situation:** North Carolina is one of the seats Democrats have the best chance to flip in 2022 according to CNN. It’s an open seat, and our Republican opponents are running far to the right to try to win Donald Trump’s base — putting them entirely out of step with North Carolinians’ values.
**The Problem:** Republican super PACs are attempting to buy this seat. Our failed former governor Pat McCrory and Trump’s hand-picked nominee Ted Budd both already have super PACs that have collectively raised more than $5.5 million to spend in this race. They’re going to try to use limitless dark money to drown out Cheri’s message.
**Our Plan:** Democrats’ path to victory is clear. We need to build a grassroots movement of people all across this state. Cheri can do that. She is speaking to the real needs and hopes of our families — giving a voice to those who feel ignored and left behind by Washington. Her message can inspire the voters we need to turn out and make sure they get to the polls.
So this is where we need your help. The only way we can go toe to toe with Republican super PACs is with a lot of grassroots support.
**[Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign right now? We need to make investments to grow our campaign and lay the groundwork necessary to flip North Carolina.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34365942/301751168/-928165870?refcode2=668af9d9-c001-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210820-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjhhZjlkOS1jMDAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VY8JeprLSYX0UbFTuHLlKjlEqpVN391k45JA2tvCpdQ=)**

subject: FWD: RE: update

body:
Team—

I wanted to loop you in on this. We’re so grateful to everyone who stepped up when Nikki emailed yesterday, but I’m worried.

See below—I just filled Nikki in on the numbers, and it looks like we need to raise another $3,796 before the weekend to stay on track for August. Reaching this goal is critical to keeping our momentum going.

If you’re in a position to give, friend, now is the time. Please click here to donate and help us stay on track for August. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-personal-request?refcode=frii820]

Thanks!
Stefanie

Looks like that email did pretty well, but we need to raise another $3,796 before the weekend to stay on track.

I’m going to pass along your concern to our supporters and see if they can step up.

Stefanie

name: PACT - Parents Against Critical Theory
subject: Teachers Union LAWSUIT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
They are SUING a parent for requesting to know what her child is learning.

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58164380:6-ABgOlNR:m:1:3253819041:6B5821B9980E6119DE5BA9F92BF76979:r)
---
Peter,

**A teacher's union is SUING a parent for daring to ask what her child is learning in school.**

_A Rhode Island chapter of the National Education Association has filed a lawsuit against a parent in order to block the release of records concerning Critical Race Theory and gender "education" in schools._

**In other words, the NEA has filed a lawsuit to keep parents in the dark about the indoctrination being forced upon their children.**

Parents Against Critical Theory (PACT) is fighting for the rights of all parents, but we need your help to come out victorious. **Would you donate today to help us take down the teachers unions and their manipulative games?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us fight back against the Teachers Unions> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58164380:6-ABgOlNR:m:1:3253819041:6B5821B9980E6119DE5BA9F92BF76979:r)**

In a complaint filed in the Superior Court, the teacher's union claims that the teaching records are "private," and their release must be balanced against the "rights" of teachers.

**They are completely forgetting about the rights of parents.** We have a right to know exactly what our children are being taught in the schools that WE fund with OUR tax dollars.

_We can no longer look to our elected officials to defend us. We must take matters into our own hands and fight for change._

_Join us and the millions of parents that have had enough as we fight CRT and institutionalized racism._

**[DONATE HERE to help PACT put an end to the lawsuits and bullying. >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58164380:6-ABgOlNR:m:1:3253819041:6B5821B9980E6119DE5BA9F92BF76979:r)**

If we don't stand up, then no one will.

Sincerely,

Parents Against Critical Theory

name: David Palmer
subject: Hi there, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
https://palmerforillinois.com/ [https://palmerforillinois.com/]
Peter, I wanted to reach out today and thank you for joining me in this campaign.

I never thought I would be running for Congress. But after years of watching entrenched D.C. politicians who care more about re-election than sticking up for the people they serve divide us into “red areas” and “blue areas,” I wanted a representative for every single person in Illinois’ 13th District.

And I knew I needed to be part of the solution – part of the healing, part of the rebuilding, and part of the change.

I am proud to be raising my kids here in Central Illinois – the best place to live, work, and raise a family for me and my wife. And I want to make our country a better and safer place for all of our families. That’s why I’m running for Congress. It’s about service. It’s about representation that is accessible, and about doing everything I can to make life better for the residents of the 13th District.

This was a designated “red-to-blue” district for the past few cycles, and the spotlight has shone brightly on the race for Congress here. Republicans have made it clear that they’ll be trying to hold this district with everything they've got this time around.

You’ll be hearing from my team over the next few days with more, but I just wanted to reach out and personally thank you for joining our campaign first and foremost. With the help of folks like you, we’ll be able to change things for the better for our community here in the 13th District.

If you believe in my vision for the future of Central Illinois and for our nation, please consider giving what you can to our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DPIL-13-Email-2021-ONB-no?refcode=E10579--WelcomeSeriesA-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10]

Thank you,
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DPIL-13-Email-2021-ONB-no?refcode=E10579--WelcomeSeriesA-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DPIL-13-Email-2021-ONB-no?refcode=E10579--WelcomeSeriesA-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10]

David Palmer
Candidate for Congress
Illinois’ 13th Congressional District
David Palmer is running for Congress in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District. After years of hearing from entrenched D.C. politicians who care more about re-election than sticking up for the people they represent, David is ready to serve, listen, and do everything he can to make life better for the people here in Central Illinois. Our campaign runs on support from people like you, not special interests, so anything you can chip in will help give Illinoisans a leader they can count on. DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dpil-13-email-august2021-fr-footer] Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. name: Peter Franchot
subject: Leveling the Playing Field for Black Marylanders
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
Every week, Black leaders tell me they’re tired of political rhetoric -- they want to see real results for their communities, and that starts with a concrete plan for achieving those results. That’s why today, I’m excited to share with you my detailed policy commitments to level the playing field for Black Marylanders, and my commitment to selecting a Black woman as my running mate for 2022.
If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I will ensure that every community has a seat at the table on the decisions that shape our future. My administration will represent a vibrant coalition that is as diverse as the state, and draw on the strength of the many communities that call it home.
My pledges to Maryland’s Black community are intended to be a living, breathing document, to be enriched by the insight and experience of Black Marylanders. I look forward to the ongoing conversation that will grow this plan in the weeks and months to come.
Click here to read my Concrete Plan for Economic, Social, and Political Equity for Black Marylanders. [https://www.franchot.com/levelplayingfield]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em082021]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/38303339-2e00-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/2197e359-c701-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTk3ZTM1OS1jNzAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2AtQPcERhFlUKd2armGIeKQkpKT11r24rai3MP1w3Y=&id=136194660 .

Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Ron Johnson Update via Nelson HQ
subject: let down again by Ron Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Ron Johnson made a fortune on the pandemic — selling stocks after a confidential briefing on COVID-19 — and then repeatedly voted against COVID relief, wanting to deny millions of struggling Americans necessary aid.

**Now, once again, Ron Johnson has let us down, voting against the $1.2 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill that passed in the Senate.**

_And, guess what?_ He didn’t even read it:
|
_“Johnson says he didn’t read infrastructure bill”_

“Most Likely To Flip”
#
**OFFICIAL: CNN Ranks North Carolina in Top 10 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seats of 2022** Can you rush $10 to support Erica Smith’s progressive Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate?**

Hi, have you seen this top story yet?
CNN just updated their ranking of the Top 10 Senate Seats Most Likely to Flip, **and North Carolina was ranked #5.**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/11862?refcode=em20210820-364&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=364%2E3698%2E8v-aa7)
As CNN observes, Republican Senator Richard Burr’s retirement is a golden, once-in-a-generation opportunity for progressive Democrats to flip another Senate seat.
To be sure, there will be dozens of U.S. Senate seats across the country up for election in 2022 — some incumbent, some vacant. **But only North Carolina and a few other states are considered to be in the very top percentile of competitive races.**
North Carolina is our chance to flip another seat and elect a progressive champion in Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate. In order to do so, though, we must raise enough money (no easy feat when over 50% of our campaign fundraising comes from grassroots donations online).
[**_We’re behind on August fundraising, so can you chip in a few dollars to this email if you’re in a place to do so? name: Team Walker
subject: TAKE POLL: Vaccine Mandates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
Should we give the government more control?
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a8e5dfeca19f7dde/27a788de676ac278c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, It’s hard to turn on the news these days without hearing about another vaccine mandate or vaccine passport. **From New York to New Orleans to San Francisco, liberal cities across America are FORCING people to get the COVID-19 vaccine in order to enjoy the simple pleasures of life – like eating out or attending a concert**. What do you think, Peter? Do you want the government to have that much control over your life? **[Please take a few moments to VOTE YES OR NO on our Vaccine Mandate Survey](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/a8e5dfeca19f7dde/021606f474bc70b9c3d6b838967d376c/35903)**. We’d love to know where you stand. clean_body: Should we give the government more control? Peter, It’s hard to turn on the news these days without hearing about another vaccine mandate or vaccine passport. From New York to New Orleans to San Francisco, liberal cities across America are FORCING people to get the COVID-19 vaccine in order to enjoy the simple pleasures of life – like eating out or attending a concert. What do you think, Peter? Do you want the government to have that much control over your life? . We’d love to know where you stand. name: Neil Shah
subject: We Must Get This One Right
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| Peter, You gave your employer 20 years of your life. You showed up every day when the hospital was full of COVID patients. You fought on the front lines without adequate PPE when we had no idea what COVID was or wasn’t. They banged pans for you. They called you a hero. They said they couldn’t have beat back this scourge without you. **And now they want to fire you.** Government and businesses are starting to mandate vaccines for employees. Recovered? Doesn’t matter. Willing to wear a respirator? Doesn’t matter. You will take the jab or you will lose your job. **This isn’t about science. This is about control.** If you don’t get to control what goes in your body, you have lost one of the most basic individual freedoms. Now the government and many employers want to mandate you to take a vaccine that doesn’t prevent you from spreading COVID simply for the ‘privilege’ of keeping your job. We are at a rare infection point in history. Liberty and freedom are not partisan. We are seeing people come together in a way that I could scarcely imagine given our divided politics. **We are uniting under the banner of liberty.** **It’s humbling to see the large crowds of patriots show up in places like St Cloud, Stillwater, St Paul, Rochester, Hibbing, Grand Rapids, Little Falls and many other places. This political movement is a message to Tim Walz and the political class that they will not get away with violating our health rights.** I’ve been honored to speak at some of these events, despite being a new candidate to the gubernatorial race with no political background. What unites us is a devotion to liberty and a desire to push back against the career politicians who are pushing these mandates. Here’s my speech in St Cloud... [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6rdu3t7F11lVK5qeu9KzziX5M7qRZ0-b6TEKVt7VeAp9O0Ekxu4wvD_MA_VZzwjLbQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_own_your_body&n=1) I became a doctor to use science to help people, not push a narrative that seeks to control others. I'm running to become Governor of Minnesota to protect health freedom, not to become a tyrant like Tim Walz. Tim Walz has gotten so many things wrong. He’s shown a complete lack of respect for our rights. And now he’s infringing on one of the most basic rights of them all: health freedom.
## **Walz MUST Go!**
If we want to get rid of Walz and protect Minnesota from future lockdowns, masks in our schools, and vaccine mandates, we have got to use a different playbook. I look different; talk differently; and have a different message. Most importantly, I’m willing to stand up to the political class to make sure these things never happen again and vaccine mandates are eradicated. Help me bring liberty and freedom back to Minnesota! **I’m not funded by large special interests like these career politicians. Donations for this campaign come from ‘We the People’. To be successful, we must build up from the ground up. Can you help me out with a[contribution today](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_own_your_body&n=2)?** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_own_your_body&n=3 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_own_your_body&n=3)
---
Career politicians keep failing you, over and over again. We can’t trust these politicians to lead this state. That’s why it’s important to have an outsider win the governor’s race!
I pledge to you that I will work endless hours and put up the greatest fight in order to win this race and make sure Tim Walz never tramples on your rights again.
**[Please help me get rid of Tim Walz with a contribution of $25, $50 or $100 today.](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_own_your_body&n=4) Thank you in advance for your support. And please help spread the word about what we are doing here.**
Sincerely,
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
[http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=5JezZIIJQQrVuUtHI_sfDKYjXcFcnny7CTruXj7gH44&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_own_your_body&n=5)
Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · United States

| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84k04JE2XAvY73w4jmJHZby80R6wTdl8h9roLetaczgUFzJe_LWe4NZD6MLk51Yh6EQNQGjWtBOVh0RbHGcwRk-lXrZttvWKXhHV2GRzJxDcM98IH6RGdt9yNYlaHlJz_mZdSwt6jyNhgJIisLRAnoJoEMjfGKqg5NCzmJBcu1C_O80oFsVIJ1HW27GX3L5yYLgPvrgofi8kPO44s79q7Jv_ZuPgCvEsge_dtlOzvVnt0KISJ30xS0obyipy4riXoqVi-m_6Za4BTgry0WsOmcqdjJ33RmE1aqHvPNssWyXC5/3em/iXdpyNnfRgiQOOs7gauARQ/h0/S5QpHgOMEi_rOJbMLpjtPs_KPldFtwWQLcBnZsekpoM)
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84k04JE2XAvY73w4jmJHZby_oBpjUu2z8TAGNZU9wdgeaiul71wNCxXbxIq8MaKetl8HGz2A38pXkY2E9BusHmmnZkWo-VSxaPNpN27ZOj3NBdxTtTY2grvRYe_ZJOzOtMAuvHOUqHl2pb6jwLbyKlZYie00H0qA6bxPpFEBsIkwmhQ3h48nwztS_XaS5huEgHkxe22QwnfUn7le1XfG-ganhAHGNAOfWgO8y7PFYohr27RoDatbtdJcU4Hr-uUvlXag2Sg2EgnU0mpKpALFqlazCtP43NEKFBmf7_gmmxmB8/3em/iXdpyNnfRgiQOOs7gauARQ/h1/8WX92rhAye45zD-osmfcuvvMdzkolT6ncV0MAkxjb3U) Derek -- my team just let me know that we're falling incredibly short. If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach our goals and raise what we need _right now_.

The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and _The New York Times_ reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement.

I won't let them – but I need your help. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals.

**So I'll be direct, Derek: I'm asking you to split a donation – here and now – between my campaign and Common Good VA. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started.**

clean_body: | | | Derek -- my team just let me know that we're falling incredibly short. If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach our goals and raise what we need right now. The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and The New York Times reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement. I won't let them – but I need your help. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals. So I'll be direct, Derek: I'm asking you to split a donation – here and now – between my campaign and Common Good VA. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started. This team has helped us beat the odds before, and I know we can do it again. Thanks so much for fighting alongside me. – Raphael Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . And Derek, we need to give _everything we’ve got_ to defend those rights.

And often, Governors are the most important line of defense in these fights.

But the thing is, right-wing governors have proven track records of taking their states backwards — and that’s exactly what Glenn Youngkin wants to do to Virginia.

Glenn supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories about the 2020 election. He was caught on tape saying that he would hide his extreme views on banning abortion and defunding Planned Parenthood from the voters of Virginia. And he’d be a dangerously anti-LGBTQ governor.

Derek, we don’t need to say this twice: **Glenn Youngkin is all wrong for Virginia.**

clean_body: “Terry is a champion for reproductive rights and the freedom to vote.” | | | | | = Around the country, some of Americans’ most basic rights are under attack — from voting rights, to reproductive rights, to civil rights. And Derek, we need to give everything we’ve got to defend those rights. And often, Governors are the most important line of defense in these fights. But the thing is, right-wing governors have proven track records of taking their states backwards — and that’s exactly what Glenn Youngkin wants to do to Virginia. Glenn supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories about the 2020 election. He was caught on tape saying that he would hide his extreme views on banning abortion and defunding Planned Parenthood from the voters of Virginia. And he’d be a dangerously anti-LGBTQ governor. Derek, we don’t need to say this twice: Glenn Youngkin is all wrong for Virginia. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = We can’t take anything for granted in this race, Derek. You would think, with such an extreme right-wing opponent, Terry McAuliffe would be surging in the polls. But the latest poll had Glenn and Terry within just two points of each other. We can’t let Glenn Youngkin get any closer to the Governorship, Derek. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for standing up for what’s right, Team Terry =** Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Teamwork
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We’re about 24 hours away from the rescheduled inaugural celebrations of the historic Holcomb-Crouch reelection campaign. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470778?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Teamwork_** We’re about 24 hours away from the rescheduled inaugural celebrations of the historic Holcomb-Crouch reelection campaign. I’m looking forward to getting together with many of you to celebrate our shared victories from 2020. We always talk about teamwork at the Indiana Republican Party, and it was a total team effort in 2020 that made it possible to win up and down the ballot. We have the most organized, energized, and motivated political team in the state and, while we’re going to take some time to reflect on our past successes this weekend, we’re not taking our foot off the gas as we head into 2022.

This weekend is also the final weekend of the Indiana State Fair. Our volunteers have been at the fair every day this year, collecting signatures, recruiting more teammates, and spreading the word about our great Republican office holders. Doing this work now is what helps us build the momentum to success next year. I’m grateful to everyone who staffed our booth throughout the fair. And, if you haven’t been yet, you still have a couple days left to spend some time at the great Indiana State Fair!

Thanks
Kyle

**_Photo: _**_Chairman Hupfer and members of the Indiana Republican State Committee during this week's state committee meeting_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana for All_**
**Governor Holcomb** announced the introduction of the Governor's Public Health Commission. This 15 member commission will examine Indiana's public health system and make recommendations to improve its structure, funding and operations.

**Governor Holcomb** ceremonially signed HB1006, Indiana's historic police reform bill. This bill received unanimous bipartisan support as well as backing from state and local law enforcement. This bill will ensure that Hoosier law enforcement officers are properly equipped to respond to daily challenges with transparency and accountability.

**Governor Holcomb** spoke at the National Fraternal Order of Police national conference. He expressed his thanks and gratitude for all of the brave men and women who sacrifice so much to keep our communities safe.
**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb introducing the Governor's Public Health Commission. Gov. Holcomb signing HB1006. Gov. Holcomb attending the National FOP convention._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Appeals Court Affirms Gov. Holcomb's Decision on Unemployment**_ The Indiana Court of Appeals ruled that Gov. Holcomb could withdraw Indiana from the federal pandemic unemployment program.
_**“Indiana has more than 143,000 job openings and I know there are even more out there. The Department of Workforce Development continues to work with the unemployed to connect them with the resources they need to gain skills and be matched with employment." -Gov Holcomb.**_
You can read more about the court’s decision here: [https://fox59.com/news/coronavirus/court-of-appeals-says-indiana-can-withdraw-from-federal-pandemic-unemployment-program/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d60955353&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Mike Pence Op-Ed**_ Vice President Mike Pence wrote an op-ed in the Wall Street Journal this week detailing the complete foreign policy failure the Biden Administration has allowed in Afghanistan.
_**“The Biden administrations’ disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan is a foreign-policy humiliation unlike anything our country has endured since the Iran hostage crisis." -Mike Pence**_

clean_body: We’re about 24 hours away from the rescheduled inaugural celebrations of the historic Holcomb-Crouch reelection campaign. | | | | | | | | Teamwork We’re about 24 hours away from the rescheduled inaugural celebrations of the historic Holcomb-Crouch reelection campaign. I’m looking forward to getting together with many of you to celebrate our shared victories from 2020. We always talk about teamwork at the Indiana Republican Party, and it was a total team effort in 2020 that made it possible to win up and down the ballot. We have the most organized, energized, and motivated political team in the state and, while we’re going to take some time to reflect on our past successes this weekend, we’re not taking our foot off the gas as we head into 2022. This weekend is also the final weekend of the Indiana State Fair. Our volunteers have been at the fair every day this year, collecting signatures, recruiting more teammates, and spreading the word about our great Republican office holders. Doing this work now is what helps us build the momentum to success next year. I’m grateful to everyone who staffed our booth throughout the fair. And, if you haven’t been yet, you still have a couple days left to spend some time at the great Indiana State Fair! Thanks Kyle Photo: Chairman Hupfer and members of the Indiana Republican State Committee during this week's state committee meeting | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | | Building One Indiana for All Governor Holcomb announced the introduction of the Governor's Public Health Commission. This 15 member commission will examine Indiana's public health system and make recommendations to improve its structure, funding and operations. Governor Holcomb ceremonially signed HB1006, Indiana's historic police reform bill. This bill received unanimous bipartisan support as well as backing from state and local law enforcement. This bill will ensure that Hoosier law enforcement officers are properly equipped to respond to daily challenges with transparency and accountability. Governor Holcomb spoke at the National Fraternal Order of Police national conference. He expressed his thanks and gratitude for all of the brave men and women who sacrifice so much to keep our communities safe. Photos: Gov. Holcomb introducing the Governor's Public Health Commission. Gov. Holcomb signing HB1006. Gov. Holcomb attending the National FOP convention. | | | Appeals Court Affirms Gov. Holcomb's Decision on Unemployment The Indiana Court of Appeals ruled that Gov. Holcomb could withdraw Indiana from the federal pandemic unemployment program. “Indiana has more than 143,000 job openings and I know there are even more out there. The Department of Workforce Development continues to work with the unemployed to connect them with the resources they need to gain skills and be matched with employment." -Gov Holcomb. You can read more about the court’s decision here: | | | Mike Pence Op-Ed Vice President Mike Pence wrote an op-ed in the Wall Street Journal this week detailing the complete foreign policy failure the Biden Administration has allowed in Afghanistan. “The Biden administrations’ disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan is a foreign-policy humiliation unlike anything our country has endured since the Iran hostage crisis." -Mike Pence You can read the former Indiana governor’s piece here: | | Upcoming Republican Events Wayne County Lincoln Day Dinner IFRW Tribute to Women Dinner and State Convention : Brown County Republican BBQ : Fulton County Lincoln Day Dinner | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Mark Kelly has shown what’s possible with a Democratic majority. He’s acted to ensure we can put shots in arms, deliver pandemic relief, and take action on climate — all while standing up against the GOP’s relentless attacks on voting rights in his state and across the country.
It’s no wonder why Republicans have made him a top target in their all-out fight to regain the Senate majority. In fact, he already has four Republican opponents — with the latest one backed by a _$10 million_ super PAC. That’s on top of the _$28 million_ Senate Republicans raised last quarter alone to try to unseat strong incumbents like Mark. Plus, Donald Trump just flew to Arizona to attack Mark’s campaign.
Republicans see Arizona as their best path to taking over the Senate majority. We can’t let them flip this seat — our majority and Mark’s voice are too important.
**Please, split a donation to protect our majority and make sure Mark and I can keep working together to make life better for workers and families.**

clean_body: Here’s the truth, folks: Losing even one race means Democrats could lose the U.S. Senate. That’s why it’s so important that we help my colleague, Senator Mark Kelly, win re-election in Arizona. Will you split a donation between our campaigns so we can keep fighting together in Washington for workers and families? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Mark Kelly and Martin Heinrich: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Mark Kelly has shown what’s possible with a Democratic majority. He’s acted to ensure we can put shots in arms, deliver pandemic relief, and take action on climate — all while standing up against the GOP’s relentless attacks on voting rights in his state and across the country. It’s no wonder why Republicans have made him a top target in their all-out fight to regain the Senate majority. In fact, he already has four Republican opponents — with the latest one backed by a $10 million super PAC. That’s on top of the $28 million Senate Republicans raised last quarter alone to try to unseat strong incumbents like Mark. Plus, Donald Trump just flew to Arizona to attack Mark’s campaign. Republicans see Arizona as their best path to taking over the Senate majority. We can’t let them flip this seat — our majority and Mark’s voice are too important. Please, split a donation to protect our majority and make sure Mark and I can keep working together to make life better for workers and families. name: Hillsdale College
subject: Socialism rising?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165185:64eLk0lNE:m:1:3253819041:9F9AFE46A1806AB9A32985645A58F456:r) Dear Peter,
Two years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
To say "everyone" is a gross exaggeration. But it's clear that socialism has made--and continues to make--inroads in America, especially among the young.
Today, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of that support and the amount of opposition to socialism. With your input, we can form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of liberty in our country.
**Please give your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165185:64eLk0lNE:m:1:3253819041:9F9AFE46A1806AB9A32985645A58F456:r)**
With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand mainstream Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.
A recent poll showed that 70% of Millennials are either somewhat likely or extremely likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.
**Why is this?**
For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.
For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.
This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels.
_The New York Times_ ' "1619 Project" is a prime example of this. The mainstream media praised this effort to subvert the proper teaching of American history, and its lead essayist even won a Pulitzer Prize.
In the face of such well-financed efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach efforts have never been more urgently needed**.
By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** , your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.
We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence and underlying the Constitution.
As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."
If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today.
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165185:64eLk0lNE:m:1:3253819041:9F9AFE46A1806AB9A32985645A58F456:r)**
In the face of recent successes by the Left, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Expand the Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Last week, the Supreme Court blocked New York’s extended eviction moratorium by a margin of 6-3.
Allowing hundreds of thousands of evictions as Delta variant cases surge across the country—and across our state—is an enormously irresponsible decision. But it also underscores the need to expand the Supreme Court to prevent the far-right majority from doing further harm to our country.
[**That’s why it’s so important that we pass the Judiciary Act, which will restore ideological balance by adding four seats to the Supreme Court. If you agree, add your name here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34383860/301799365/-156999447?refcode2=a24e8750-e001-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210820-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjRlODc1MC1lMDAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2c8fB2_EqNen9NItlf9clvq6F1cRMRUhM9XixfSQQRg=&emci=9d4e8750-e001-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a24e8750-e001-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
This is just the latest in a series of dangerous, partisan decisions by the Court’s hyper-conservative majority.
A month ago, the Court dealt an enormous blow to voting rights in _Brnovich v. Democratic National Committee_ by upholding local regulations in Arizona that make it harder for people of color to vote.
**Just like the _Brnovich_ decision, the Supreme Court’s choice to block the eviction moratorium will disproportionately impact our nation’s most vulnerable communities.**
If we’re going to prevent the far-right majority from making more decisions that will hurt vulnerable Americans, it’s absolutely critical that we expand the Court.
[**If you agree, please add your name here to say you support the Judiciary Act, which will add four seats to the Supreme Court and dilute the conservative majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34383861/301799366/-156999447?refcode2=a24e8750-e001-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210820-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjRlODc1MC1lMDAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2c8fB2_EqNen9NItlf9clvq6F1cRMRUhM9XixfSQQRg=&emci=9d4e8750-e001-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a24e8750-e001-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=24719896)
In the short-term, Governor Andrew Cuomo must release the billions of dollars in rental assistance—which Congress allocated to our state this year—to renters, in order to prevent a wave of mass evictions.
But let’s be clear: the only way to reverse the Supreme Court majority’s attacks on struggling people is to #ExpandTheCourt.
Thank you for reading,
Mondaire

But let’s be clear: the only way to reverse the Supreme Court majority’s attacks on struggling people is to #ExpandTheCourt. Thank you for reading, Mondaire * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: McConnell’s handpicked candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I’m Catherine Cortez Masto, and I proudly represent Nevada in the U.S. Senate. Last election cycle, I worked tirelessly to defeat Mitch McConnell and help flip the Senate as the Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, Senate Democrats’ campaign arm. Now, Mitch McConnell is making it crystal clear that he wants revenge. In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to split a $5 donation to support my campaign and Maggie’s to defend our hard-won Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34384392/301801568/-849261315?refcode=e20210820_CCM&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGM2ZDE4Ni1lMDAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jb6S37GUFfYr3M_gPEDtSQE2nL0V_nec9mIoKN7zACE=)** I hope you’ll let me explain – because if I lose this race, Democrats will lose the Senate majority. I just got some urgent news that completely changes the state of my race, and I wanted you to be the first to know: **Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate has just _officially_ announced his campaign to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans.** CNN is reporting that my Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip, and The Cook Political Report just shifted this race in Republicans’ favor. Donald Trump nearly flipped Nevada in 2020, and the GOP and outside groups have already spent over $1 million this year to defeat me. **That’s why my campaign just launched an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight. Reaching this goal will help ensure we have the resources to defend this critical seat – and Maggie thought I should reach out. I’m counting on you to rush a donation to help us defend the Senate.[Please, will you donate $5 right now to keep Nevada and New Hampshire blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34384394/301801575/-849261315?refcode=e20210820_CCM&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGM2ZDE4Ni1lMDAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jb6S37GUFfYr3M_gPEDtSQE2nL0V_nec9mIoKN7zACE=)** Nevada races are _always_ close, friend: Just 2 percentage points decided my race in 2016, and just 2 percentage points separated President Biden from Donald Trump last year. Now that the GOP’s dark-money allies have a far-right, Trump-supporting extremist to throw their money behind and flip the only seat they need to regain Senate control, this race could be the most expensive in Nevada history. I really mean it when I say the Senate majority will be decided in Nevada – and the only way I can win is with grassroots supporters like you. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally, friend. Defending our Senate majority is the only way we’ll be able to keep fighting for the progress Americans need and deserve. But defending the Senate will take considerable resources – and right now I’m falling short of my emergency rapid-response goal. **Please, before it’s too late, will you rush a donation to help me win and defend the Senate majority?** Here’s the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mwh-ccm-aug21](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34384398/301801583/-849261315?refcode=e20210820_CCM&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGM2ZDE4Ni1lMDAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jb6S37GUFfYr3M_gPEDtSQE2nL0V_nec9mIoKN7zACE=)** Thank you so much for your support. _¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues! Catherine Cortez Masto
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Malcolm
subject: Sorry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
It's a toss up whether we win this race and expand our Democratic majority, or Mitch McConnell gets his power back
#

Friend,
The fate of the Senate is going to come down to Pennsylvania — and this race is going to be close.
Close enough that it's a toss up whether we win this race and expand our Democratic majority, or Mitch McConnell gets his power back.
Sorry to put that dark thought into your head, but that's the reality of this race.
That’s why we’re asking for $3 today.
Now, you’re probably thinking – how can $3 make any difference when we know Republicans will flood this race with dark money?
Well, by the time you read this, someone already chipped in $3 to this email. And they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because it all adds up, and that’s how we win.
[So we’re politely asking: Could you please make a $3 contribution to help Malcolm Kenyatta win this race and take our fight for working families to the U.S. Senate? Grassroots donations from folks like you are how we fund this movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34386401/301808209/-353695395?refcode2=08ed0e60-e501-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210820-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGVkMGU2MC1lNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhhMFMsFCvYKf9NvGSoQzqrqBCZgnxwb_meBkpcv_uI=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34386402/301808210/-353695395?refcode2=08ed0e60-e501-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210820-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGVkMGU2MC1lNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhhMFMsFCvYKf9NvGSoQzqrqBCZgnxwb_meBkpcv_uI=)**
When we elect Malcolm Kenyatta and send him to Washington to be a champion for working folks like us, we hope you’ll take a moment and feel really good about the decision you made to give today.
Thanks,
Team Malcolm

body:
I've officially announced my campaign

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165224:Ja47p0liN:m:1:3253819041:510CC874B5D32E97CDB45BEBF846B6DC:r)
Peter,

I've officially announced my campaign for U.S. Senate in Nevada and I wanted to tell you first. This race will determine who controls the Senate, so [**if you can chip-in I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165224:Ja47p0liN:m:1:3253819041:510CC874B5D32E97CDB45BEBF846B6DC:r)
