---

Why am I running for U.S. Senate? The radical left, rich elites, woke corporations, academia, Hollywood, and the media - they're all taking over America. They tell lie after lie, making excuses for chaos and violence, ruthlessly enforcing conformity, canceling any who stand in their way. We need to fight for what's right. That's what Americans do. That's a legacy we have a duty to protect.

After 9/11, I volunteered to serve in the Navy, and I served in Iraq during the surge, together with other men and women of all races and backgrounds. We were all Americans, doing our part. Defending this great nation from those determined to destroy it.

As Attorney General of Nevada, I fought for our Constitution and the American way of life, stood up for rape and human trafficking victims who couldn't stand for themselves, and went after guardianship abuse and the opioid crisis.

But the battle to keep our country free doesn't end. If anything, the stakes are higher now than they've ever been in our lifetime.

This campaign will only be possible with the generous support of grassroots conservatives like YOU. [**I hope you'll join us by making a contribution right now. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165224:Ja47p0liN:m:1:3253819041:510CC874B5D32E97CDB45BEBF846B6DC:r)

Thank you for your time.

Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate
************

body:
We need more doctors in Virginia legislature and we got the guy for you. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/099c14be10f9/the-doctor-is-in?e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=ffa5a1bd15&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | Team-

This global pandemic has shown us one thing for sure and it's that we need more doctors and medical personnel in office making policy decisions. Our healthcare system and the health of Virginia needs more doctors to direct our public health. That's why we need to elect Dr. Ben Moses in the 59th district.
[TIME TO PUT THE DOCTOR IN THE HOUSE](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=1bfc3a5170&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=9ba992b2d5&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [Check Out the Joint Fundraising Page Here](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e134791a17&e=76fc145c69)
As our neighbors navigate times of tremendous crisis — from a global pandemic to economic recession to racial injustice — Ben is ready to offer clear, steady leadership in the House of Delegates for the health and success of Central Virginians. In Richmond, Ben will be a fierce advocate for all who call the 59th District home.
As a veteran and an ICU doctor down in the Charlottesville area, Ben is used to dealing with patients in crisis. Right now, public health is in crisis and we need someone to come in and give it the necessary help it deserves. We need a healthcare system that serves everyone and a public health system that can protect the most vulnerable. [Can you help Ben get into that position by chipping in $25, $50, $100, or more to our tandem fundraising effort](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=0b797bef9e&e=76fc145c69)?
---
| Stay well,
Matt

---

name: Allen West
subject: Texans must come first
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN
body:
If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e8d6a25db9864d65affdcb46e3809fe6&_e=7PDQaGdokh39w1spA38NPxCVrMLJGiA1VQ4pood-enLdpSklAEemPFK_lLnA3vzoWJpI9FH9uJ3FjNLFKHC1SlFM6P8hWi5ipjApNS4O5nWEh2HxxWWwB_41aS7YSh5MKFfvQmLpc5adkMBWVanImOqsoTIyT-bbZTzxduDGivG5CqhGkNWJvSXfR94hkaWgDgFzdgHC_bS7U3mTxkDUii-_wEF3HIJOygoyVQAZVPfRJDLBZYHI9BxQ8ftQT6igWblGExYhEGwh4yCSTavVNImt3MnBZLbcEDvqQxMiv_AUn4XOExWu0o7xwuTzK1HdPQ5bO3u2qPj77FlQFcPSXvf_JEAh47sUhklOGcTgNeGQ4NDXHtCOspeJ2vb1bcVn)
---
Peter,

In this Biden-initiated border crisis, illegals are flooding over our southern border in historic numbers, with lawlessness, crime, and now a public health crisis gripping the entire state of Texas.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e8d6a25db9864d65affdcb46e3809fe6&_e=7PDQaGdokh39w1spA38NPxCVrMLJGiA1VQ4pood-enLdpSklAEemPFK_lLnA3vzoWJpI9FH9uJ3FjNLFKHC1SlFM6P8hWi5ipjApNS4O5nWEh2HxxWWwB_41aS7YSh5MKFfvQmLpc5adkMBWVanImOqsoTIyT-bbZTzxduDGivFymw3rKpF_6uJSSAnpnLhPyi-HqxImD03PzhfLbyWASmr10ikhgKAWidfyWvF1Ojkdfi5JJC1q--1_a4107RhSiAnRAD3CCk8CTuiheuAJNPHt4xEHx4fScBDQVtELB1thUX8oGHPwi-ucoAPm-7jGC4tHGyBSTpI53cO53Pb3Ohi3FzQ7XzvLnh6aF82aoM09JZmDadiSpippjP6z7FNg)
The Rio Grande Valley is being hit especially hard, with most new COVID cases coming from illegals or Texans who have encountered these invaders. As the Biden administration, with Gov. Abbott's tacit approval, ships these illegals across the state, other urban health centers such as Houston, Austin, Dallas, and others are also suffering.

Peter, the recent revelation that we have hospitals in our border communities such as McAllen that have reached full capacity treating illegals with COVID is very disturbing. Texas hospitals should be treating Texans, but instead, we have a public health crisis because of an unsecured southern border.

Now, due to the overflow of ill illegals, Gov. Abbott has issued an order stating Texans should not have elective medical procedures!

We should not be sacrificing the healthcare of Texans for people who are violating the rule of law, Peter - it's just common sense.

_In fact_ , we should not be mandating COVID testing, mask wearing, and vaccinations on Texans while simultaneously not requiring the same for the illegals invading our state.

Peter, the lack of leadership in Texas for finally securing our border has resulted in a drug crisis, a rising crime wave, increased sex-trafficking, and a public health crisis across the Lone Star State. We should be putting Texans first, not those who disrespect our sovereignty.

[** PUT TEXANS FIRST ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e8d6a25db9864d65affdcb46e3809fe6&_e=7PDQaGdokh39w1spA38NPxCVrMLJGiA1VQ4pood-enLdpSklAEemPFK_lLnA3vzoWJpI9FH9uJ3FjNLFKHC1SlFM6P8hWi5ipjApNS4O5nWEh2HxxWWwB_41aS7YSh5MKFfvQmLpc5adkMBWVanImOqsoTIyT-bbZTzxduDGivEI-BAghutX5F__lPIyS3Q0l4f9y5zW1ms_PGyrdBg_tggduk1Ey8vHdvlTVEa7Vu0lf9cpPbJT51BorfSkYU9wqtT0MANzAHaNTNab4dlIwNghABr8dh6pdVfb4d8UxLjwDL_mUpnkmTqj4hK8YY-MSLvZUVPweOEMqDqxszzoNwK0ciKq8vIk7GjW1r2tHWWd2A2GEJXYBZk21LFWDL1k)
Prioritizing illegals above Texans has pushed hospitals across our state to the breaking point and is forcing Texans to forego elective surgery and other crucial medical procedures.

If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. Texans must come first.

[**Will you join me in this fight, Peter?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e8d6a25db9864d65affdcb46e3809fe6&_e=7PDQaGdokh39w1spA38NPxCVrMLJGiA1VQ4pood-enLdpSklAEemPFK_lLnA3vzoWJpI9FH9uJ3FjNLFKHC1SlFM6P8hWi5ipjApNS4O5nWEh2HxxWWwB_41aS7YSh5MKFfvQmLpc5adkMBWVanImOqsoTIyT-bbZTzxduDGivFl-wWu9QOp4kUwBzIzhfVAtBUxH4IjiXguHYL-qIHhf623kCf-xnHBwmhIid4i4SA_Bmkj0sgxNWEbREjJy3B7P19cJmi5UOIttCOpcS6O_px7yqefKyPq4SVkWLeJI_09gCgHNEneIN3u8KiuMuciyc3HBpN3QwRanulhWraU5Hhnt4Dtj1m2nlcC49S2fMu1CrAy8HqPtvDtnuJK0ODz)

[**Your generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even more to my campaign will help me reach Texas voters with my winning, conservative message and bring the tough, principled leadership we need in Austin to meet this challenge.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e8d6a25db9864d65affdcb46e3809fe6&_e=7PDQaGdokh39w1spA38NPxCVrMLJGiA1VQ4pood-enLdpSklAEemPFK_lLnA3vzoWJpI9FH9uJ3FjNLFKHC1SlFM6P8hWi5ipjApNS4O5nWEh2HxxWWwB_41aS7YSh5MKFfvQmLpc5adkMBWVanImOqsoTIyT-bbZTzxduDGivHwrEZS-JhNH6p5ShzpeOP7muQPbeuLFnTSVqm4yd8ZiS7MdpqbinKl0uKjnabiMWlw3BtV9Q7GL69ebGxujM0FZSHFoAkt9zlvUngwLq3Y4AQ0LWD_89vo9RBSibpTd9zgux1-6TCruLF-rY75YcLirUFdz_fyk4pbRMlADBura_rNpg5mfidsBDvsYfTWvpEOZxWiT6VOnAGchLyY36cQ)

[**Thank you, Peter - I hope to hear from you today!**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e8d6a25db9864d65affdcb46e3809fe6&_e=7PDQaGdokh39w1spA38NPxCVrMLJGiA1VQ4pood-enLdpSklAEemPFK_lLnA3vzoWJpI9FH9uJ3FjNLFKHC1SlFM6P8hWi5ipjApNS4O5nWEh2HxxWWwB_41aS7YSh5MKFfvQmLpc5adkMBWVanImOqsoTIyT-bbZTzxduDGivHrybLh0AmRbOKRwVx0gWv89BB-j99OR1w70YKJMVlfjS2nS_QucwcUzqzB2Tttx4rPNPf2Up325-rXf1hYwv9p0v_8UHXGr8KYxPQxZBHyFxS-D_fhOjEBF8t084uSk8cOajcHk1Hl5HDbjqaq6lCgR-RdsnsJheqGIBVYvaiRXv6cwsamo7okMw9clNAnRUmUew_7yyclqTi4qKJgsFw1)

For Freedom,

Allen B. West
Lieutenant Colonel (Ret)

[** DONATE ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e8d6a25db9864d65affdcb46e3809fe6&_e=7PDQaGdokh39w1spA38NPxCVrMLJGiA1VQ4pood-enLdpSklAEemPFK_lLnA3vzoWJpI9FH9uJ3FjNLFKHC1SlFM6P8hWi5ipjApNS4O5nWEh2HxxWWwB_41aS7YSh5MKFfvQmLpc5adkMBWVanImOqsoTIyT-bbZTzxduDGivHOAft_M2cxJCgBn-9xC-FW4zsPU0VWw8UiY9UM70Y1JiGUIaUY6xExht0ak3Q2S6u4Ju5iH5OPZmGGSHFmN9WVF6xW1DOI9_7yQC_1VQXinff_qnr4TJpO1dk3f9dQvAEDRidIQyrKkE8hsqSWlPz5yAFvtXbvQPZDlxR2CebY_Xg6QBC_7Iv6lezCfwx3F2FCH9nICsL3MS-FU0lnrKqV)

| | POL. ADV. PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Biden failed America
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC47hzyIhhs6VvJrkFmIE8LahsX6dE44TOaNkyNJDheKYn8v-Gg5JBm_zzk8BQdOPomxbTlPXarPkkizhrS1TofKq24QLOs_Vb7EPnemvtn7Es42YSSfo69Rx9PyEcPYV4HtNMFYb-x1cXGHH2v3cHX58d10wOPE_-8xU81kgorswLicqYXY993zKdp0M5glnBjaehosGo2nzh-bzkZDRMCn77j2GUNfFalpxAZbANwpIUe6u5iru7Oj8-vLaOzoYCcpixxpvePTWOuisMnmfn5bU=&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==)
---
|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I responded to the disastrous fallout of Biden's botched withdrawal from Afghanistan. Biden's actions have stranded thousands of American citizens, abandoned countless interpreters and contractors who risked their lives to help U.S. service members like myself, and offered up every Afghan woman and girl to unspeakable atrocities at the hands of the Taliban.
As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4_ltnKbXqOxqv2ZZlsfzPEVlsZPzcV9zWHf05my3iOa60W3rcZiqyAXLJe_8ynFibKWRtdruJoNJJ4-Sgf2jT3Tns8zpHAti-Mw6-7A07K1ACLLX5xNXm98=&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC47dyEBIA1p3WAc6UgkC4_XTTYUmTA8aPML-A9YeBEId1cEfBDTBqIo7tEFa3so1IkxFSE4BgziGPChD44uVUy_UYmWKUnwE5y3ahAbrG4cnN&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC47dyEBIA1p3WMOEjGrOT0ymQsIpYSydVbioEZaY-RIislbvFUaF-eSBbH-FXyvnLNEjscAvbTPAWot16S-2cirHPDBwWOaMkdosEMgak3Bq0VSr9siPRngE=&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==).
Now, here's your brief.
---
| | |
---
| WE DIDN'T LOSE A WAR. OR EVEN END ONE. WE GAVE UP.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4_QnJL07yS1qAZDLgw_p2CzY9u3wkXWS0F4yIlMEoX7ndoZ0UNC3hTn9F4lkhgtSDzGjtY-jVema0PiIAf0PI3fhEksGLzAfzFCa6yQhlHEs6u-M9u2HjBWL1jXo_1wSatL933yyGllRHr4nPrJBzV7KF1F8S7Hx689Urkmd8DHFwmb5fdZ8j58Tq9tqHbLfXIRavJ0d_KjV0Jeo-v4Hw8IvkOY5Ips3Kg==&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MY WSJ OPED](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4_QnJL07yS1qAZDLgw_p2CzY9u3wkXWS0F4yIlMEoX7ndoZ0UNC3hTn9F4lkhgtSDzGjtY-jVema0PiIAf0PI3fhEksGLzAfzFCa6yQhlHEs6u-M9u2HjBWL1jXo_1wSatL933yyGllRHr4nPrJBzV7KF1F8S7Hx689Urkmd8DHFwmb5fdZ8j58Tq9tqHbLfXIRavJ0d_KjV0Jeo-v4Hw8IvkOY5Ips3Kg==&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==)
This week, I [penned an op-ed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4_QnJL07yS1qAZDLgw_p2CzY9u3wkXWS0F4yIlMEoX7ndoZ0UNC3hTn9F4lkhgtSDzGjtY-jVema0PiIAf0PI3fhEksGLzAfzFCa6yQhlHEs6u-M9u2HjBWL1jXo_1wSatL933yyGllRHr4nPrJBzV7KF1F8S7Hx689Urkmd8DHFwmb5fdZ8j58Tq9tqHbLfXIRavJ0d_KjV0Jeo-v4Hw8IvkOY5Ips3Kg==&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==) in the Wall Street Journal to explain how the crisis in Afghanistan happened and what it means for American prestige and national security.
Joe Biden's decision was reckless and unnecessary. Policy aside, there wasn't even political pressure to take such thoughtless action. The facts on the ground didn't warrant a hasty withdrawal, and intelligence predicted the Taliban would eventually take over. Even worse, this decision was made as the spring fighting season began, all but guaranteeing a Taliban offensive emboldened by the knowledge of an imminent U.S. withdrawal and a collapse of morale by our Afghan allies in uniform and in government.
America didn't lose a war, or even end one. We gave up on a strategic national-security interest. We gave up on our Afghan allies, expecting them to stave off a ruthless insurgency without our crucial support, which came at minimal cost to us. This administration's actions are heartless, its justifications nonsensical. The consequences are dire for innocent Afghans and for America's prestige. Twenty years after 9/11, I pray they don't become equally dire for Americans at home.
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4wGRICLiNa-8VpAIwLEjJ1I2F_zSeogwJV1EtAjjH_oiKXxevK0f8hADhjwMym0dy5cSQyg7J5YVw2awBB-wJWT1XXKasC4uLNd8th_-76G4&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==)
---
| | |
---
| HOW DOES THE SECRETARY OF STATE STILL HAVE A JOB?
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4_Q1vt5obEBBPmHyg0hWzsucwygrbxeVZIjuZLaMAlQcyEvRLv1EnUcZqTaFz6Yqy-9PRibgHCo8MAlgm-25HYIVIbfX9GdW94NEwUnzwmJrj4knf6IrgY8SgktiiH32oqw7_ssd32Tf2y4KA_uQsXcVIYvCBsKZ64oUTBZ6Ee5eI19B4oKRrQI=&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4_Q1vt5obEBBPmHyg0hWzsucwygrbxeVZIjuZLaMAlQcyEvRLv1EnUcZqTaFz6Yqy-9PRibgHCo8MAlgm-25HYIVIbfX9GdW94NEwUnzwmJrj4knf6IrgY8SgktiiH32oqw7_ssd32Tf2y4KA_uQsXcVIYvCBsKZ64oUTBZ6Ee5eI19B4oKRrQI=&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==)

Joe Biden is responsible for this enormous blunder - he owns the lives lost and the devastation in Afghanistan. Equally responsible is Biden's Secretary of State, Anthony Blinken.
State Department was in charge of civilian evacuations. They failed miserably, and continue to fail. When the dust settles it's hard to see how Secretary Blinken should still have a job.
Now, the entire State Department is radio silent because State Department staffers are working from home due to COVID. Congressional offices like mine are coordinating evacuations & delivering critical information because State Department isn't answering the phones. There was zero preparation, and there needs to be resignations and firings once this is all over.
---
| | |
---
| BIDEN LIED
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4_Q1vt5obEBBHHB4qOsJtmlYyeL4Cx2huBBB23H0n5RDXm9hPwBJjyRIH-hwivO7vXDr4ARiyArAunSmq70JGsieNQgJl2qW7CXfHj4dkeWsGS6xEHD0spPVCkNElWz1h2LSEXNEwqkDAl2CDFXpFwAfEV37ao6e1N4jGB1NpqUlm_bjvismi50=&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==)

| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4_Q1vt5obEBBHHB4qOsJtmlYyeL4Cx2huBBB23H0n5RDXm9hPwBJjyRIH-hwivO7vXDr4ARiyArAunSmq70JGsieNQgJl2qW7CXfHj4dkeWsGS6xEHD0spPVCkNElWz1h2LSEXNEwqkDAl2CDFXpFwAfEV37ao6e1N4jGB1NpqUlm_bjvismi50=&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==)
The whole situation in Afghanistan is an abject disaster. But what's the worst part about it all? Joe Biden is lying to the American people.
He knew Kabul would fall and yet he publicly stated that it wouldn't happen. This situation was 100% predictable, but Biden didn't care. And now there are thousands of American citizens stranded at the mercy of the Taliban.
It is hard to imagine what worse leadership might look like at this moment. Biden is a disgrace.
---
| | |
---
| BIDEN IS MUCH WORSE THAN WE THOUGHT
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4-c_XBTLbXghm_OoCYEfRfNsHT_54HgCxeATkKJYGG3lAhDTEhhoD4xOUN1EB5WxteZxlxaMRZScHLOQztPqvigtiwhliUU0gk-6lPemgck4AuoEIAbiP-YpkbKCVIIb7Cp4K6vODN863YpMb_JRJHxQhQyJDrmiBKzbf3ZOEvHfW7V2CtgHt95Y6CQBiSb-XOZpGvzO8q5Oyk-Yg2bMmWBHBFZ_iTi9lcb8CAzxk1qqacFZ7LbjEHlTONbml1cMi9j6L0W56rTR2wGWG3Q6prg=&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==)
---
|
It's hard to imagine that Biden's actions could be any more incompetent - and un-American - than what we've seen unfold over the past week.
But just when you think things couldn't get any worse - this White House finds a new way to surprise us. From destroying American jobs and our economy, opening up our southern border to illegal immigrants, locking down our schools, and now abandoning thousands of American citizens in a war-torn country, Joe Biden is a disaster, and it's only going to get worse.
[Raise your hand if the Biden presidency is way worse than you thought it would be.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SlY4PHsiEOm56499az-1cvS14PiFTdB8kScs3mp5rva0xQcYnmcC4-c_XBTLbXghm_OoCYEfRfNsHT_54HgCxeATkKJYGG3lAhDTEhhoD4xOUN1EB5WxteZxlxaMRZScHLOQztPqvigtiwhliUU0gk-6lPemgck4AuoEIAbiP-YpkbKCVIIb7Cp4K6vODN863YpMb_JRJHxQhQyJDrmiBKzbf3ZOEvHfW7V2CtgHt95Y6CQBiSb-XOZpGvzO8q5Oyk-Yg2bMmWBHBFZ_iTi9lcb8CAzxk1qqacFZ7LbjEHlTONbml1cMi9j6L0W56rTR2wGWG3Q6prg=&c=Vqu3tQy5PcRZDPccjrN-vGYw-32uwVGPZffdaLctumRQqrKi3_6Jcw==&ch=glgadzQ42vRKgv7lb7cO-98SvY3Kn-EKIFZeI1tkFNiK1Ua9EwV44w==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I responded to the disastrous fallout of Biden's botched withdrawal from Afghanistan. Biden's actions have stranded thousands of American citizens, abandoned countless interpreters and contractors who risked their lives to help U.S. service members like myself, and offered up every Afghan woman and girl to unspeakable atrocities at the hands of the Taliban. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | WE DIDN'T LOSE A WAR. OR EVEN END ONE. WE GAVE UP. | == | == This week, I == in the Wall Street Journal to explain how the crisis in Afghanistan happened and what it means for American prestige and national security. Joe Biden's decision was reckless and unnecessary. Policy aside, there wasn't even political pressure to take such thoughtless action. The facts on the ground didn't warrant a hasty withdrawal, and intelligence predicted the Taliban would eventually take over. Even worse, this decision was made as the spring fighting season began, all but guaranteeing a Taliban offensive emboldened by the knowledge of an imminent U.S. withdrawal and a collapse of morale by our Afghan allies in uniform and in government. America didn't lose a war, or even end one. We gave up on a strategic national-security interest. We gave up on our Afghan allies, expecting them to stave off a ruthless insurgency without our crucial support, which came at minimal cost to us. This administration's actions are heartless, its justifications nonsensical. The consequences are dire for innocent Afghans and for America's prestige. Twenty years after 9/11, I pray they don't become equally dire for Americans at home. | | | | == | | | | HOW DOES THE SECRETARY OF STATE STILL HAVE A JOB? | == | == Joe Biden is responsible for this enormous blunder - he owns the lives lost and the devastation in Afghanistan. Equally responsible is Biden's Secretary of State, Anthony Blinken. State Department was in charge of civilian evacuations. They failed miserably, and continue to fail. When the dust settles it's hard to see how Secretary Blinken should still have a job. Now, the entire State Department is radio silent because State Department staffers are working from home due to COVID. Congressional offices like mine are coordinating evacuations & delivering critical information because State Department isn't answering the phones. There was zero preparation, and there needs to be resignations and firings once this is all over. | | | | BIDEN LIED | == | == The whole situation in Afghanistan is an abject disaster. But what's the worst part about it all? Joe Biden is lying to the American people. He knew Kabul would fall and yet he publicly stated that it wouldn't happen. This situation was 100% predictable, but Biden didn't care. And now there are thousands of American citizens stranded at the mercy of the Taliban. It is hard to imagine what worse leadership might look like at this moment. Biden is a disgrace. | | | | BIDEN IS MUCH WORSE THAN WE THOUGHT | == | It's hard to imagine that Biden's actions could be any more incompetent - and un-American - than what we've seen unfold over the past week. But just when you think things couldn't get any worse - this White House finds a new way to surprise us. From destroying American jobs and our economy, opening up our southern border to illegal immigrants, locking down our schools, and now abandoning thousands of American citizens in a war-torn country, Joe Biden is a disaster, and it's only going to get worse. == | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS FOX NEWS: == BREITBART: == FOX NEWS: == In Service, Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | By providing your phone number, you agree to the terms & privacy policy (ckq.io/49500) for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Team Crenshaw to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. Msg&data rates may apply. | | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

| Dear Patriot, _"Put aside all of these issues of concern about liberties and personal liberties."_ You might think that quote was by Xi Jinping in a speech to the Chinese Communist Party. But do you know who actually said it? Anthony Fauci said that on national television just this week. Put aside your liberties! I saw this coming. I knew Fauci would use the "Delta variant" to make a power grab for your freedoms. I saw the mayhem he caused with his destructive lockdowns. And I've seen how he's whipped up fear about the latest wave of COVID infection, and advocated for a new round of restrictions and lockdowns. That's why I have put out a call to all Americans -- RESIST! They can't arrest us all. They can't keep all your kids home from school. The only way to stop these mandates is to refuse to comply. I have two requests for you. [First, please stand with me in this fight by chipping in $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away.](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3D0OC8_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7g-2BeutgZacytakzv2FMnn3ZDi-2FDQVRvcNN2scsJ-2BiTUxNtnj28Z6jxBzrihb-2FdwgRSJ-2BunSfJ1Z6H7z0z1lSVlh76NUqGEJYXdmHAKZxH-2FV0eLwIw7K1F5C2DFvX16oCuqZB5aT5sVZuIfQ1o-2FEMHO98Xh-2B1qngRChWw0aRHaHiC-2FVKNNrPSNB6Lt6LlGYPyY2gnAJjF6b1c4Kz9Anr2JyGy1aJ-2FSItJtStWA-2BOpYIAq4YkK92jMtxkpXJzkVhh1YspTLK4I8aFpHdZAcXaXGmse8B6lE6UWZiZPqDu0W4b-2BFXNpgosAsij569Q19IJCoKYXtrIRTpk-2B69WPltucx6w-3D-3D) And second, ignore Fauci. Go out and live your life freely. I'm done playing nice. I will block the Left's COVID agenda no matter what the cost to me politically. If a school system attempts to keep the children from full-time, in-person school, I will hold up every bill with two amendments... ...one to defund them, and another to allow parents the choice of where the money goes for their child's education. I'm done with this nonsense. I'm making the choice to resist -- and I'm calling on you to resist as well. This stance will surely bring me an enormous amount of political blowback. But when the most powerful bureaucrat in America is ordering people to "put aside their liberties," we truly are at a tipping point. I won't let the Constitution die. And I hope you don't either. Today, I have two urgent requests for you. [First, please help me spread this message of resistance against Fauci by contributing $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately.](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DCRS9_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7g-2BeutgZacytakzv2FMnn3ZDi-2FDQVRvcNN2scsJ-2BiTUxNtnj28Z6jxBzrihb-2FdwgRSJ-2BunSfJ1Z6H7z0z1lSVlh76NUqGEJYXdmHAKZxH-2FV0eLwIw7K1F5C2DFvX16oCuqZB5aT5sVZuIfQ1o-2FEMHO5rpOlsfUbVteR1cdkN5I9Y6odVrBUWAskwGVgOZe-2BN2JgQaP-2B5f4R9Kt-2BD9MJMzLH-2FVJlXL-2FxVpJRej3ER3evjDrUStAHsrG-2FKYD9yoebLxq5OL-2F72OM6LgzPT4PQPiqaxdg7LaAUwXkmLSqn0QtwXR3bZiD1Sk52h5uZO0x19IxzymEImTGUGvb-2FfTkOuzhw-3D-3D) And second, go out and live your life freely, and resist the orders of Fauci. clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, "Put aside all of these issues of concern about liberties and personal liberties." You might think that quote was by Xi Jinping in a speech to the Chinese Communist Party. But do you know who actually said it? Anthony Fauci said that on national television just this week. Put aside your liberties! I saw this coming. I knew Fauci would use the "Delta variant" to make a power grab for your freedoms. I saw the mayhem he caused with his destructive lockdowns. And I've seen how he's whipped up fear about the latest wave of COVID infection, and advocated for a new round of restrictions and lockdowns. That's why I have put out a call to all Americans -- RESIST! They can't arrest us all. They can't keep all your kids home from school. The only way to stop these mandates is to refuse to comply. I have two requests for you. And second, ignore Fauci. Go out and live your life freely. I'm done playing nice. I will block the Left's COVID agenda no matter what the cost to me politically. If a school system attempts to keep the children from full-time, in-person school, I will hold up every bill with two amendments... ...one to defund them, and another to allow parents the choice of where the money goes for their child's education. I'm done with this nonsense. I'm making the choice to resist -- and I'm calling on you to resist as well. This stance will surely bring me an enormous amount of political blowback. But when the most powerful bureaucrat in America is ordering people to "put aside their liberties," we truly are at a tipping point. I won't let the Constitution die. And I hope you don't either. Today, I have two urgent requests for you. And second, go out and live your life freely, and resist the orders of Fauci. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | | ** P.S. Anthony Fauci just ordered the American public to put aside their liberties and obey him. It is time for resistance. I have put out a call to all Americans to say "no!" to Fauci's dictates. They can't arrest us all. This stance will surely bring me an enormous amount of political blowback. But when the most powerful bureaucrat in America is ordering people to "put aside their liberties," we truly are at a tipping point. I must get this message out to the public. And second, after you've contributed -- go out, ignore Fauci, and live your life! ** | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

| | Peter, California Gov. Gavin Newsom attended a get-out-the-vote rally this week where he made the case for why his upcoming election would be essential for a Democratic majority in 2022, saying, “Don't think for a second this isn't also about 2022 and being able to hold the House. The consequences are profound.” And he's right: A Republican victory in this election would ENERGIZE the Republican base like never before. Newsome followed up by saying, “A ‘no' vote would be heard loud and clear, not only across this state, but across the country.” Veteran Democratic strategist Garry South agrees about the importance of Newsom's recall election: “Other than the Virginia governor's race, this is the most important thing going on in the United States.'' Even the White House is becoming more invested, saying that they are in the process of trading schedules to see when President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris would be available to join the campaign trail. The fact is, we knew from the very beginning we couldn’t match Glenn’s resources unless we had the largest grassroots donor army in the history of Virginia behind us. Our email program is the heart and soul of that effort.

**More than 80% of our online donations come from these emails — folks who chip in $25 or $50 whenever they can.**

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Tucker vs. Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165737:6NOtA0lNv:m:1:3253819041:177AE5E7CB8AD3AB6CB37AFA2D6F8329:r) | |
---
Peter,

With Afghanistan in shambles and Leftists across America trampling our freedoms, "Republican" Adam Kinzinger decided it was finally time to act.

And he stood up for the people he represents by attacking the biggest threat to America... Tucker Carlson???

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165737:6NOtA0lNv:m:1:3253819041:177AE5E7CB8AD3AB6CB37AFA2D6F8329:r)

_What on EARTH is he thinking?!_

I don't know about you, Peter, but when it's time to choose between Crying Adam Kinzinger and Tucker Carlson, I'm Team Tucker all the way.

**That 's why I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). It's time to finally get this clown out of office.**

My name is Catalina Lauf. I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue_.**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

He's gone all in with the fake news. _Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165737:6NOtA0lNv:m:1:3253819041:177AE5E7CB8AD3AB6CB37AFA2D6F8329:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165737:6NOtA0lNv:m:1:3253819041:177AE5E7CB8AD3AB6CB37AFA2D6F8329:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it.

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. _He 's working for them, after all._

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.

**[> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165737:6NOtA0lNv:m:1:3253819041:177AE5E7CB8AD3AB6CB37AFA2D6F8329:r)**

Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.

[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165737:6NOtA0lNv:m:1:3253819041:177AE5E7CB8AD3AB6CB37AFA2D6F8329:r)
Thank you,
Catalina Lauf

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Meet Elissa Slotkin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hO58jI5mOuE_BEhnxRXm9F8TUJ9pufU2Wh-B65A5cc0=/kfNhfJZTXFD5jL-VwV6Z1KtrQ8TrFp9sdimSxQWtbS0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210820-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter -- I want to introduce you to one of my closest friends in Congress, Congresswoman Elissa Slotkin [MI-D].

Elissa served in national security roles for presidents of both parties, and in Congress she's fighting for economic security, affordable healthcare, and clean water. She represents Michigan's 8th district, which includes Lansing and Mid-Michigan.

Our road to the House of Representatives has a lot of parallels. **Elissa and I both served in the CIA, and before we ran for Congress, neither of us ever imagined we would run for office.** We were happily serving our country in the national security world, but after President Trump's election in 2016, something changed.

Both of us went home to districts that had been represented by Republicans for years, but we felt that our Republican congressmen weren't living up to their promise to represent and serve our communities. **The tone and tenor of our politics were unbecoming of the country we loved and had served, and we both made the decision to run.**

When we got to Congress, the way we approached governing and politics was just different. **And as we governed through the turbulence of 2019 and 2020, we did so not by simply asking how we would get ourselves re-elected, but by voting our conscience and standing up for our values.**

Sadly, many of our class of 2018 colleagues were not re-elected in 2020. Elissa and I both won our races by tight margins, and now are under constant attack from GOP groups that want to flip our seats in 2022. Frankly, we represent two "must win" districts if Democrats want to keep the slim House majority.

[_**Consider splitting a contribution today between the two of us that will help us defend our seats, and continue governing with principle and integrity.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hO58jI5mOuE_BEhnxRXm9F8TUJ9pufU2Wh-B65A5cc0=/yQIDTkK-HLAKmqRTfeBhn77R6HvL2o4S0lYTZnHBslc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210820-1-EM&amount=25)

clean_body: | | Peter -- I want to introduce you to one of my closest friends in Congress, Congresswoman Elissa Slotkin [MI-D]. Elissa served in national security roles for presidents of both parties, and in Congress she's fighting for economic security, affordable healthcare, and clean water. She represents Michigan's 8th district, which includes Lansing and Mid-Michigan. Our road to the House of Representatives has a lot of parallels. Elissa and I both served in the CIA, and before we ran for Congress, neither of us ever imagined we would run for office. We were happily serving our country in the national security world, but after President Trump's election in 2016, something changed. Both of us went home to districts that had been represented by Republicans for years, but we felt that our Republican congressmen weren't living up to their promise to represent and serve our communities. The tone and tenor of our politics were unbecoming of the country we loved and had served, and we both made the decision to run. When we got to Congress, the way we approached governing and politics was just different. And as we governed through the turbulence of 2019 and 2020, we did so not by simply asking how we would get ourselves re-elected, but by voting our conscience and standing up for our values. Sadly, many of our class of 2018 colleagues were not re-elected in 2020. Elissa and I both won our races by tight margins, and now are under constant attack from GOP groups that want to flip our seats in 2022. Frankly, we represent two "must win" districts if Democrats want to keep the slim House majority. | Abigail * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Derek Marshall
subject: Healthcare is a human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
It’s been a hell of a year. **It’s not an exaggeration to say that the COVID-19 pandemic has changed every aspect of our lives since March 2020.** Many of us have lost friends, family, or colleagues to this vicious virus, and are still figuring out how to live on without them.
The worst part is that even those who receive treatment and recover are often saddled with impossible debts. They survived, but the medical debt threatens to bankrupt them. In America, single-payer universal healthcare can feel like a pipe dream. But nothing has shone the light on our disastrous healthcare system than COVID-19. **Fighting the pandemic is hard enough; our healthcare system shouldn’t be making it any harder. **

Recent studies have shown that America ranks dead last among the wealthiest nations when it comes to our healthcare. We pay the most and receive the worst quality care compared to other wealthy nations.**That’s why we need Medicare for All, and we need it now. **

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34390180/301822846/-613819939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODBiZWQ0MC1mMTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zo_Ts_BThnjDUmef6eot4-84uLYElaVa4yiohXBdJp0=)

**There is no time to waste.[Your donation today will get me one step further to the halls of Congress so I can fight for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34390182/301822853/-613819939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODBiZWQ0MC1mMTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zo_Ts_BThnjDUmef6eot4-84uLYElaVa4yiohXBdJp0=)**

Skeptics love to ask, “but how can we afford to pay for it?” I ask them, “how can we afford not to?” **Medicare for All is incredibly popular among the American people, but support in Congress is lacking. **

That’s why it’s one of my top policy priorities, one that I will never ever compromise on.**The simple fact of the matter is we need more Members of Congress who are willing to fight tooth and nail for Medicare for All.** With your investments, we can get closer to winning this election so I can get to work advocating for Medicare for All.**[Can I count on your support to help us grow our movement—and win? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34390184/301822856/-1739883508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODBiZWQ0MC1mMTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zo_Ts_BThnjDUmef6eot4-84uLYElaVa4yiohXBdJp0=)**
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

name: Team Schrier
subject: Republicans want SCOTUS to overturn Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
After the Supreme Court agreed to hear a direct challenge to Roe v Wade, more than 200 Republican members of Congress called on the Court to overturn this landmark decision. Republicans want to use this case to rollback reproductive rights for millions of Americans. We can't let them get away with it. We wanted to make sure you heard about Republicans' latest attacks on reproductive rights, Peter.

After the Supreme Court agreed to hear a direct challenge to _Roe v. Wade_ , more than 200 Republican members of Congress called on the Court to overturn this landmark decision. Republicans want to use this case to roll back reproductive rights for millions of Americans. We can't let them get away with it.

As a doctor, Kim will always defend a person's right to make their own reproductive health care decisions. That's why she's fighting back against these attacks on our reproductive rights and working to ensure every person has access to the care they need -- but she needs to know you're with her in this important fight.

**[Add your name right away to stand with Kim in the fight to protect reproductive rights>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34390380/301823704/1723502593?gpsid=8_30_20065&ms=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzBiZWQ0MC1mMTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7ljjMHrgUy70oBIopGzg_256aH1N7PFt-r3NtNc7vg=&emci=a186d5a4-3401-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8c0bed40-f101-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)**

Subject: Reproductive rights are under attack

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34390381/301823705/1723502593?gpsid=8_30_20065&ms=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzBiZWQ0MC1mMTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7ljjMHrgUy70oBIopGzg_256aH1N7PFt-r3NtNc7vg=&emci=a186d5a4-3401-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8c0bed40-f101-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338) Reproductive rights are under attack, team.

The Supreme Court announced earlier this year that they will review Mississippi's restrictive abortion ban. **Now, 228 Republican members of Congress are calling on the Supreme Court to overturn the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision.**

With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Supreme Court, Republicans think this case is the opportunity they've been waiting for to roll back the rights established by _Roe_. If they get their way, access to reproductive health care for millions of Americans will be at risk.

**[We can't let Republicans get away with their attacks on our reproductive rights. Add your name to join Kim in calling for protections to reproductive health care>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34390382/301823706/1723502593?gpsid=8_30_20065&ms=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzBiZWQ0MC1mMTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7ljjMHrgUy70oBIopGzg_256aH1N7PFt-r3NtNc7vg=&emci=a186d5a4-3401-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8c0bed40-f101-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34390383/301823734/1723502593?gpsid=8_30_20065&ms=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210820_roe2_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzBiZWQ0MC1mMTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7ljjMHrgUy70oBIopGzg_256aH1N7PFt-r3NtNc7vg=&emci=a186d5a4-3401-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8c0bed40-f101-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)

Look -- the outcome of this Supreme Court case could determine the future of reproductive rights in our country. If _Roe_ is overturned, we can expect to see states across the country pass _even more_ restrictions on a person's right to make their own reproductive decisions.

As a doctor, Kim knows how important access to reproductive health care is. That's why she's fighting in Congress to protect reproductive rights and ensure personal health decisions are between a patient and their doctor only. But she needs to know you have her back.

name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: [Special Announcement!] Your Weekly TL;DR Download
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee,
body:
Our whirlwind week 🌀

NDTC-TLDR-Logo
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..zXIvolk0hWRHQCK9jy_wBkTNgGM7PZ5-l0W98Pdv5fk )

-------------------------------------------
ALL THE GUST FOR OUR FIRST EVER CO-CHAIRS 💨
-------------------------------------------

Illustration with text reading, '2021 New NDTC Honorary
Co-Chairs.' Featuring picture of Congresswomen Nikema Williams
with her quote, 'The work that NDTC does is critical for
Democrats as we build the largest, most diverse bench in the
country.' Picture of Congresswoman Katie Porter with her quote,
'Access to knowledge can be the biggest obstacle to people
getting involved in politics.' Picutre of Congresswoman Lauren
Underwood with her quote, 'My campaign training with NDTC was the
game changer that launched me on the path to victory.
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..v8IkiBivSn6nytLwlc7nTT7hK-eLnGGyFmXqgDseMbw )

We won’t get winded telling you all this, but we’re excited to
announce that U.S. Reps. Katie Porter (CA-45), Lauren Underwood
(IL-14), and Nikema Williams (GA-05) are NDTC’s first ever
Honorary Co-Chairs!

These three amazing leaders represent what NDTC promotes every
day: eliminating the barriers to entry often involved in
politics.

Keep reading to learn more about these incredible women!

-----------------------------------------------------------------
Introducing NDTC Honorary Co-Chairs Katie Porter, Lauren
Underwood, and Nikema Williams
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..FS_wHefPu9MwrcjqsST6gZK3t-A7wPQiLkRu0QaWTHY )

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Meet our three co-chairs in our latest article!

Rep. Katie Porter flipped her historically red district blue not
once, but twice as the only single mother of children in
Congress.

Lauren Underwood is the youngest African American woman to become
a U.S. Representative.

A graduate of a historically black college & university (HBCU)
and a long-time Democratic leader in Georgia, Nikema Williams now
represents the district of the late John Lewis.

For more information about these women, their experiences, and
how they’ll help NDTC continue equipping you with the trainings
needed to win, click the button below:

READ NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1kW2bEfHQX6fsRE30-owXuUQyaaaVAYTVg1PJl3GF50 )

---------------------
Co-Chairs in the News
---------------------

Read all about it! This week’s announcement of our co-chairs has
garnered some attention — check out the article below:

* FROM NBC NEWS: Rising stars tapped to chair Democratic training
organization
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..SZV58wFA8euIXD5Ppzq561-nGj7mclkVGbiG9dMTWpI )
— “NDTC will use the congresswomen to amplify their free
training programs for Democrats across the country hoping to run
for office themselves, or looking to work on campaigns.”

------------------
Next Week’s Lineup
------------------

We know we threw a lot of exciting news your way, but you won’t
want to miss next week’s insightful trainings:

NDTC's Candidate Bootcamp
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jwpJbZiBYVH4oZuweqhVW-WKohfU3x3n4A-UWaPRDoM )

TOMORROW, August 21, 1pm ET

Candidates and campaign staff from across the country are coming
together for a day of training and networking to launch Democrats
to VICTORY! You won’t want to miss it.

REGISTER NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..qeZ9Fmt2Jw24n0rKTSBFqrNdPWHLao6bDtaYmsG9jyM )

What is GOTV?
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..zJ1QeNnhAJiGLGs2N4qsBPHOQuHJ92JD646Rc93OSVw )

Tuesday, August 24, 1pm ET

Get Out the Vote (GOTV) is the linchpin to your campaign’s
success. So stop by Tuesday’s training to get a head start on
creating and executing your GOTV plan!

RSVP NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..kSgnjUmOH7k5ElK6beefSpt5sbnguj5c7UH9FB4HFT4 )

Do You Want to Run for Office?
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..O28ipvvdFb2WgSJeebsOs_JMMywDVC_qNnlgohLHmxw )

Wednesday, August 25, 8pm ET

Whether you’ve decided to run or you’re just thinking about it,
this training will give you the tools you need to take your next
steps.

RSVP NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..nrx75Kz52FUJmBkfS8L9LaKDb5MSzewAcNFPXL-TMAM )

Trainer Talks: Implementing Your GOTV Plan
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..SbVT85sHvllujUHO3aDmj2hC6zt1YYpepL3IlLfh24c )

Friday, August 27, 1pm ET

Join three campaign experts to hear about their experiences with
GOTV and learn how to make your campaign a resounding success
through tried-and-true GOTV tactics.

Come prepared with questions for these three expert trainers!
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..CYadWAgvfTEYUbQAGFnYvsnJ5mK4c-vaGBFz18_PNas )

RSVP NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..i33Zbm8o_iuQMH_2f7DnaIX8dnGQ_VO9dCubJUmC2KE )

See you next week!

— The NDTC Team

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — This is NOT the news we were hoping to share today.
There is a little **over a week** to go until our important August fundraising deadline and we still have some work to do to reach our 50,000 contribution goal.
Now usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about this but we are facing two big problems. First, Donald Trump said that, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.” And second, this month CNN again named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
So we really can’t afford to fall short. It is critical that our fundraising stays on track because if it doesn’t, Trump, Mitch McConnell and their allies will spot an opening and ramp up their attacks on our campaign.
[**So here’s the plan: Can you send a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign today? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210820-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1173_6688874_f2ojuq&akid=1173%2E6688874%2Ef2ojuq)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210820-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1173_6688874_f2ojuq&akid=1173%2E6688874%2Ef2ojuq)**

Thank you for your support ahead of this month’s deadline. We simply can’t fund this people-powered campaign without you.
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210820-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1173_6688874_f2ojuq&akid=1173%2E6688874%2Ef2ojuq)**

name: Hala Ayala
subject: This is a long email, but I mean every word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala For Virginia P
body:
It would mean so much to me if you read the whole thing.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34391917/301829072/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzNhZGQ3My1mNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjQDnj4bBouN4AKkVxR0EdhPxt7zWJsP2Ie4QIDP0jU=)
---
Hi there, Peter: I’m going to ask you to chip in $3 at the end of this long email.

[**It would mean so much to me if you read the whole thing and considered donating $3 toward our $5,000 fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34391918/301829073/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210820_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzNhZGQ3My1mNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjQDnj4bBouN4AKkVxR0EdhPxt7zWJsP2Ie4QIDP0jU=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34391919/301829074/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210820_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzNhZGQ3My1mNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjQDnj4bBouN4AKkVxR0EdhPxt7zWJsP2Ie4QIDP0jU=)
---
I am a Virginian, born and raised.

**And I uniquely understand the struggles of so many working families in our state ‐‐ because I’ve lived them.**

Growing up, my immigrant family struggled to make ends meet.

And when I was pregnant, my job didn’t offer health insurance. When my son had health complications, Medicaid saved our lives.

From then on, I built my cybersecurity career while being a single mom.

I’m proud of where I came from, and I was so proud to bring a voice to Virginia’s 51st District as their Delegate since 2017.

**And as your Lt. Governor, I’m committed to celebrating Virginia’s growing diversity and supporting Virginians of all backgrounds.**

The hard-working people of Virginia deserve a Lt. Governor who understands their struggles, and works side by side with them to lift them up.

[**I can’t wait to do this together, Peter! But this won’t be possible if we fall short on Election Day this November. So I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $3 today to my campaign? Every dollar counts in a race like this one.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34391920/301829075/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210820_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzNhZGQ3My1mNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjQDnj4bBouN4AKkVxR0EdhPxt7zWJsP2Ie4QIDP0jU=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34391926/301829081/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=HAFV_20210820_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzNhZGQ3My1mNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjQDnj4bBouN4AKkVxR0EdhPxt7zWJsP2Ie4QIDP0jU=)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34391927/301829082/2130246724?amount=7&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=HAFV_20210820_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzNhZGQ3My1mNTAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjQDnj4bBouN4AKkVxR0EdhPxt7zWJsP2Ie4QIDP0jU=)

name: Josh Harder
subject: My thoughts on my Republican opponents
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8xPTp1E7ZWNKri83vLRYIsBclpd-2rPDeUJKRBHmHAE=/fHx0eIq1-mqy7QV1-gnOPYH7DT2lDY38zIB6qYCYGkk=?refcode=E10841-20210820-Opponents2-header-GOP-RegTemplate-CampaignNews-NA&amount=15) | Hey Peter, it's Josh here. Yesterday, my team broke the news to our supporters that I'm now facing two Republican opponents who are gunning for this seat. If I've learned anything, I know this is just the beginning - Republican Super PACs are going to coalesce around one GOP candidate and try with all their might to flip this seat red. Competitive races are nothing new to me. Last year, I faced a competitive election against an extremist candidate who did everything in his power to divide and distract voters from the real issues folks here in the Valley are facing. It got ugly - we even had to deal with our campaign's signs being vandalized and destroyed in the weeks leading up to the election: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8xPTp1E7ZWNKri83vLRYIsBclpd-2rPDeUJKRBHmHAE=/fHx0eIq1-mqy7QV1-gnOPYH7DT2lDY38zIB6qYCYGkk=?refcode=E10841-20210820-Opponents2-graphic-GOP-RegTemplate-CampaignNews-NA&amount=15) While we were able to beat our opponent last year, I was one of only a handful of swing-seat Democrats to survive last year's election. Now, our Democratic Majority hinges on keeping CA-10 blue. If you want to continue to see me fighting for you in Congress, then I'm personally asking for your support. Will you chip in to help our team build for another competitive election next year? **I 'm dropping my personal ActBlue link below for you to securely contribute:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-10-Email-Aug2021-FR-August?refcode2=Peter**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8xPTp1E7ZWNKri83vLRYIsBclpd-2rPDeUJKRBHmHAE=/fHx0eIq1-mqy7QV1-gnOPYH7DT2lDY38zIB6qYCYGkk=?refcode=E10841-20210820-Opponents2-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-CampaignNews-NA&amount=15) I hope to see your name come through before the weekend. Thanks so much for standing with our team. \- Josh

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Vaccine Mandate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, OR let the government enforce mandates? . Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_s=ddef777aefd947be8796b665a9526523&_t=U72gEg92NvpmVsNe2IR7yFJGG3oXDkefc0Ws7Bua031pv4UofzsQFGsPI16tUSJBa57dl97Dkq-y87B7rLDGLhwnmUZ444sP8wP4lAKUe1Dz-BckPALv9-motB5wY0rcdNGRHZLZLnMFSw2bTLh7ydVX-0uenRgYzW9wU0E3pfA%3D)

| [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ddef777aefd947be8796b665a9526523&_e=g5Ic7JP6WQSYst9ACQo4HH2pg33sSyvRF1d4gL4-4zGPlz4TY28t1jmt-qUiRlksEgpa85PcfR1Cdek2iXa9hNJC09DXoIgHdToPvlZjWQwYBx7CyXIyS1lBgC00OfjTuh8nrwG9_IHB9YWHNJ9IlOYbCuNBtLcCexuyKTufFsVurAkI3zWMr_qfdCavB1BSvanJRoN0yLOw42DVy6qhAUfOS9v8NOYRyra0Vcw-t9I79x-qwysll0pPLbhszq_M18Q8p0PivfOxN3IG_OfEJ_J_80LbRSBPjilwG-tbbCm0OlaG9gLEh0pm_l_-jmKoRpWpgU8y0dAqb-EOIsaS1-r-RfuxAx3GcGR-hOk-o5KYdricvsx2NWtqCKvx4f5Q4iOzItGtOMPWXL4a5WSZ2-KwXZLWIYZkl9gbNrPeJFpW4xAnZXwm4a8973wKZcDRFqmXrbJugsNmu65sx5PgmxwSizY4ahsF0GJgfZbC7Kwl3JUp6UuI-Qs46O1ISbSZ8vhzq6mst4mIV_Aoc9YnKw%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ddef777aefd947be8796b665a9526523&_e=g5Ic7JP6WQSYst9ACQo4HH2pg33sSyvRF1d4gL4-4zGPlz4TY28t1jmt-qUiRlksEgpa85PcfR1Cdek2iXa9hNJC09DXoIgHdToPvlZjWQwYBx7CyXIyS1lBgC00OfjTuh8nrwG9_IHB9YWHNJ9IlOYbCuNBtLcCexuyKTufFsVurAkI3zWMr_qfdCavB1BSvanJRoN0yLOw42DVy6qhAUfOS9v8NOYRyra0Vcw-t9I79x-qwysll0pPLbhszq_M18Q8p0PivfOxN3IG_OfEJ_J_80LbRSBPjilwG-tbbCm0OlaG9gLEh0pm_l_-jmKo9fxW4hxcpz9LWhwgl8UED2tQlX4vdqzJQ2glvTLiBSKfNJAcBsTro7n6-AKh6s1QOHvHP_bAkDSLM-30nJNcluOv4fi9Q9b68ixaGzn2jTTrGU2JL1LOMxcN-OtZ4XxCdTNG74xzNNB1ko2muHIWsX5CiYFWUMbWqSh7NCFeFtw1MNqCYGHciPNr0_BnqaNbLh0P6duaBzRNupgRLjpoAQ%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ddef777aefd947be8796b665a9526523&_e=g5Ic7JP6WQSYst9ACQo4HH2pg33sSyvRF1d4gL4-4zGPlz4TY28t1jmt-qUiRlksEgpa85PcfR1Cdek2iXa9hNJC09DXoIgHdToPvlZjWQwYBx7CyXIyS1lBgC00OfjTuh8nrwG9_IHB9YWHNJ9IlOYbCuNBtLcCexuyKTufFsVurAkI3zWMr_qfdCavB1BSvanJRoN0yLOw42DVy6qhAUfOS9v8NOYRyra0Vcw-t9I79x-qwysll0pPLbhszq_M18Q8p0PivfOxN3IG_OfEJ_J_80LbRSBPjilwG-tbbCm0OlaG9gLEh0pm_l_-jmKoFFUOIoovcp63RuAR7xR6GiVLMzAAbks0PQg4VCKhi3jV0G2bVJjQopKdls_k_ROX7FYUVn9kjUmpKrrbbyOBmhR0V6tiwL1MPf4tJ3RhWNKGyIMM8cx-W5csOB2TJzx0CNy83P0uGhwGsuBGtdbzqCHWX-xCJkJY7aFNAn_BfGse5K80SI585nWgWjVsigRYfuIWBljWbjvaHuQ4avtZbQ%3D%3D)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 17TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Impeach Biden; fire Milley
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden's incompetence costs American lives |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2c524b39ac&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I served in Afghanistan during my 27 years in the Army.

I know exactly how a well functioning army operates. I know what our protocols are. And I know the capabilities of our enemy, the Taliban. I fought them before.

That is why I can say with confidence: Impeach Biden. Fire and court-martial Milley.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4cab9ca333&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who is a Biden lackey I can beat.**

Darren Soto is just another mindless Democrat who will never hold Joe Biden to account. He will never hold Milley to account.

It's been a week since this disaster unfolded and Soto hasn't spoken out against Biden. He will NEVER hold Biden accountable.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9fe9d43a69&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Now, why should we hold Biden accountable? Here is an except from an interview I did this week:

_Republican congressional candidate Bill Olson charged Wednesday that the Biden administration’s big mistake in the Afghanistan pullout occurred last month when it let the American military give up its biggest air power asset — Bagram Airfield.

Olson, an Army veteran who served in Afghanistan, worked for the Joint Special Operations Command out of Bagram 13 years ago. He said the airfield north of Kabul was the center of American air power superiority and had kept everything in check.

The American military pulled out of Bagram in August. The Afghanistan military abandoned it. Then the Taliban claimed it by mid-August. The rest of the country fell swiftly, leaving America’s exit in chaos this week after 20 years of war and occupation.

“I’m not a brilliant strategist but I do know this: I do know that our strategy is when you are out there you are going to, as much as possible, use that air power. So the Taliban was kept at bay ... _Once you don’t have that air cover it makes it incredibly difficult to keep or take ground, and be safe about it,” Olson said._

“If you listen to (National Security Adviser) Jake Sullivan and President Joe Biden, they said they had every contingency covered. **Well, obviously they didn’t,** ” Olson said.

**Olson expressed outrage that the Biden administration would not answer affirmatively when asked if America would keep troops in Afghanistan until it can evacuate all Americans.**

“The answer to that question is, ‘Yes! Yes we will stay as long as it takes to rescue Americans.’ We do not leave Americans behind. But they were given the opportunity to say that and for some reason they’re not saying it,” Olson said.

_**He called for the resignation of Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Gen. Mark Milley.**_

Olson spent 27 years in the Army, retiring as a sergeant first class. In addition to serving in Afghanistan, he also served in Iraq in Operation Desert Storm and Operation Desert Shield.

He said he is not against the pull-out from Afghanistan, saying that conclusion is almost universal. He said he also does not want Biden to fail in Afghanistan, even though Olson is a Republican. He also said it was almost inevitable that America would get out. But Olson could not contain his outrage at how it’s happening.

**In 2007 and 2008 Olson was in Afghanistan, based at Bagram. Bagram is the largest airfield in the country, and can support any kind of aircraft, Olson said. American military flew special operations and drones from the base.**

“I was intimate with what it was like to be there. To be honest, I was shocked. That was the linchpin. We were able to create that air support not just for ours but as well as for the Afghanis,” Olson said. “Almost in the dead of night, the rest of the (Afghan) Air Force and Army personnel left, and the Taliban took over in a day or two.”_

Biden is incompetent. He is pleading with the Taliban that we held under our heel just 20 days ago to allow the 15-40,000 Americans left in Afghanistan to be evacuated.

Biden never even thought about this. He never thought about evacuating personnel, or equipment, or our allies. He's even charging evacuees $2000 for the flight out!

**Biden has betrayed our nation, and his woke lackey Gen. Milley went along with it. Biden should be impeached, and Milley should be fired and court-martialed.**
---
|
---
| **Biden vacations while Americans are stranded in Afghanistan due to his incompetence. It's his Saigon, PLUS his Benghazi.**

**President Trump had a better plan. You evacuate your people first, then the equipment, THEN the military. **

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He's the worst President we ever had, and he should be impeached for what he's done.

_I will vote to impeach Biden. Darren Soto will not._

Biden needs to be fought, the American people want him to be challenged, and I will challenge him every day!

The Dems control all of the Federal government. We cannot hope to hold Biden accountable while Pelosi is the Speaker. The Republic needs us to impeach Biden! [Help me put a check and balance on Biden and Pelosi!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fc58f6a244&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c302106f7c&e=afa21b7626)? It's a red-trending swing seat that I overperformed in last year. Florida is swinging red, and people want us to stop Biden's demented policies and reform our woke military!

Biden showed that the emperor has no clothes. He will destroy this country entirely if we don't stop him. Help me stand up to "Joke Biden"!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c0c39511ef&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ed61c05887&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2b70d8bdf0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=184a91558c&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |
