Once you don’t have that air cover it makes it incredibly difficult to keep or take ground, and be safe about it,” Olson said. “If you listen to (National Security Adviser) Jake Sullivan and President Joe Biden, they said they had every contingency covered. Well, obviously they didn’t, ” Olson said. Olson expressed outrage that the Biden administration would not answer affirmatively when asked if America would keep troops in Afghanistan until it can evacuate all Americans. “The answer to that question is, ‘Yes! Yes we will stay as long as it takes to rescue Americans.’ We do not leave Americans behind. But they were given the opportunity to say that and for some reason they’re not saying it,” Olson said. He called for the resignation of Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Gen. Mark Milley. Olson spent 27 years in the Army, retiring as a sergeant first class. In addition to serving in Afghanistan, he also served in Iraq in Operation Desert Storm and Operation Desert Shield. He said he is not against the pull-out from Afghanistan, saying that conclusion is almost universal. He said he also does not want Biden to fail in Afghanistan, even though Olson is a Republican. He also said it was almost inevitable that America would get out. But Olson could not contain his outrage at how it’s happening. In 2007 and 2008 Olson was in Afghanistan, based at Bagram. Bagram is the largest airfield in the country, and can support any kind of aircraft, Olson said. American military flew special operations and drones from the base. “I was intimate with what it was like to be there. To be honest, I was shocked. That was the linchpin. We were able to create that air support not just for ours but as well as for the Afghanis,” Olson said. “Almost in the dead of night, the rest of the (Afghan) Air Force and Army personnel left, and the Taliban took over in a day or two.” Biden is incompetent. He is pleading with the Taliban that we held under our heel just 20 days ago to allow the 15-40,000 Americans left in Afghanistan to be evacuated. Biden never even thought about this. He never thought about evacuating personnel, or equipment, or our allies. He's even charging evacuees $2000 for the flight out! Biden has betrayed our nation, and his woke lackey Gen. Milley went along with it. Biden should be impeached, and Milley should be fired and court-martialed. | | Biden vacations while Americans are stranded in Afghanistan due to his incompetence. It's his Saigon, PLUS his Benghazi. President Trump had a better plan. You evacuate your people first, then the equipment, THEN the military. Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He's the worst President we ever had, and he should be impeached for what he's done. I will vote to impeach Biden. Darren Soto will not. Biden needs to be fought, the American people want him to be challenged, and I will challenge him every day! The Dems control all of the Federal government. We cannot hope to hold Biden accountable while Pelosi is the Speaker. The Republic needs us to impeach Biden! ? It's a red-trending swing seat that I overperformed in last year. Florida is swinging red, and people want us to stop Biden's demented policies and reform our woke military! Biden showed that the emperor has no clothes. He will destroy this country entirely if we don't stop him. Help me stand up to "Joke Biden"! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - ! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. | | PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Don't forget about America's political prisoners
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
We can't be distracted. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/dont-forget-political-prisoners-2472834?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f58a1388ba&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

We have a major crisis unfolding in Afghanistan, thanks to the non-existent leadership of our "Commander-in Chief."

American citizens are stranded there because the Biden Administration foolishly packed up the military and left before our citizens could get out.

That's an urgent problem that needs to be solved, and the Biden Administration, woke generals, and incompetent cabinet officials must pay.

But we also have to keep our eye on the ball, because we still have political prisoners being held right here in Washington, D.C.

Peaceful protestors from January 6 are being confined in solitary confinement for nonviolent crimes.

It's wrong and un-American, and their constitutional rights are being violated as I type this message.

_Some don't have trial dates. Some are being denied access to attorneys. I'm told the conditions in the jail are horrific_...

..._And the prisoners were put on lockdown after I tried -- and was barred -- from visiting them last week_.

The Communist Democrats must release their political prisoners right away, and I won't stop making a fuss about it until they do.

[**Show me you have my back with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=cfe41c585f&e=645b3b1338).

I am doing all that I can to help, but I need you to understand what's at risk, friend.

The GOP Establishment doesn't want us asking questions about the January 6 prisoners, and the RINOs already have me as their _Number One_ target for replacement next year.

It could cost me my political career, but I don't care. _It's crucially important that we demand the release of the January 6 prisoners before America descends into a Communist hell_.

[**With your generous contributions to my reelection campaign today, you can tell the Establishment that you want to KEEP this America First warrior in Washington**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=3ba1253020&e=645b3b1338).

[**_A contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or MORE to my reelection campaign right away, helps me fend off anything the Establishment D.C. Swamp might throw at me while I fight for freedom for the political prisoners stuck in D.C. jail_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b38db8f75c&e=645b3b1338).

We must stay focused on the issue at hand, fellow patriot, and continue to demand the release of America's political prisoners.

The Biden regime wants to condemn the Taliban -- as it should -- but we can't let them get away with crimes against humanity here on American soil.

How can we have any moral authority around the world if committing human rights violations here at home?

This is a gravely serious problem, fellow patriot, and I fear that we may be reaching the point of no return.

[**These are perilous times for our Republic, and just a small gift today goes a long way towards helping me fight the Communist Democrats and free their political prisoners**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=948317aca3&e=645b3b1338).
---
| Thank you in advance for remembering America's political prisoners.

For Freedom,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=85dde34d2c&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** While the world turns it's attention to Joe Biden's catastrophe in Afghanistan, hundreds of mostly peaceful January 6 protestors are STILL being held as political prisoners by Democrats in Washington.

[**Help me fight the Communist Democrats and free these politically persecuted patriots with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=201b4692dc&e=645b3b1338).
---
| |

body:
Derek and Secretary Haaland met with tribal leaders in Washington State to discuss the threat climate change poses to their communities -- and what the federal government can do to help.

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Derek and Secretary Deb Haaland are calling on the federal government to support tribal communities in the fight against climate change. Sign their petition now.

SIGN THE PETITION >> https://act.myngp.com/Forms/3340145505434865152

The Seattle Times

This tribe has lived on the coast of Washington for thousands of years. Now climate change is forcing it uphill

| Tiffany just returned from her Statewide Summer tour of ALL 39 COUNTIES. She walked through the front doors and shouted "Washington was Wonderful"!
She can not stop talking about all the wonderful Washingtonians she met across the state, and how happy it was to hear of the overwhelming support.
Hearing the concerns, worries and how the people of Washington are feeling is why Tiffany is running for Senate. She cares about YOU, she cares about Washington and wants to make sure everyone gets to see the Washington she loves.

Just look at the dangerous choices he's made this year ALONE: Welcomed extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene to Arizona after they tried to overturn the 2020 election results Signed a new voter suppression law that disproportionately targets Latino voters Called on the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade – endangering women's reproductive rights Tragically mismanaged our COVID response Not to mention the fact that under Ducey's failed "leadership," Arizona is ranked 45th in health care and 49th in education! clean_body: Your update is enclosed. = Hi all, It’s Annika, Tom's campaign manager. I wanted to give a quick update on the state of our race as it stands today: \- One of our opponents raised $100,000 in his first week. \- National Republicans are spending against Tom in Arizona because they think they can win. \- Outside dark money groups are already infiltrating Arizona and spending big to try and unseat Tom. But, here’s what else I know: We’re getting started earlier than ever to build a grassroots campaign, and supporters like you are coming together to make a difference. = | ******=**** Folks, we’re still a ways away from the election, but we’re building this team now because this is going to be one of the toughest races in the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = We need to win this race, and it’s going to take everyone’s help. = Thanks, Annika Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

name: John Castorani
subject: Congress is incompetent and ineffective.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c57274b3ad04d33bc3d606b76f8c641&_e=fxflO-gl4zGn_NfWxLebecxx0T8H_779qWDZzWiAggnir_gq6TWw_WT95i5olL5nEjMXuhP0Uteq4C_99WH3T8ucpnwDzTy73c3YWGh01R6k7dLHqt6aktvBK5hEgLRKS2SE2P3v3XV6ncz5aXRws95HZsa59Sqy4fKPGYy1KZgUWiuJNT6YGoMLmP4blizJcIZUoxTRRyNmNnEJ-EOsMGRHU1cbYaTvAlTTNG-rXmnENztD9lDyCTTS7E0_z2MB29wpDRCPj1qZP65ty1tuDjbIZDuof5v8FJ1GxWa8Ce-Fuu1gM6E_q9G3D10RlLD8J2--pwks9KoRfZFjM5lC9NYdLtsLvDTBpznb3DR4JJFUFeUC0ZN5fbVhGPFH0qp_iMe4wCyKrybL6zmVtvnVzKEOtpxYrL5SYTa_Hwx02O9n73-NbRE83jvo-frrYZy3Ub9YWbF-rFoGr0xaP62uqEF5kueeipMVBVVZnGzd2bM%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c57274b3ad04d33bc3d606b76f8c641&_e=fxflO-gl4zGn_NfWxLebecxx0T8H_779qWDZzWiAggnir_gq6TWw_WT95i5olL5nEjMXuhP0Uteq4C_99WH3T8ucpnwDzTy73c3YWGh01R6k7dLHqt6aktvBK5hEgLRKS2SE2P3v3XV6ncz5aXRws95HZsa59Sqy4fKPGYy1KZgUWiuJNT6YGoMLmP4blizJcIZUoxTRRyNmNnEJ-EOsMGRHU1cbYaTvAlTTNG-rXmnENztD9lDyCTTS7E0_z2MB29wpDRCPj1qZP65ty1tuDv7Fed4WC4hwYhIAx_JdTuYUyWiySCgguPAHNY33xor2YEYTjpcfDdhvVftP4IiumfUdkJmrjYHe-2L_abwtUC4PVf0i7fpKXz3YGqkUj-CkQ7MF-0Mg5TEC4Pr-uUnoIL_lQ184arkbkcNuK1sl_OeG3-Sn81kqsgMW0f8nvAri5xwlkQytrR02kG0JkiCn0ijmSMoKiNVWs2kXpJ3XO-o%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c57274b3ad04d33bc3d606b76f8c641&_e=fxflO-gl4zGn_NfWxLebecxx0T8H_779qWDZzWiAggnir_gq6TWw_WT95i5olL5nEjMXuhP0Uteq4C_99WH3T8ucpnwDzTy73c3YWGh01R6k7dLHqt6aktvBK5hEgLRKS2SE2P3v3XV6ncz5aXRws95HZsa59Sqy4fKPGYy1KZgUWiuJNT6YGoMLmP4blizJcIZUoxTRRyNmNnEJ-EOsMGRHU1cbYaTvAlTTNG-rXmnENztD9lDyCTTS7E0_z2MB29wpDRCPj1qZP65ty1tuDvZX41sanLk_cskYxMfHE0bvw_qyMeH_90zyFoww_uF5294MqY4iJGhr_xldL8A_PAwgbz_wijliRRrBfduoH3_GEMZzKdbrA_DtjSzYZMhiGKtZKfBDr6_oI6A4PHpPPjDuyhY0IYBe-yfqXO0PKErZahuTp9dfWLDTw8HE5Y6ZtZrRHWwCWj5LWVai6xpbnTsP7_JBINxIpo-D92tVyJI%3D)
---

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c57274b3ad04d33bc3d606b76f8c641&_e=fxflO-gl4zGn_NfWxLebecxx0T8H_779qWDZzWiAggnir_gq6TWw_WT95i5olL5nEjMXuhP0Uteq4C_99WH3T8ucpnwDzTy73c3YWGh01R6k7dLHqt6aktvBK5hEgLRKS2SE2P3v3XV6ncz5aXRws95HZsa59Sqy4fKPGYy1KZgUWiuJNT6YGoMLmP4blizJcIZUoxTRRyNmNnEJ-EOsMGRHU1cbYaTvAlTTNG-rXmnENztD9lDyCTTS7E0_z2MB29wpDRCPj1qZP65ty1tuDkkhXYxqZjifZ-1Bs0nQ4ZgAX-k2U_jeCYMvIUTsflsdcjN0LhHofVtsnsWENQmJcf46pWySIWgBs6Cz7vRBcd8d_rt3-zj-HyBfW7aKLbB50EMtBPj-J_eWSkDjLBTWqYUo0nW1RukdcWWOYdB8phWseTs35msdhmIvhSjWUfFls9dsUDdl45JgDpzZkEyOD6CX27ZDYnPYeK8-tBmoeqI%3D)**.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c57274b3ad04d33bc3d606b76f8c641&_e=fxflO-gl4zGn_NfWxLebecxx0T8H_779qWDZzWiAggnir_gq6TWw_WT95i5olL5nEjMXuhP0Uteq4C_99WH3T8ucpnwDzTy73c3YWGh01R6k7dLHqt6aktvBK5hEgLRKS2SE2P3v3XV6ncz5aXRws95HZsa59Sqy4fKPGYy1KZgUWiuJNT6YGoMLmP4blizJcIZUoxTRRyNmNnEJ-EOsMGRHU1cbYaTvAlTTNG-rXmnENztD9lDyCTTS7E0_z2MB29wpDRCPj1qZP65ty1tuDgXDwpqQY4t78xbImZ84LIRW56Y-TJ6g76F8Hlrwipj5TlijNZwN54q2pdmfxk2AuxOKlvt4YmH-ivZ3Tr-2AAKOnIMfTOYZIBR1Poe37vj9rezGj1I-xmcoDVfZzxppgo0wc-191r1jl7kA1iNyqGYlhXgL8E0H2fNSjqkD68j1eKPhE1xOitkKK6jwsb-sL1KEwXr_3Q22v0CUoP5A-Og%3D)
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c57274b3ad04d33bc3d606b76f8c641&_e=fxflO-gl4zGn_NfWxLebecxx0T8H_779qWDZzWiAggnir_gq6TWw_WT95i5olL5nEjMXuhP0Uteq4C_99WH3T8ucpnwDzTy73c3YWGh01R6k7dLHqt6aktvBK5hEgLRKS2SE2P3v3XV6ncz5aXRws95HZsa59Sqy4fKPGYy1KZgUWiuJNT6YGoMLmP4blizJcIZUoxTRRyNmNnEJ-EOsMGRHU1cbYaTvAlTTNG-rXmnENztD9lDyCTTS7E0_z2MB29wpDRCPj1qZP65ty1tuDmCEjTv7_dbw5M3Jaxk7-AxHO7Pg7SVaSa15xIqDWK5-9UJY05cBqhR2mgAJ5BUvR1hk1TEXzeDSDqU6ekgVlDWQtbl5iMEuGAcFMdoRsYXdkkIM0h5x3n8_iKAyv7nCZWGETwIUbc6VwZ8uy-err0--rAROnbyuYSYnEMoDAaEdx0Wv3Ts5gMOkF_1E2ocU8-l2CrnIV4mICmOXTImt-ac%3D)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0c57274b3ad04d33bc3d606b76f8c641&_e=fxflO-gl4zGn_NfWxLebecxx0T8H_779qWDZzWiAggnir_gq6TWw_WT95i5olL5nEjMXuhP0Uteq4C_99WH3T8ucpnwDzTy73c3YWGh01R6k7dLHqt6aktvBK5hEgLRKS2SE2P3v3XV6ncz5aXRws95HZsa59Sqy4fKPGYy1KZgUWiuJNT6YGoMLmP4blizJcIZUoxTRRyNmNnEJ-EOsMGRHU1cbYaTvAlTTNG-rXmnENztD9lDyCTTS7E0_z2MB29wpDRCPj1qZP65ty1tuDgync8VFNKvCAIAjqi0eZBUZA6rYI-Ix_IsunlMhIzt8dhqvHJhEf_A4YsC1kpxFt5Z6qVwxv4-pkGTQAVXB1BP4KPtLcygK7NVeKWKpZl5teB_-TFbQEEck6KgFO2KZapnjUB9bVcH2iaD0ofLrzcZcJzJvim2aNfL26eR9GFRH3SuY6tvBl-8Y5HZqGd4oZkXhYYjcFyyA7ZTUANddZbg%3D)
---

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | Fellow Conservative, Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party. My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this! Here’s my elevator pitch to you : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign. September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office. I’m the man I am today because ISIS (Islamic State) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012. I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a CIA conference focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country. | We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great. I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us! I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas. Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills. But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. . In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces. It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that. Friend,
In addition to being Kirsten's husband, I'm also a climate scientist. It's been a rough few weeks in climate news. A UN report called the climate crisis a "code red for humanity" and the federal government announced the Colorado River shortage will lead to **the first ever cut in water delivery to Arizona.**
But it's not all bad news. Leaders like Kirsten are working tirelessly to fight the effects of climate change and change the policies that have, in part, caused these catastrophic changes to our planet. Last week she moderated a panel discussion with policy leaders like Congressman Raúl Grijalva and environmental experts like EPA Administrator Michael Regan.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34394037/301835678/41694283?refcode=X_082021_ScottEmail&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRjNTliZC1mYjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_BxokHjGtCb3rZ7Iy9JXa2A7VGGV-3h5mCBZigkCpk=)
---
And she also spoke to grassroots activists on the frontlines of the climate fight in Tucson!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34394039/301835680/41694283?refcode=X_082021_ScottEmail&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRjNTliZC1mYjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_BxokHjGtCb3rZ7Iy9JXa2A7VGGV-3h5mCBZigkCpk=)
---
Kirsten is equally committed to working with both the grasstops and the grassroots. That's one of the things I love about her, and one of the reasons she'll be such an effective Congresswoman. She's an expert in water and environmental policy and has the ear of people like the Chairman of the House Natural Resources Committee. But she's also a teacher and an activist at heart, and is able to work with and inspire the next generation of environmental leaders.
In fact, she's currently working on lesson plans for the Environmental Law class she's teaching at the University this semester. [**So, today it's me asking: will you help the campaign by pitching in $10, $20, or $50?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34394041/301835682/558373307?refcode=X_082021_ScottEmail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRjNTliZC1mYjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_BxokHjGtCb3rZ7Iy9JXa2A7VGGV-3h5mCBZigkCpk=)
Republican climate change deniers and the corporate PACs they work for are lining up to buy back this seat. We need to be ready to combat the millions they'll be spending to spread their propaganda.
**So, please join us and make a contribution today!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34394042/301835684/558373307?refcode=X_082021_ScottEmail&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRjNTliZC1mYjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_BxokHjGtCb3rZ7Iy9JXa2A7VGGV-3h5mCBZigkCpk=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34394044/301835685/41694283?refcode=X_082021_ScottEmail&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRjNTliZC1mYjAxLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_BxokHjGtCb3rZ7Iy9JXa2A7VGGV-3h5mCBZigkCpk=)

Scott

Republicans fought him all along the way, they will not stop unless we stop them. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 0.34% of student loan debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Cancel student debt for all borrowers NOW.
#
Peter,
Yesterday, the Biden administration announced that it would cancel $5.8 billion of student loan debt for people with severe disabilities.
This is a great step, **but it can’t be the last.** $5.8 billion is just 0.34% of the more than $1.7 trillion of student loan debt owed by millions of people across America. Joe Biden has the power to cancel at least $50,000 of debt per borrower. That would be life changing for the 45 million people being held back by this crisis.
**[I will continue to lead the fight to cancel student loan debt. We demand economic justice and we are going to keep this advocacy going full steam. Chip in $3 today to fuel my work to get rid of student loan debt. It’s time.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210820?refcode=em20210820-558&t=20&refcode2=558_420207_6pqPIt&akid=558%2E420207%2E6pqPIt)**
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210820?refcode=em20210820-558&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=558_420207_6pqPIt&akid=558%2E420207%2E6pqPIt)**
Yesterday’s news followed President Biden issuing another half-measure: Extending the moratorium on student loan payments until the end of January. That needed to happen but it’s just not enough, Peter.
**Simply delaying the inevitable is not going to cut it.** Next year, folks crushed by student loan debt — debt that disproportionately affects women and people of color — will have to start paying again. That will mean picking between paying their loans and putting food on the table. After the personal and financial setbacks experienced by so many during this pandemic, now’s not the time to place more burdens on people.
**[I need your support in order to keep up this grassroots fight against the lobbyists and corporations profiting from student loan debt. Chip in $3 right now and help us push President Biden to cancel at least $50,000 of student loan debt per borrower. He can — and he must.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210820?refcode=em20210820-558&t=22&refcode2=558_420207_6pqPIt&akid=558%2E420207%2E6pqPIt)**
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210820?refcode=em20210820-558&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=558_420207_6pqPIt&akid=558%2E420207%2E6pqPIt)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210820-558-footer&t=24&refcode2=558_420207_6pqPIt&akid=558%2E420207%2E6pqPIt)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Tony =?iso-8859-1?q?C=E1rdenas?=
subject: Peter, we need to address the climate crisis now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P
body:
| _Rising sea levels.
Raging wildfires.
Record-high temperatures._

We’re already seeing the effects of climate inaction in California and around the world.

**We need to take radical action to eliminate our carbon emissions before it’s too late -- it’s clear that the price of inaction is way too high.**

subject: No integrity. No honor. No guts.

Folks, yesterday somebody attempted to bomb the Library of Congress. I am so grateful for the quick work, courage and safety of the Capitol Police, all who work in the Capitol Complex and residents across Washington, D.C. Kevin McCarthy has yet to say one word about it, folks. It’s been nearly a day and instead of making a statement in support of those who protected people like him, he’s been on TV criticizing the Biden Administration’s handling of Afghanistan _even though he voted against multiple measures that would have helped prevent such a crisis_. **Congressman Mo Brooks — a member of McCarthy’s own party — even expressed sympathy for the intentions of the suspect by calling out "dictatorial Socialism and its threat to American liberty."** As a so-called leader of his party, McCarthy has the power to condemn such dangerous comments and members whom he leads — but he hasn’t. [McCarthy is dangerous for the Central Valley and dangerous for this country. He has no integrity, no honor, and no guts. We're halfway through the quarter. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34395128/301839044/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U2MDUxMi0wMDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0ziN6K3QysVu9L8YOWtyPvd5hLeJwFTCpxHfJVbTVE=)
I'm livid, friend.

**Yesterday, Texas Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick went on _FOX News_ and blamed the spread of COVID-19 on Black Texans.**

The _real truth_ is that Greg Abbott's administration and the Texas GOP have done everything they can to make the spread of COVID-19 _worse_ in Texas -- from restricting schools and private businesses from implementing indoor-mask guidelines, to preventing local governments from even following basic CDC recommendations.

**Blaming Black Texans is not just scapegoating but it's utterly shameless, and our campaign won't let it stand.**

Texas needs new leadership. The only way we're going to get rid of Abbott, Patrick, and the rest of the GOP gang is by running the biggest ground game our district and state have ever seen.

**[We're still coming up $5,191 short of where we need to be to end this week with strength. Can you chip in $3 today? The real truth is that Greg Abbott's administration and the Texas GOP have done everything they can to make the spread of COVID-19 worse in Texas -- from restricting schools and private businesses from implementing indoor-mask guidelines, to preventing local governments from even following basic CDC recommendations. Blaming Black Texans is not just scapegoating but it's utterly shameless, and our campaign won't let it stand. Texas needs new leadership. Dear Peter,
Yesterday, I filed a lawsuit to compel the Biden Administration to withdraw its “Remain in Mexico” policy, which has helped facilitate so much fentanyl smuggling into West Virginia and America.
We have seen the incompetence and reckless foreign policy actions coming out of the Biden Administration every week.
The Afghanistan debacle is just the latest in a long string of disastrous actions _which are putting China, Russia, and our geopolitical adversaries FIRST, and America LAST._
Biden approved Russia’s NORD pipeline, while stopping construction of America’s Keystone Pipeline. _Now, Biden has the gall to ask OPEC for help— AFTER crippling America’s energy independence through his reckless policies._
_And the Border. Reckless!_
Biden’s open border policies are breaking records in all the wrong ways. While undocumented aliens are streaming across the borders at obscene levels, deadly fentanyl is being smuggled into the U.S. at rates never seen before.
That’s why West Virginia and my Office is stepping up and suing the Biden Administration yet again.
I won’t stand for Biden’s open border policies and his inept foreign policies. A Commander-in Chief is supposed to secure our borders and help protect us.
That’s just not happening under President Biden.
Fortunately, West Virginia is fighting back. We will stop this. We must stop this. We need to reverse these disastrous policies which are putting America Last.

clean_body: | | | | Today, I filed a lawsuit to compel the Biden Administration... Dear Peter, Yesterday, I filed a lawsuit to compel the Biden Administration to withdraw its “Remain in Mexico” policy, which has helped facilitate so much fentanyl smuggling into West Virginia and America. We have seen the incompetence and reckless foreign policy actions coming out of the Biden Administration every week. The Afghanistan debacle is just the latest in a long string of disastrous actions which are putting China, Russia, and our geopolitical adversaries FIRST, and America LAST. Biden approved Russia’s NORD pipeline, while stopping construction of America’s Keystone Pipeline. Now, Biden has the gall to ask OPEC for help— AFTER crippling America’s energy independence through his reckless policies. And the Border. Reckless! Biden’s open border policies are breaking records in all the wrong ways. While undocumented aliens are streaming across the borders at obscene levels, deadly fentanyl is being smuggled into the U.S. at rates never seen before. That’s why West Virginia and my Office is stepping up and suing the Biden Administration yet again. I won’t stand for Biden’s open border policies and his inept foreign policies. A Commander-in Chief is supposed to secure our borders and help protect us. That’s just not happening under President Biden. Fortunately, West Virginia is fighting back. We will stop this. We must stop this. We need to reverse these disastrous policies which are putting America Last. Help me fight the far-left, woke, machine. And root our big new lawsuit on to victory! Thanks. | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. The latest polls are showing that this recall is neck and neck, and we need you to help us reach and sway voters before they turn-in their ballots. It's imperative to the future of California that we make sure to get as many recall ballots returned as possible, but we can't do it without you.

Simply put, this is crunch time and everybody in the state should have received their ballots in the mail. Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled.

[**Help us show Gavin that this recall isn 't a partisan effort, this is from Californians of all backgrounds . . . we're tired of his failed attempt at leadership, are you?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165931:6EBdY0lNT:m:1:3253819041:1E4ABAD5C9ACB7575812E7308830D191:r)

name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: Onalaska can do it. Can you?
body:
It’s time to take a stand against the masking and indoctrination of our kids!
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friends,
The past few days have been gut-wrenching, haven't they? The world is watching in horror as the Taliban enforces its narrow, merciless worldview on the citizens of Afghanistan and any foreigners unfortunate enough to be caught in the maelstrom taking place there.
Our State Department is encouraging "inclusiveness" from the Taliban. It's a misguided and foolish request that speaks volumes about our basic lack of understanding the worldview we are up against. Has our State Department or the Biden Administration done even a little research on the Taliban? It doesn't look like it. These are the same people who throw homosexuals off rooftops and oppress women and children.
They're not interested in winning awards from the US on their ability to be inclusive.
These wicked tyrants are the product of an educational system of indoctrination that has allowed no room for individual thought, especially a dissenting one.
While there is certainly no direct comparison, stated or implied, between the educational system that created the Taliban and what has been happening in the American education system, there are some disturbing parallels. I know you can see it. I have been talking about it for years.
Our public schools are teaching our kids to judge themselves and others based on the color of their skin via Critical Race Theory. The 1619 Project, which is being promoted by the Biden Administration, has a goal to redefine the American experiment as rooted not in liberty but in slavery.
Today's public schools are graduating kids who have been taught to hate each other, hate themselves, and hate their nation.
The outcome of this kind of indoctrination will have devastating consequences if we do not return control of our schools to parents and give parents CHOICES in educating their children.
That won't be easy: the rights of parents to decide what is best for their children and their health is being stripped away right before our eyes.
Our schools have been in crisis for years--and now, that crisis is an emergency. We have no time to lose.
I am ready for this fight. I've spent the last 15 years of my life preparing for it--and now--it's here.
Thankfully, parents are waking up and speaking up. Great things are happening. I hear the passion of caring parents who are willing to step in and demand better for their children!
A bold move of parents who are ready to engage is happening right here in our district. I was excited to attend a meeting of parents and educators in Onalaska, WA this week. They have said, "No more!" and I'm ready to stand with them.
---
| Watch as I talk about what happened in Onalaska:
---
| | | [Watch on Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wR1m_9awiVtv5_gtW5aqtW87GAd9XfC-c5iGRLi7oM1bwUFHZGAjEWIsJ7WC95PmipCx8NzuTnEiKfT2xmY85iSOmkZD4oeBV86c9zrEoshiDzZ_mdnLBPwPCFDqgI5fXSXyAfwCplkpQ367DZDGnQ==&c=gxoaf3qYMauncuj9lKHCAAwC8LN9UsHC9TGtuovk3a246AenAobfqQ==&ch=V7yYW3uDgt9fDby073jFZVN9KAMvSwoPuCF1hxLkh3Fb0TUrimJgbA==)

| | | [Watch on YouTube](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wR1m_9awiVtv5_gtW5aqtW87GAd9XfC-c5iGRLi7oM1bwUFHZGAjEWIsJ7WC95Pm_H4t_Amp4fkDOwkwgJgeSf8PkTj6YZl2MdpJs_2Nyd0BYY5GlrZWVD351KWC9pLh9mMZSXjRL9DuAAAWPUGDNQ==&c=gxoaf3qYMauncuj9lKHCAAwC8LN9UsHC9TGtuovk3a246AenAobfqQ==&ch=V7yYW3uDgt9fDby073jFZVN9KAMvSwoPuCF1hxLkh3Fb0TUrimJgbA==)
---
| We can do this together. Join me as we fight for the heart and soul of America. Together, we can turn the tide and take our nation back from the hands of dangerous Democrats and weak Republicans.
The time is now.
Let's make our voices heard with a Freedom Rally on August 25th, 6pm at Felida Park in north Vancouver. We must stand and fight for educational, medical, and parental rights.
We can fight this together.
---

clean_body: It’s time to take a stand against the masking and indoctrination of our kids! | | | | | | | Friends, The past few days have been gut-wrenching, haven't they? The world is watching in horror as the Taliban enforces its narrow, merciless worldview on the citizens of Afghanistan and any foreigners unfortunate enough to be caught in the maelstrom taking place there. Our State Department is encouraging "inclusiveness" from the Taliban. It's a misguided and foolish request that speaks volumes about our basic lack of understanding the worldview we are up against. Has our State Department or the Biden Administration done even a little research on the Taliban? It doesn't look like it. These are the same people who throw homosexuals off rooftops and oppress women and children. They're not interested in winning awards from the US on their ability to be inclusive. These wicked tyrants are the product of an educational system of indoctrination that has allowed no room for individual thought, especially a dissenting one. While there is certainly no direct comparison, stated or implied, between the educational system that created the Taliban and what has been happening in the American education system, there are some disturbing parallels. I know you can see it. I have been talking about it for years. Our public schools are teaching our kids to judge themselves and others based on the color of their skin via Critical Race Theory. The 1619 Project, which is being promoted by the Biden Administration, has a goal to redefine the American experiment as rooted not in liberty but in slavery. Today's public schools are graduating kids who have been taught to hate each other, hate themselves, and hate their nation. The outcome of this kind of indoctrination will have devastating consequences if we do not return control of our schools to parents and give parents CHOICES in educating their children. That won't be easy: the rights of parents to decide what is best for their children and their health is being stripped away right before our eyes. Our schools have been in crisis for years--and now, that crisis is an emergency. We have no time to lose. I am ready for this fight. I've spent the last 15 years of my life preparing for it--and now--it's here. Thankfully, parents are waking up and speaking up. Great things are happening. I hear the passion of caring parents who are willing to step in and demand better for their children! A bold move of parents who are ready to engage is happening right here in our district. I was excited to attend a meeting of parents and educators in Onalaska, WA this week. They have said, "No more!" and I'm ready to stand with them. | Watch as I talk about what happened in Onalaska: | | | == | | | == | We can do this together. Join me as we fight for the heart and soul of America. Together, we can turn the tide and take our nation back from the hands of dangerous Democrats and weak Republicans. The time is now. Let's make our voices heard with a Freedom Rally on August 25th, 6pm at Felida Park in north Vancouver. We must stand and fight for educational, medical, and parental rights. We can fight this together. | | | | | Upcoming Events | | | ---|--- | August 22 Volunteer Potluck and Picnic \- This event is for our volunteer team, but it's not too late to join us on Sunday! Hamburgers and Hot Dogs will be provided. Sign up to be a campaign volunteer at this link: == August 25 Freedom Rally \- 6:00 pm, Felida Park 3798 NW 122nd St, Vancouver, WA 98685 Save these dates for another Freedom Rally with special guest speaker, Rick Green! October 6 (Clark County) October 7 (Lewis County) | | | | Join the fight for our children and the future of our schools by supporting the campaign with a financial contribution. | | | == | | | | == | This week on America's Town Hall Dr. Richard Bartlett joins the podcast to talk about Covid and how it has been grossly mishandled by the medical establishment and our government. Stop listening to the fear-mongering, mask mandates and endless stream of frightening information in the mainstream news outlets--there is HOPE. | | == | | == | | | | | == | == == | | | | | Friends of Heidi St. John for Congress | PO Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604 | | Sent by mailto:info@heidistjohnforcongress.com powered by

Friends, We’ve had a tremendous week on the campaign trail. This week, we hit every region in Virginia, traveling over 1,000 miles, discussing important issues with voters along the way like keeping Virginians safe, standing up for our law enforcement, and reinvigorating the job machine here in our Commonwealth. There’s a lot of work to do, but I’ve never backed down from a challenge. Virginians are coming together like never before, and your energy and support are sending a clear message to Terry McAuliffe – we’re going to win in November! Let’s go, Virginia!

clean_body: We only have a second, Peter, so we’ll be quick. | We’re glad we reached you, Peter. We just learned that the South Carolina Democratic Party has gotten a $100,000 investment from the Democratic National Committee in Washington. That’s on top of the more than $130 million that Democrats spent in the state during the 2020 Election. It’s clear that the Left will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to win. It’s no coincidence that the DNC Chairman is the Left’s 2020 candidate for Senate in South Carolina. Winning the Palmetto State is national Democrats’TOP PRIORITY. | | National Democrats want nothing more than to flip a deep-red state like South Carolina “blue,” and they’re prepared to spend any amount to do it. The only thing standing in their way are Grassroots Republican Patriots, like you. It doesn’t matter whether we think elections are too expensive. What matters is whether we’re willing to chip in to defend our values \-- or whether we’re prepared to surrender to Democrat donors from California and New York. | | | | | | | | | Thank you. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: An update on quorum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
When Texas House Democrats broke quorum last month to take the fight for
voting rights to Washington, DC, they made us proud, and did more than we
ever could have asked of them. They left behind their homes, their
families and their businesses to stall Republican efforts to pass voter
suppression legislation and dismantle our democracy.

As the minority in the state legislature, we always knew that the Texas
Democrats couldn’t hold the line forever, and that the purpose of their
quorum break was to buy us time to pass federal voting rights legislation.
Yesterday, we learned that the Texas House regained quorum, meaning it’s
time for Congress and President Biden to finish the job and do their part
to save our democracy.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/45933?t=1001&akid=150208%2E444211%2EQVvy8a ]So please join me in contacting the White House to urge President Biden
to reform the filibuster and pass federal voting protections. It’s the
only way to stop Republican leadership in Texas from passing voter
suppression legislation and messing with our elections.

The good thing is this: because of what Texas Democrats accomplished
during their quorum break in Washington, DC, Congress is moving in the
right direction. The Senate Majority Leader has promised to take up the
For the People Act as the “first order of legislative business” when
senators return from recess in mid-September. And next week, the House is
set to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, which would complement the
For the People Act by fully restoring the 1965 Voting Rights Act that the
Supreme Court has gutted over the past decade.

But I want to be clear. There is no path forward for either piece of
legislation unless the Senate reforms the filibuster. And that will not
happen unless President Biden puts the full power of the presidency behind
pushing Democratic senators to do so.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/45933?t=1002&akid=150208%2E444211%2EQVvy8a ]With that in mind, please contact President Biden. Push him to use the
full force of his office to reform the filibuster and pass the For the
People Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Act. While writing to the
President is only part of what it will take to move him to act, it’s an
important first step. There is no way to win this fight without him, and
it’s going to be up to all of us to push him to get it done.

Thanks for taking part in this fight,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44727?refcode=ema20210820-150208&t=1003&akid=150208%2E444211%2EQVvy8a ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=150208%2E444211%2EQVvy8a

But I want to be clear. There is no path forward for either piece of legislation unless the Senate reforms the filibuster. And that will not happen unless President Biden puts the full power of the presidency behind pushing Democratic senators to do so. [ ]With that in mind, please contact President Biden. Push him to use the full force of his office to reform the filibuster and pass the For the People Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Act. While writing to the President is only part of what it will take to move him to act, it’s an important first step. There is no way to win this fight without him, and it’s going to be up to all of us to push him to get it done. Thanks for taking part in this fight, Beto [ ]Donate »

name: John Cranley
subject: I’d like to hear from you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
John Cranley for Governor

Hey friend,

When it comes to writing a comeback story for Ohio, we’re ready to do the hard work. We believe that Ohioans deserve a government free from corruption and cronyism, one where the people — not corporations and special interests — come first.

Your voice matters to me, friend. As we begin this campaign, our team needs to make sure we have your input on what issues matter most to you and your family.

So, whether it’s growing our green energy economy, expanding access to health care, revitalizing our infrastructure, or something else, please let me know what issues you prioritize by taking our quick survey today: [https://act.johncranley.com/a/share-your-thoughts?contactdata=cvhPE4%2BuARIzYB%2Bat2imqaJVtsxkJfu0oqvchoHrYEFZXQAJpsF9t2OJ8keGnkw6cRfbzAo1Igaqw435k73NWFg0ZwOWTFeHyWo1pDLO%2BXTTsrFGdJJJYwk1B3piRSV1hQVDt7QVywb%2FbF7kNWbs0Q%3D%3D]

What issue matters most to you?
Cannabis reform
COVID-19 recovery
Criminal justice reform
Economy
Education
Environment
Health care
Immigration
Infrastructure
Jobs
Minimum wage
Racial justice
Reproductive rights
Voting rights
Other

Submit Your Response [https://act.johncranley.com/a/share-your-thoughts?contactdata=cvhPE4%2BuARIzYB%2Bat2imqaJVtsxkJfu0oqvchoHrYEFZXQAJpsF9t2OJ8keGnkw6cRfbzAo1Igaqw435k73NWFg0ZwOWTFeHyWo1pDLO%2BXTTsrFGdJJJYwk1B3piRSV1hQVDt7QVywb%2FbF7kNWbs0Q%3D%3D]

Thanks for sharing your thoughts,

John

Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cranley-founding-donor?refcode=em_JC_PET_survey1_082021_b1]

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.

Please make a donation today, and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-launch?refcode=em_jc_fr_footer_link

name: Patty Murray
subject: Reelect these Democratic Senate women
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
My colleagues Tammy Duckworth and Maggie Hassan are up for reelection this cycle, and as you know, Senate Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat in 2022 and keep our majority.
#
Peter,
When I was first elected to the Senate, having just six women Senators was history-making.
Today, we have more Democratic women serving in the Senate than ever before -- and together, we’re making progress and fighting for issues like paid leave, child care, and more.
My colleagues Tammy Duckworth and Maggie Hassan are up for reelection this cycle, and as you know, Senate Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat in 2022 and keep our majority.
**[Can I count on you to split $5 between our campaigns now to keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34397734/301846983/1389057856?refcode=pm_em_210820_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWE1YzQzZS0wYjAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CFsz-r1UNaFzk4yLISgWgcVkGt5A7jog7dBUV9g8io=)**
Voting rights. Climate action. Affordable health care. No matter the issue, Democratic women like Tammy Duckworth and Maggie Hassan are helping to lead the fight for a better future.
We’ve worked hard to elect more women to the Senate -- and now we need to keep them there.
**[Peter, I’ve always been able to count on your support. Now, I’m asking again: contribute $5 now to reelect our Democratic women and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34397735/301846984/1389057856?refcode=pm_em_210820_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWE1YzQzZS0wYjAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CFsz-r1UNaFzk4yLISgWgcVkGt5A7jog7dBUV9g8io=)**
Thank you,
Patty

clean_body: My colleagues Tammy Duckworth and Maggie Hassan are up for reelection this cycle, and as you know, Senate Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat in 2022 and keep our majority. Peter, When I was first elected to the Senate, having just six women Senators was history-making. Today, we have more Democratic women serving in the Senate than ever before -- and together, we’re making progress and fighting for issues like paid leave, child care, and more. My colleagues Tammy Duckworth and Maggie Hassan are up for reelection this cycle, and as you know, Senate Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat in 2022 and keep our majority. = Voting rights. Climate action. Affordable health care. No matter the issue, Democratic women like Tammy Duckworth and Maggie Hassan are helping to lead the fight for a better future. We’ve worked hard to elect more women to the Senate -- and now we need to keep them there. = Thank you, Patty = As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae25e74eb5154944a7dc3c23c9bc5abc&_e=cGmV3jajv6Xev8cu-0F2YwYof4nw8vnqlvVuAqZPYVbppR4CjTY00MaZf2AY9mij6IOa2s89FmPN00MhrnHa9nQWllGP-cZcO5UZ9OfOeQsfERXZklMKHaTYH--i39k-n5wNW_tiduVggOMdVuAr1pjvDIFzNdIKnR6cGIm7DW_kaI0VLoA4sv45mxWFOALz10SCwZeNl1KHAOZsZlzXX81YA2wZuiCX77dq6njnWeS6PJYyXgXK63bEvUR0CSg-IrkPcfohIZcehIA73ugnPa2DoeC3czXNxDCMJ7-ivZfVty7QF6EgznHrtf0K1w9-vHByGsk-W8UYY74QIeyBS_DLVHdwKKtsncZSrnAlrUatZ24jzoAH7boZIQ4h2lgdhR1Kq40zwqWESkOzrvIhRycfAe8BU7Nvkj2-uvnYqyEHwgfcnRaV-GTOJQlwDewdYiU2k8KUYZxeOqtptLmw87CrX79mcycbBPyr-uKahPY%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT

I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae25e74eb5154944a7dc3c23c9bc5abc&_e=cGmV3jajv6Xev8cu-0F2YwYof4nw8vnqlvVuAqZPYVbppR4CjTY00MaZf2AY9mij6IOa2s89FmPN00MhrnHa9nQWllGP-cZcO5UZ9OfOeQsfERXZklMKHaTYH--i39k-n5wNW_tiduVggOMdVuAr1pjvDIFzNdIKnR6cGIm7DW_kaI0VLoA4sv45mxWFOALz10SCwZeNl1KHAOZsZlzXX81YA2wZuiCX77dq6njnWeS6PJYyXgXK63bEvUR0CSg-IrkPcfohIZcehIA73ugnPc-c7vR95T07tb1ekLVTPzKMmEcjC0Z08nBMHECJp8aeqo4lr9DL_la9pCB6zkWnjf8t7qaHXEjCdvKr3Q_Xb2_DrE3NOzswP5JICCIIEGL7QLkzESbfV-c8vPAuHivtE5T8Nsia1JSm3K9pAhRxtnBzA__tVKlu7J3R6g5wLFlgqZfNV1VRzinKjDPyeD0kh4sGjDEECMvi99P6UYgxVqs%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae25e74eb5154944a7dc3c23c9bc5abc&_e=cGmV3jajv6Xev8cu-0F2YwYof4nw8vnqlvVuAqZPYVbppR4CjTY00MaZf2AY9mij6IOa2s89FmPN00MhrnHa9nQWllGP-cZcO5UZ9OfOeQsfERXZklMKHaTYH--i39k-n5wNW_tiduVggOMdVuAr1pjvDIFzNdIKnR6cGIm7DW_kaI0VLoA4sv45mxWFOALz10SCwZeNl1KHAOZsZlzXX81YA2wZuiCX77dq6njnWeS6PJYyXgXK63bEvUR0CSg-IrkPcfohIZcehIA73ugnPRjzGy-9grU4lWobc7GBg4uGPTXj4urwGOIuUNBw29B_A980CxUiv1XY_IL1EjscBbRC5nsNmGUW-TQmJwOAgeRobeoiJLGCZZczcZrmNJ0LPNNiwAlTpyBmR30WyR9f_K-YnKR4Bjc24mAIlHZaPVXBBjcYNEvYRRCivrV-iloj3zs5GCehZYjwOp0LrAAL5GkLv4-cf6h4HqkM7i6vWkA%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae25e74eb5154944a7dc3c23c9bc5abc&_e=cGmV3jajv6Xev8cu-0F2YwYof4nw8vnqlvVuAqZPYVbppR4CjTY00MaZf2AY9mij6IOa2s89FmPN00MhrnHa9nQWllGP-cZcO5UZ9OfOeQsfERXZklMKHaTYH--i39k-n5wNW_tiduVggOMdVuAr1pjvDIFzNdIKnR6cGIm7DW_kaI0VLoA4sv45mxWFOALz10SCwZeNl1KHAOZsZlzXX81YA2wZuiCX77dq6njnWeS6PJYyXgXK63bEvUR0CSg-IrkPcfohIZcehIA73ugnPRkbk87q4ZBGohusHPdgOjucbkZN4L5L-aliE4R8L8cTPhlDwYD8uj8ib2vfeAk0MtcFnj1_iViKPUcJpWT8XHIAFMjaramFzFdlu8F5VVONy2f6bZl5aMvTSMoyx5ulCuhI5kFUOMi_SaSmZMVgzDmyVxIwj28M0t4xkhse7D_mEGyWWy6PJ96IT-IdK39eTDAN9ZkLtDSyFM81zN9TsAU%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae25e74eb5154944a7dc3c23c9bc5abc&_e=cGmV3jajv6Xev8cu-0F2YwYof4nw8vnqlvVuAqZPYVbppR4CjTY00MaZf2AY9mij6IOa2s89FmPN00MhrnHa9nQWllGP-cZcO5UZ9OfOeQsfERXZklMKHaTYH--i39k-n5wNW_tiduVggOMdVuAr1pjvDIFzNdIKnR6cGIm7DW_kaI0VLoA4sv45mxWFOALz10SCwZeNl1KHAOZsZlzXX81YA2wZuiCX77dq6njnWeS6PJYyXgXK63bEvUR0CSg-IrkPcfohIZcehIA73ugnPWBUWKsn4QrO45ZHoUfTvhNVnWJrcPvA8WOlVudKS7uQIFD2aaRdBYOD2BOh3ORvcpyXbd6w4HhxpW_3wtlMUIWHmfPeA9oJF30ntZIruOi7No385aYJ8Wuog_u6KhE1y0_r6nt2LHqJSNbJt0SvjmBlxmQgY8orUvuG4iNqVAfZwqQeY70z6-qkGTTH9kMB9aYdrM1tbFA2HKjl_oKe9MA%3D)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=105c2f2de72b4e69b583558e846d0f26&_e=Sp_4_WGSCB4B0foC7XyzksboBBX0BDpnbQ7JwpEtLZkpTRfJKHq4m_9uGy6fI6yEcuOa-yZCJE1GE8C7M0TmYahF6IjIFfHeTC4LPBkefSQNBvTodF6fdHuP-esAt1b61Za_JEw5W-_M8o5JkZ-IyfUQQ3hacEx8B_0rDBoM2qgHC2wxKCfAz9Iqsz28v0hrpoPTQApHaLWOZnfBFi81l2XwRsVhzDs_27qZh-jaMZ0TkQCghBvFaETUF-M8pddWjvEgRZ38LppMJdRm0IvvAMlstwq38Fl9CpEA0RkpBeyiukU5tkKHkzzNlv2Q4QwGYO54hvXF7UKFEkTlVSqc2QjsLWYfGbHlhWBFOftYXB7XmTKxAvYO_gc4_f7BIcxy9ql14T3HlAuHL9iyDIB2-d-fL11twi3aottd2RWuSdoW_-aZzaxghQsaocrzyYJ1ZySPS0B65Z0o6dBK4ukl8pmFqK0_GACXgCRWZs4f7qQ%3D)
---

Peter,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=105c2f2de72b4e69b583558e846d0f26&_e=Sp_4_WGSCB4B0foC7XyzksboBBX0BDpnbQ7JwpEtLZkpTRfJKHq4m_9uGy6fI6yEcuOa-yZCJE1GE8C7M0TmYahF6IjIFfHeTC4LPBkefSQNBvTodF6fdHuP-esAt1b61Za_JEw5W-_M8o5JkZ-IyfUQQ3hacEx8B_0rDBoM2qgHC2wxKCfAz9Iqsz28v0hrpoPTQApHaLWOZnfBFi81l2XwRsVhzDs_27qZh-jaMZ0TkQCghBvFaETUF-M8pddWjvEgRZ38LppMJdRm0IvvAMQtQS9UOpifvdjd6Rak8Bog5dPraPxZXQvYA9MXtjvOyk9EHarinoSVeVoZkUfl5y3XhbWHRTJKtgr7-tlzprn4u1kwNUc601bsEGeZsaKICV72h24Wg_O-u5sXk6O3q2S4t9HvaNz4Apy1Mdl5VAw-DtbgENSxNg7jXwWycUo1QKNkbcsgoCBbpMe7S_aUyb8H2EUliTn4t2X9IR3Lxwc%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=105c2f2de72b4e69b583558e846d0f26&_e=Sp_4_WGSCB4B0foC7XyzksboBBX0BDpnbQ7JwpEtLZkpTRfJKHq4m_9uGy6fI6yEcuOa-yZCJE1GE8C7M0TmYahF6IjIFfHeTC4LPBkefSQNBvTodF6fdHuP-esAt1b61Za_JEw5W-_M8o5JkZ-IyfUQQ3hacEx8B_0rDBoM2qgHC2wxKCfAz9Iqsz28v0hrpoPTQApHaLWOZnfBFi81l2XwRsVhzDs_27qZh-jaMZ0TkQCghBvFaETUF-M8pddWjvEgRZ38LppMJdRm0IvvALHR4Hzk7LydwuzR3VF3y0IPPizL-RtnvTDUb3Fbtz-HsQJHf6X8VK-IKLMDgiPMtQMSqNWUec9H3I_QHYQqpPdyayK5DGn8GJErM6WkJgEt6DC9RpSV_rtYS8l6K02ljlH2MJNJXPerYDyfWzjfRXXFnVmrE_8p5-6iqXG7KbpD0pq_OkejOC1kGu4cCYVv6Liq6cd1nzxO48vxbHRH7pE%3D)
---

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this! Here’s my elevator pitch to you : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign. September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office. I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a CIA conference focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. body:
The situation in Afghanistan just keeps getting worse. I wanted to write to you because this tragic disaster never should have happened, and I’m comm Peter, The situation in Afghanistan just keeps getting worse. I wanted to write to you because this tragic disaster never should have happened, and I’m committed to holding the Biden administration accountable for its disastrous decision making where the intelligence failure lands at Biden’s feet alone. This is one of the worst foreign policy and national security disasters our country has ever seen. While leaving was the right thing to do, the execution was astoundingly terrible. Biden needs to step up, take responsibility, and start explaining how he’s going to fix this mess before things get even worse. [**Please, chip in a few dollars right now to help fuel our fight to demand answers and accountability.**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=85ddd92679ed435e836bc6ec84b23298&_e=bfe6P4UCDDwzsRCy25nDnKtI4mpChEGmmQPc8mPQlDrJ1m-NaJSEeamrvzmUWVTC-_NdmNHl6V1zpskbK7Y9JNSDXDYHSOf83AcWOndlzdglfJl-IE6xse3kKOz8wxJnVQ2_gK9WGcXNgda1zfl6sas0avjFppLmfpExV0XBU_XntGEHTwoDXy9kl9a3naz3XWW5GCN7DsJ52m2NorRItNMPp-7fun9cVuBQmiDQB1QU7lY8Z8vZY3XRwSSXVysy1ByDH-cWuufSHWvtcKvpayJTuVOOuD3O5hRY6D4z1XBOYNymhFDeJZoaIKxb-O3j7R7e4QGd7kdZWkbXz9mZjIvbC1FEhdhoLsh66EB0G16kXaCuA9yrNwmfooXXX19bfxpW9l91PmAQQ0neAX5NmaqUwSXddAXpWxyHzQS_vPBP9g-xVjJyuGW8s4z-4bpYHY-dUtHmOkQMsB-NVNuA9w%3D%3D) Thanks for any support you can give, Peter. Peter,

**A teacher's union is SUING a parent for daring to ask what her child is learning in school.**

_A Rhode Island chapter of the National Education Association has filed a lawsuit against a parent in order to block the release of records concerning Critical Race Theory and gender "education" in schools._

**In other words, the NEA has filed a lawsuit to keep parents in the dark about the indoctrination being forced upon their children.**

Parents Against Critical Theory (PACT) is fighting for the rights of all parents, but we need your help to come out victorious. **Would you donate today to help us take down the teachers unions and their manipulative games?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us fight back against the Teachers Unions> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165971:68tzl0lgN:m:1:3253819041:2131968DC61335A6B75951F9950E0C0B:r)**

In a complaint filed in the Superior Court, the teacher's union claims that the teaching records are "private," and their release must be balanced against the "rights" of teachers.

**They are completely forgetting about the rights of parents.** We have a right to know exactly what our children are being taught in the schools that WE fund with OUR tax dollars.

_We can no longer look to our elected officials to defend us. We must take matters into our own hands and fight for change._

_Join us and the millions of parents that have had enough as we fight CRT and institutionalized racism._

**[DONATE HERE to help PACT put an end to the lawsuits and bullying. >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58165971:68tzl0lgN:m:1:3253819041:2131968DC61335A6B75951F9950E0C0B:r)**

name: Shawn Collins
subject: Biden failed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA**
body:
As a proud United States Navy veteran who served a combat tour of duty in Afghanistan, I am beyond appalled at what has happened. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1ab607d690d24f23b1f0e293f0282dda&_e=SWrkzxKv2ozMnRE8TnNlu0wxmZAqCQ3KUhbCka0Kvw1VWSplKbQ0DJVsId8BCvx2ZLd3lhFPt7MVkPN4d4NcsKSPSxNyIcnwMP2j5bwujbqGXi3prKMBLTvZuhRZ0-Gdr0PjI2sebLhor3yvmZyHcBgfJds4QBL_Kap9uie26mKuTwdaeVnPlQaTns34lQ-QFOUADUO5nMbL39BIVIa7tuf-O1I6cDoE-w_ww9TIPyHcVv6SxauBva2WPEldlYIEQwQ0pF2JhMXNeylf3xIWAWantZPesaRfh0t6MonAPdo7TyNaSvVBGogU-txpPxwMzgcoWLS6jpUYZ2xX5r0kKKJhuqyfHJV_euIXPfioRI29XR7JCp8txbpTcxNTB7-jPk1x9C9hafrfMzFnSI5fAzqrYmXGwYeKlZP5BlZFfn1TOEYN-HrfuRwWOCXrxvuWAT7mkXS-gJTaYIEvcJKO5jMBJqJPcyQu2k9039RFI7l-VujdbgHbwH20OmpKgBB7)

---
Peter,

As a proud United States Navy veteran who served a combat tour of duty in Afghanistan, I am beyond appalled at what has happened.

I and thousands of other American men and women – not to mention thousands of allied troops – left our homes and our families behind to put our lives on the line fighting for stability and against terrorism in that country, all in order to keep our home country safe.

I personally survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts while serving in Afghanistan. I was lucky to make it home. Sadly, far too many of the men and women I served alongside did not make it home. Thousands made the ultimate sacrifice and laid down their lives in Afghanistan to keep America safe from more terrorist attacks.
**
Now, everything we fought and died for over the past twenty years has been wiped away and all been for nothing, and it’s all because President Biden underestimated our enemy and flat out refused to acknowledge the possibility – and I say the inevitability – that the Taliban would retake the country after our troops were pulled out.**

**I lay this travesty entirely at President Biden’s feet.**

This is an embarrassment, a disgrace, disaster, and the ultimate insult to the thousands of men and women, along with their families, whose deaths are now in vain.

**President Biden has failed.** He has failed those who died, their families, our veterans, our military, the Americans who are still stuck there – **he has failed America.**

My deepest thoughts and prayers go out to all the people President Biden has failed. But I know we need to do so much more.

[**This failure is exactly why we need new leadership in Washington, D.C..**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1ab607d690d24f23b1f0e293f0282dda&_e=SWrkzxKv2ozMnRE8TnNlu0wxmZAqCQ3KUhbCka0Kvw1VWSplKbQ0DJVsId8BCvx2ZLd3lhFPt7MVkPN4d4NcsKSPSxNyIcnwMP2j5bwujbqGXi3prKMBLTvZuhRZ0-Gdr0PjI2sebLhor3yvmZyHcBgfJds4QBL_Kap9uie26mKuTwdaeVnPlQaTns34lQ-QFOUADUO5nMbL39BIVIa7tuf-O1I6cDoE-w_ww9TIPyHcVv6SxauBva2WPEldlYIEQwQ0pF2JhMXNeylf3xIWAQZ4JIil5OjmhwvP815UWGKbt95H9GpI6cLDkzqyEGlAS1ZAguhlNAW-rsPXiBoGbV6ZjFYICzOYx-d2mGQ_ytTFZW7wcsnYTAT3GOvM0EZEq0fI7owIwJOVhx70TEZC4qisn8KyNORFPRDHm90T07JHXU78_wB2NS0kwH6W55CIHXDfi7nkk8QoQjT__Nw2MqqivSfxj0bLYw1E-ZF7okzf32AW-dT71H3Kjt_wf0VS)

[** Give America New Leaderhip
Send Shawn to Congress -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1ab607d690d24f23b1f0e293f0282dda&_e=SWrkzxKv2ozMnRE8TnNlu0wxmZAqCQ3KUhbCka0Kvw1VWSplKbQ0DJVsId8BCvx2ZLd3lhFPt7MVkPN4d4NcsKSPSxNyIcnwMP2j5bwujbqGXi3prKMBLTvZuhRZ0-Gdr0PjI2sebLhor3yvmZyHcBgfJds4QBL_Kap9uie26mKuTwdaeVnPlQaTns34lQ-QFOUADUO5nMbL39BIVIa7tuf-O1I6cDoE-w_ww9TIPyHcVv6SxauBva2WPEldlYIEQwQ0pF2JhMXNeylf3xIWAR1DOUoIRHnnYR2meGzmQk_G95Bnxf7ZkemOwMpj6t08KZT7b4CVVvM6QWCUpgf6VY0MNkMj1M0CFJUqlz7W4C79KfouQ1ht56vluHIUkpHcV0mpH-SVYUkgn7-kHz9ehDM0WDyY5OUc5C0So0Jw5VCSUKYdAvxsDovoHuVEM6z9raxfFYp6JgaaY63iF8pWXMWQXz80RFLwDGL2AtbJ9ig85EOYEdHa3M3bBgD2e_jp)
Neither President Biden nor Nancy Pelosi ever served in the military, so they can’t possibly even fathom what this feels like to veterans like me who fought in Afghanistan.

I spent my life fighting for the Constitution that I swore to uphold and defend. I fought to keep my country free and safe. I made the choice to run for Congress in California’s 45th District because I wanted to continue fighting for those things and more... clearly, we desperately need people who will, because our current leaders won’t.

**For the sake of our country and the world, we need new leadership in America.** We need leaders who will honor and respect our military and law enforcement and all they do to protect us. We need leaders who love America and are proud patriots. We need leaders who will unite us rather than divide us. We need leaders who will make and keep America and Americans everywhere strong and safe.

[**I am going to continue fighting with everything I have in me to hold our leaders accountable for what they’ve done and give our nation and our people the strong leadership we desperately need. I hope I can count on patriots like you to stand beside me in this fight.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1ab607d690d24f23b1f0e293f0282dda&_e=SWrkzxKv2ozMnRE8TnNlu0wxmZAqCQ3KUhbCka0Kvw1VWSplKbQ0DJVsId8BCvx2ZLd3lhFPt7MVkPN4d4NcsKSPSxNyIcnwMP2j5bwujbqGXi3prKMBLTvZuhRZ0-Gdr0PjI2sebLhor3yvmZyHcBgfJds4QBL_Kap9uie26mKuTwdaeVnPlQaTns34lQ-QFOUADUO5nMbL39BIVIa7tuf-O1I6cDoE-w_ww9TIPyHcVv6SxauBva2WPEldlYIEQwQ0pF2JhMXNeylf3xIWAd5xKtfgTG5WBx3j8P6Nfwz7wC53jRcHr9RcIMdPcFx3VxNrtS_wR2hgyP38OQxYxfDAYbWENEQFyIVC7CfbBdRTn0kZ9WnJypBhkrwd--QE6aW8P7w0UfOGp59nAi5strnh57LiuAoEE2A-uMOHc2Ti4YP9O1YRyn1jothDuyJp13EuuCRJhZCSNq2YuFfghc-WHrV5oUuh3fHSOH2cukSfOQdweqYH1SGNxEop4z1D)

For America,

Shawn Collins
U.S. Navy veteran
Republican for Congress
