name: Patrick Leahy
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Support bold climate investments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
Luckily, Congress has a path forward on the climate crisis.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/gprzswL-y_FN/bTlMYVdsd2ROWU5UMFkxVjdYaWFocXJXdVE2TEswd3pIbjBZSHIveUxYRGZ3MUFhc21aQnQ3WWZUcWQ3empBRWtnR05Xd1RDdmRmQnNQVTMrd0VNOXZ4V01XNWF1WDNkY2tZWElpdDB4NUk9S0/VXpySVZzOURUZnRHOTYzaWM2bmVtWnJEekhsQkl0ck5XY2NVOFlBQ3FiSlJZV2c3aUY0cVlzNWtrZmlFTHJwbGFGWC9yL1VSU1F1TG1GMzVmZjJDWGJqUy9MNUY0SDdJS0) Friend, Living in Vermont has given me a deep love and respect for the environment. I have seen firsthand the impact climate change has had on my state and its environmental treasures. I've also spent decades securing investments for conservation and research to protect our environment and fight the devastating impact of climate change. Still, Vermont is hotter and wetter than it used to be and the risk that poses is great. Yesterday, Secretary Vilsack joined me in Vermont to meet with climate experts at the waterfront to discuss what we can do to meet this challenge. Vermont, and the rest of the country, faces a harsh reality: Act now to mitigate the climate crisis, or it will get worse. **Luckily, Congress has a path forward.** [**I 'll tell you more in a minute, but first, sign your name next to mine in support of bold, nationwide investments to combat the climate crisis.**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/gprzswL-y_FN/bTlMYVdsd2ROWU5UMFkxVjdYaWFocXJXdVE2TEswd3pIbjBZSHIveUxYRGZ3MUFhc21aQnQ3WWZUcWQ3empBRWtnR05Xd1RDdmRmQnNQVTMrd0VNOXZ4V01XNWF1WDNkY2tZWElpdDB4NUk9S0/VXpySVZzOURUZnRHOTYzaWM2bmVtWnJEekhsQkl0ck5XY2NVOFlBQ3FiSlJZV2c3aUY0cVlzNWtrZmlFTHJwbGFGWC9yL1VSU1F1TG1GMzVmZjJDWGJqUy9MNUY0SDdJS0) | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
---
This summer, we've seen the crisis unfold. Storm damage and flooding. Heat waves upwards of 90 degrees (in Vermont!). Haze and smoke traveling 3,000 miles eastward from the western U.S. And yes, algae blooms in Lake Champlain.
The catastrophes we're seeing in every corner of the country this summer is why I'm doing everything I can right now to secure a better future for my grandkids and yours.
Before the Senate recess this month, **I voted to pass two very important bills -- the bipartisan infrastructure deal and the budget reconciliation package -- which, together, represent our path forward.** Together, these bills open the door to significant climate investments, and both bills are now with the House to take up when they return from recess next week.
[**As my colleagues get back to Capitol Hill next week, they need to hear from you: Sign on to lend your support for significant and necessary climate action.**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/gprzswL-y_FN/bTlMYVdsd2ROWU5UMFkxVjdYaWFocXJXdVE2TEswd3pIbjBZSHIveUxYRGZ3MUFhc21aQnQ3WWZUcWQ3empBRWtnR05Xd1RDdmRmQnNQVTMrd0VNOXZ4V01XNWF1WDNkY2tZWElpdDB4NUk9S0/VXpySVZzOURUZnRHOTYzaWM2bmVtWnJEekhsQkl0ck5XY2NVOFlBQ3FiSlJZV2c3aUY0cVlzNWtrZmlFTHJwbGFGWC9yL1VSU1F1TG1GMzVmZjJDWGJqUy9MNUY0SDdJS0)
Thanks for taking a minute to share your thoughts.
Sincerely,
Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)

clean_body: Luckily, Congress has a path forward on the climate crisis. | Friend, Living in Vermont has given me a deep love and respect for the environment. I have seen firsthand the impact climate change has had on my state and its environmental treasures. I've also spent decades securing investments for conservation and research to protect our environment and fight the devastating impact of climate change. Still, Vermont is hotter and wetter than it used to be and the risk that poses is great. Yesterday, Secretary Vilsack joined me in Vermont to meet with climate experts at the waterfront to discuss what we can do to meet this challenge. Vermont, and the rest of the country, faces a harsh reality: Act now to mitigate the climate crisis, or it will get worse. Luckily, Congress has a path forward. | This summer, we've seen the crisis unfold. Storm damage and flooding. Heat waves upwards of 90 degrees (in Vermont!). Haze and smoke traveling 3,000 miles eastward from the western U.S. And yes, algae blooms in Lake Champlain. The catastrophes we're seeing in every corner of the country this summer is why I'm doing everything I can right now to secure a better future for my grandkids and yours. Before the Senate recess this month, I voted to pass two very important bills -- the bipartisan infrastructure deal and the budget reconciliation package -- which, together, represent our path forward. Together, these bills open the door to significant climate investments, and both bills are now with the House to take up when they return from recess next week. Thanks for taking a minute to share your thoughts. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy U.S. Senator

name: Jose Castillo
subject: he is the weakest link
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS
body:
President Biden has failed across the board since taking office a mere eight months ago. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=663dde368c684c39a95a8a41da4c5485&_e=kQnHiwBOzdvcRbzKeRm6E_DFU7UUIOvvz40chcSEHx2UsxRli3zIU72VjQvpJSrGMR-Z7PNHUXjdo8JIULIseZ_hDbKB_ZpUXcjPZ2opMcEAzvJpzKvNeSmXOpdedwSgSbrima_O55DKx_4k7zmJ5SbEIsZawOqeWnXTtStSplnyRQec27dx6PvF7GJI4NFwGOIr7py7k8SGppYNLO_NZYDc9L-HoZpcQNOM-HB2ot-r0OkEhHjmuUijdfJ5C8uexFLy3hfvGowoAoi08gPiFfbGmPe6foJO6GbqTg9Z3mkK4n968e4cuigzkc5KdA_P70TGwMUPTL3Cixh0anPPsPJwmk0lT6I5qUIhysvZbjw_jlOT91pFqgfmr2FHx75N7n5bthwg6LT6wV_uA1hAantHTf8oxkf9mK8v6UmmDwiFLmqy-Hobpq1VdJ7AgfCNygJ7sDglpLdq-n9E-K_4vIK-_2rG6SmscT3q62lO7B4%3D)

---
Fellow American - Joe Biden is the weakest President the United States has ever sworn into office.

He’s failed across the board since taking office a mere eight months ago beginning with the border crisis he created then refused to recognize. Mind you, the southern border is still open to criminals, drug traffickers, illegal immigrants with COVID, while our northern border remains closed and American citizens are being required to show proof of vaccination to eat at restaurants, work out in gyms, and enter entertainment venues.

[**< < Make Congress Republican Again >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=663dde368c684c39a95a8a41da4c5485&_e=kQnHiwBOzdvcRbzKeRm6E_DFU7UUIOvvz40chcSEHx2UsxRli3zIU72VjQvpJSrGMR-Z7PNHUXjdo8JIULIseZ_hDbKB_ZpUXcjPZ2opMcEAzvJpzKvNeSmXOpdedwSgSbrima_O55DKx_4k7zmJ5SbEIsZawOqeWnXTtStSplnyRQec27dx6PvF7GJI4NFwGOIr7py7k8SGppYNLO_NZYDc9L-HoZpcQNOM-HB2ot-r0OkEhHjmuUijdfJ5C8uexFLy3hfvGowoAoi08gPiFSJTRnow7bxyNvKvtUCYhLiCfSJk-PjBHX7MvKZlcwY3Rcd7fGK-3ny0U_wY7WtyMWcnnfDjOAy6jr-qGK1LnkJto9L_jadgNAvIDdEguvkRVDCWZNEr0pZpAX6R7ypIfTv8XYorXd0084M2w5T2xY-K-POkZuhmyXiWBKr0fYelxc97JV-2kLrHBeVfwAxDX7tjNytBUb3kPoHnPsky9Rg%3D)
Today, President Biden is the leader of one of the worst foreign policy disasters in this generation’s history. Biden has over 40-years-experience working in the government and not once has he ever made a correct foreign policy decision.

Now, on the upcoming 20th anniversary of 9/11, the Taliban flag will be flying over what was once the U.S. Embassy in Afghanistan. God bless the souls he’s abandoned in this critical time.

As we are all reeling from the events of this past week, one thing is clear - **we’ve got to work harder to replace the incompetent and ineffective politicians leading our nation.**

If you don’t know my story - let me give you a little background. I was born in New Orleans but was raised by my mother in Honduras. **_As a child, I saw the corruption and failure of socialism and big government in Central America. I left to come back to America for a better future._**

[**< < Make Congress Republican Again >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=663dde368c684c39a95a8a41da4c5485&_e=kQnHiwBOzdvcRbzKeRm6E_DFU7UUIOvvz40chcSEHx2UsxRli3zIU72VjQvpJSrGMR-Z7PNHUXjdo8JIULIseZ_hDbKB_ZpUXcjPZ2opMcEAzvJpzKvNeSmXOpdedwSgSbrima_O55DKx_4k7zmJ5SbEIsZawOqeWnXTtStSplnyRQec27dx6PvF7GJI4NFwGOIr7py7k8SGppYNLO_NZYDc9L-HoZpcQNOM-HB2ot-r0OkEhHjmuUijdfJ5C8uexFLy3hfvGowoAoi08gPiFW8OetUwuf7Dz8PXGqS1hr5VCngNyK2bUaoG60iHyQjim4e5O774tbUvHMimbW99RwZArPcTIv9mWvOMeOzJ5_Sn9DvyuHkiNdD_dc396UV2rE7vDy-2OVjs1ofZRzK79gKIDUz3Q_ycjIWugACjLIJXFCMdvAEXa69yFmE1Zv-kUENhOiYU2lO2LlRGR7z0Y0KzE9iOV5HRH2ctrSXCEkU%3D)
I hate seeing what is happening to our country today. Which is why I decided to run for Congress in Florida’s 9th district. I want my daughter to have every opportunity this country has to offer, but if the Democrats stay in charge, I fear what type of country we will leave to her and our next generation.

**We need leaders who will put Americans first, defend our country and our borders, and ensure we remain the greatest nation in history.**

[**I’m asking you to join me in fighting for America’s future and supporting my campaign for Congress by making a generous gift today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=663dde368c684c39a95a8a41da4c5485&_e=kQnHiwBOzdvcRbzKeRm6E_DFU7UUIOvvz40chcSEHx2UsxRli3zIU72VjQvpJSrGMR-Z7PNHUXjdo8JIULIseZ_hDbKB_ZpUXcjPZ2opMcEAzvJpzKvNeSmXOpdedwSgSbrima_O55DKx_4k7zmJ5SbEIsZawOqeWnXTtStSplnyRQec27dx6PvF7GJI4NFwGOIr7py7k8SGppYNLO_NZYDc9L-HoZpcQNOM-HB2ot-r0OkEhHjmuUijdfJ5C8uexFLy3hfvGowoAoi08gPiFT-tsRLrThVHDxxm2TLWFnsX07c-iDjrodHndRb9lqS8ihY3lbe9xd7GhxO9d5C80v_WrS1RTJylkf8vo2CRMKb_pP0A-T5O0qk__jYOKqyHiazHWwO0DHKxgzKd5NTGEKjKgutnuTenrlovv5Y67vfptr3ageEIiq4GBIyxUeE7PjHyd2pPc4CiIRghdk_tbGE6owLFsuMCQZwpgJBtfGQ%3D)

It’s time we stand and demand better leadership from those who we’ve elected to represent and lead our country. My heart swells with pride to be a citizen of the United States of America. The freedom and liberties we are so lucky to have are often taken for granted. But we deserve better from our President and Congress.

[**If you agree, would you consider chipping in $5 or $10 to help send me to Congress to help Make Congress Great Again and protect America’s future for generations to come?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=663dde368c684c39a95a8a41da4c5485&_e=kQnHiwBOzdvcRbzKeRm6E_DFU7UUIOvvz40chcSEHx2UsxRli3zIU72VjQvpJSrGMR-Z7PNHUXjdo8JIULIseZ_hDbKB_ZpUXcjPZ2opMcEAzvJpzKvNeSmXOpdedwSgSbrima_O55DKx_4k7zmJ5SbEIsZawOqeWnXTtStSplnyRQec27dx6PvF7GJI4NFwGOIr7py7k8SGppYNLO_NZYDc9L-HoZpcQNOM-HB2ot-r0OkEhHjmuUijdfJ5C8uexFLy3hfvGowoAoi08gPiFdIgWZZMGsawbI-RoQ5qlqDt0Brnl0CAgzoc521j7V6ZPFCFmRUuMdhOaYyAxzTeqU5vRQUalsc-M03eLXjCU-Y_Sq8iRicHlNwE3vx80x1TTg65sDH8boXpQ9ZqWvu2d8K7Vk99V5Vl5La_2Xbq0TVfIjCpl6Vk2RYWVum4nozAE9mImyCo0COIIFla-cVMXw3XfADzX6IUgthu73oiqOE%3D)

God Bless America,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=663dde368c684c39a95a8a41da4c5485&_e=kQnHiwBOzdvcRbzKeRm6E_DFU7UUIOvvz40chcSEHx2UsxRli3zIU72VjQvpJSrGMR-Z7PNHUXjdo8JIULIseZ_hDbKB_ZpUXcjPZ2opMcEAzvJpzKvNeSmXOpdedwSgSbrima_O55DKx_4k7zmJ5SbEIsZawOqeWnXTtStSplnyRQec27dx6PvF7GJI4NFwGOIr7py7k8SGppYNLO_NZYDc9L-HoZpcQNOM-HB2ot-r0OkEhHjmuUijdfJ5C8uexFLy3hfvGowoAoi08gPiFa5d7IcwoZd7P6q_esmgrudjmGFw20QP3mgtV-vlS05yiBHN_FZroQ1WbWO7_rvQrfJSGwhA4GCQJiUIO32SsoFZgeIalrX-feFKA5AJXgYtvI49ArJOxT6RGxA-4ooE8MORntJUkurFgD5yzM7ZSFfe_S3aSiOVVzcddf8z4R9IVKCaCgBmt_ehZfo_bKXqo6V2P8EU3Z6U6UKlz1BnsRs%3D)
Jose Castillo

[**< < Make Congress Republican Again >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=663dde368c684c39a95a8a41da4c5485&_e=kQnHiwBOzdvcRbzKeRm6E_DFU7UUIOvvz40chcSEHx2UsxRli3zIU72VjQvpJSrGMR-Z7PNHUXjdo8JIULIseZ_hDbKB_ZpUXcjPZ2opMcEAzvJpzKvNeSmXOpdedwSgSbrima_O55DKx_4k7zmJ5SbEIsZawOqeWnXTtStSplnyRQec27dx6PvF7GJI4NFwGOIr7py7k8SGppYNLO_NZYDc9L-HoZpcQNOM-HB2ot-r0OkEhHjmuUijdfJ5C8uexFLy3hfvGowoAoi08gPiFY2_NM5jbF7mkFlbEkou4YMOeSttf7gu9WuYQsFjWue_n9C0-W1xtaJQ2Zeyr0MPXoSGSL4nINCuHeTrHEeRPaFx2ziA3pXvgLoTgFulxKWagyAhSvg7svW3XAScikrLXDzvG-U-7AXEDhsje_vvBuBzpWDzNRxa0Mj3eQo1nOmYMdtzMuXh796GAm-26L_GSBG6GO91S4cML5ZOr-UyRJk%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=663dde368c684c39a95a8a41da4c5485&_e=kQnHiwBOzdvcRbzKeRm6E6MbGZr5U17Q6si5zKDGjagamiDGdleJIM4g2Vg8e64_pq_rpLgmJ2uh1Xc_XyhrK21QLvFyZtQY2TMngbs3fBcgaIkOeZixjCo2i0TVwg8RjDKo-5iwvyzPRs3qwx6PvszCMydbRSs8g0DfYlJc-vz-lb7yrvMZlFtcCuWcm6Ye2ez7spXTVXjU8HDFNN0rKFjFPSWzrGYP8Djy1gTmaTW7LhHtSViV1aeykYwDpgUL0wPNsGlZAFMjJSmkVi3ytR2sLNr-cItuOrowm0TdN70%3D) [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=663dde368c684c39a95a8a41da4c5485&_e=kQnHiwBOzdvcRbzKeRm6E_8AHbVTeYqPOcRMcG5D7MategGqCpKyWY-Dtg7QShkRGki94yh9mQ7FKK2-daGdqLkqJNRlNGVc33XuQvIibzG5WiBmCB6GE5LnNE_AbMCnjLXRXZEYw7AAC1suoJZ0PBWhiaPOWhZgx9zcW2koNzE-vgiEIo0_4l8usVNvZQRrYs3Sm1Z4t8xIpw0Hn26wp8Jnfw6cNUcMJ4047ot_EcsnihJLRLCLGNAuMWhfCq5Cbt7NlI7B27G69Pz-Z7fh2w%3D%3D) [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=663dde368c684c39a95a8a41da4c5485&_e=kQnHiwBOzdvcRbzKeRm6E62q5FpqlC-tqGyUOhVvD7vjmO2dsgkFYyvZjX0vNibGiTqLbm_mlFj8qQV1An4AWkAMuu3sJYevsFiembolLJprUpdT4CC-yEuE-J4GvA3Ti-kzFmu9zRQprNPME_qX3P-HYLjg7lBxgYXz1Om9VQEnpDf388CiMPWQ_oKA25pyosE2ZufMqy-tmurRAHC_9oVNhG9cIESj9ing-wN0OS2oDoyFE-FOxHN8nmmhmxxx5CkjBBSm4NoLRxFXpaoaGDT8g8MkQnZdFnnPBABVZ60%3D)

body:

| | | | |

---|---|---|---|---
| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek**

**First I would like to take a special moment to acknowledge our service men and women who bravely defended America over the last 20 years in Afghanistan. I speak for all in saying our active military and veterans have our utmost respect, and we thank you for risking it all and we remember all who made the ultimate sacrifice. While we have witnessed the catastrophic handling of our military under the current administration, I hope to see Joe Biden facilitate the safe return of our troops, a nd of Americans currently trapped behind Taliban checkpoints.
On a lighter note, we are excited to announce the release of our new NHGOP website, on which you‘ll be able to see our press releases, explore events, and sign up for volunteer opportunities. We hope that you enjoy our new platform, and encourage all local committees to submit any upcoming events not yet on our calendar. There is also a free website opportunity for local committees, so reach out to us if your town committee would like to learn more! **
**
Tomorrow I’ll be speaking at the Heritage Action event with Senator Rick Scott at 9 a.m. on Saturday at the Wildlife Sport Outfitters in Manchester. This is part of their “Save Our Paychecks'' tour that they’re hosting in a number of states across the country. If you are interested in attending, I encourage you to join us!**
****
**You can sign up here:[https://www.eventbrite.com/e/save-our-paychecks-manchester-nh-tickets-166833711121](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Fsave-our-paychecks-manchester-nh-tickets-166833711121/1/0100017b653334d0-4bc29455-4c56-46b6-ae96-3423be0f7249-000000/KKvQDpzJSqDWD-r-ST6vFws4vqc=232)**
**
Next Friday Congresswoman Kat Cammack will be visiting New Hampshire to join volunteers in support of the Bedford special election! She will do a meet and greet with Linda before going out to canvass with volunteers. Check out the graphic below for further information - ALL volunteers who join us in knocking doors will receive a FREE cold brew coffee from Simply Delicious for their efforts. **
**
This is the LAST week that we can have LTEs (Letters to the Editor) submitted in support of Candidate Linda Camarota (8/24 is the official closing date), so if you have worked with Linda in the past or live in Bedford, please take a few moments to share your positive experiences with Linda. Every submission truly makes a difference, and it’s up to all of us to ensure we continue to support our Republican candidates in Concord. **

---

| | **Become friends with NH Senate Republicans! **

_ Follow their page on_ [**Facebook**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fnhsenaterepublicans%2F/1/0100017b653334d0-4bc29455-4c56-46b6-ae96-3423be0f7249-000000/Bcysrj5es5Avl-Nim_rNwvp7B4Y=232)!

******A win for school choice**

This week, the Joint Legislative Committee on Administrative Rules voted along party lines to approve rules to implement New Hampshire’s Education Freedom Accounts Act.

This innovative school choice program will for the first time allow families in need the opportunity to leverage state education funding for alternatives to their local schools. We know that every child learns differently, and while some students thrive in their local district schools, others struggle and need another path.

Education Freedom Accounts use state dollars for non-public school tuition, hardware and software for remote learning, transportation, testing, and even Community College. Expanding school choice will give families in need the chance to access the best education for their children. I am proud of the work that Senators Ward, Hennessey, and Ricciardi put in on the Senate Education Committee to craft this important and ground-breaking legislation. Because of this week’s vote, families will be able to set up EFAs for their children this fall.

New Hampshire families have more choices than ever before because House and Senate Republicans and Governor Sununu trust New Hampshire families to guide the education of their children.

Sen. Chuck Morse

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

clean_body: Keep up with NHGOP happenings! | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | Weekly Newsletter ** Note from Chairman Stepanek Weekly Governor's Glance **Upcoming Events House Republican Update Senate Republican Update Republican Spotlight Noteworthy News NHGOP Tweets NH Federation of Republican WomenNH Young RepublicansNH Federation of College Republicans | | Derek First I would like to take a special moment to acknowledge our service men and women who bravely defended America over the last 20 years in Afghanistan. I speak for all in saying our active military and veterans have our utmost respect, and we thank you for risking it all and we remember all who made the ultimate sacrifice. While we have witnessed the catastrophic handling of our military under the current administration, I hope to see Joe Biden facilitate the safe return of our troops, a nd of Americans currently trapped behind Taliban checkpoints. On a lighter note, we are excited to announce the release of our new NHGOP website, on which you‘ll be able to see our press releases, explore events, and sign up for volunteer opportunities. We hope that you enjoy our new platform, and encourage all local committees to submit any upcoming events not yet on our calendar. There is also a free website opportunity for local committees, so reach out to us if your town committee would like to learn more! Tomorrow I’ll be speaking at the Heritage Action event with Senator Rick Scott at 9 a.m. on Saturday at the Wildlife Sport Outfitters in Manchester. This is part of their “Save Our Paychecks'' tour that they’re hosting in a number of states across the country. If you are interested in attending, I encourage you to join us! ** You can sign up here: Next Friday Congresswoman Kat Cammack will be visiting New Hampshire to join volunteers in support of the Bedford special election! She will do a meet and greet with Linda before going out to canvass with volunteers. Check out the graphic below for further information - ALL volunteers who join us in knocking doors will receive a FREE cold brew coffee from Simply Delicious for their efforts. This is the LAST week that we can have LTEs (Letters to the Editor) submitted in support of Candidate Linda Camarota (8/24 is the official closing date), so if you have worked with Linda in the past or live in Bedford, please take a few moments to share your positive experiences with Linda. Tim Scott | | | "Buy Tickets" | | October 22-23rd NHFRW Leadership Conference | | | "Buy Tickets" | | | | | | | | This week, Speaker Pro Tempore Kim Rice and Representative Ross Berry are standing up for Education Freedom. While wealthy Democrat Elites say that parents shouldn't have a say in their children's education, House Republicans are assuring that parents have the ultimate say in how their children learn. ** Link to Speaker Pro Tempore Rice's Article: Link to Representative Berry's Article: | | To view the entire House Calendar for the week, click the link below! | | "Calender Link" | | | Senate Republican Update | | | | Become friends with NH Senate Republicans! Follow their page on ! **A win for school choice This week, the Joint Legislative Committee on Administrative Rules voted along party lines to approve rules to implement New Hampshire’s Education Freedom Accounts Act. This innovative school choice program will for the first time allow families in need the opportunity to leverage state education funding for alternatives to their local schools. We know that every child learns differently, and while some students thrive in their local district schools, others struggle and need another path. Education Freedom Accounts use state dollars for non-public school tuition, hardware and software for remote learning, transportation, testing, and even Community College. Expanding school choice will give families in need the chance to access the best education for their children. I am proud of the work that Senators Ward, Hennessey, and Ricciardi put in on the Senate Education Committee to craft this important and ground-breaking legislation. Because of this week’s vote, families will be able to set up EFAs for their children this fall. New Hampshire families have more choices than ever before because House and Senate Republicans and Governor Sununu trust New Hampshire families to guide the education of their children. Sen. Chuck Morse | | | Republican Spotlight : NHFRW PresidentElizabeth Girard ** | | | | This week’s Republican of the week is NHFRW President Elizabeth Girard!** Elizabeth has been a rockstar in organizing the New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women and has played a crucial role in building and expanding the group’s membership. She puts countless hours into her position as President, especially when it comes to organizing events. In fact, the Federation will be hosting one of it’s largest events tomorrow, their annual Tea Party! With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. The tragedy unfolding in Afghanistan is a national embarrassment. It’s a senseless and disastrous end to a senseless war that should have ended the mi | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=37c1822d839d4ee19d8c4fc5024827d2&_e=x1wFQNRA_tGNDZIbxUHiVTmSme0CgO0rf01zyLdtpq2rSKwG22JQg7Vk18Gwwu_SBIas3fONehGUGknpgmvkignFnjeuT8XMzqTafbryk6gEQFLU0sg3qPjgcI6MPw1UB29xNlipF2q-8mss6C-9OsWfScalX93PiTFP4aSpxO_L-MviMNykEJ85swNiQwwjdinwxKYSMZ0qtglQxjUE37G9ACHHCs7OOIvHpU_xURdxhPgPf9OmSVKddxOSE811C1f1gL0u-RsyLtejvleaWsgvfLwtaBOGWvG0LXfJAAlc3CKG3ftE2k4A-flhwvl7t8JIqnu0__qNmklz-NDUaYb2TY30jBsl6K37yxKkCoFyTEkbuQdCvraayPGpANehxbza4Z1fXE0vyaLH56yKTXZpCv3acxaBtprynaxcu5Pc0qI_5NXcC3k8Hlqr1Y_BaqN37sb_8GuZY6xDbA-foZqKWC8qokYE7N6HF_YKFJM%3D)

Peter,

The tragedy unfolding in Afghanistan is a national embarrassment. It’s a disastrous end to a senseless war that should have ended a long time ago when the original mission was finished.

The chaos created by the Biden administration in the evacuation is a slap in the face to me and every Veteran who fought in Afghanistan. Knowing that Taliban Mullahs are driving through Kabul in the same Humvees my platoon drove in when I was wounded fills me with profound grief.

We need leaders in Washington who will stand up to senseless wars that have left thousands of American Veterans like me permanently scarred with very little to show for it.

[**That’s why I’m asking for your support so I can hold this administration accountable and stop future administrations from launching more futile wars.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=37c1822d839d4ee19d8c4fc5024827d2&_e=x1wFQNRA_tGNDZIbxUHiVTmSme0CgO0rf01zyLdtpq2rSKwG22JQg7Vk18Gwwu_SBIas3fONehGUGknpgmvkignFnjeuT8XMzqTafbryk6gEQFLU0sg3qPjgcI6MPw1UB29xNlipF2q-8mss6C-9OsWfScalX93PiTFP4aSpxO_L-MviMNykEJ85swNiQwwjdinwxKYSMZ0qtglQxjUE37G9ACHHCs7OOIvHpU_xURdxhPgPf9OmSVKddxOSE811C1f1gL0u-RsyLtejvleaWtHRNHz5suRyCx77E4K-rQzOVQCHwox5j1FVQevmgSRo-n3zBiQfAi-ok49gtIiaBFhosmxrSXb7zmVBmZtCgjPFBnPlEKbvKLBSM-mPXNVlybUMjBNw2SwWFqqM6McmOFAA70kXxfxZHzjjbwRtzoW0vSX38yxBTGHLnn6wLN7ziZvSR63k1lCSYFN8uFhuANU0tDSdIh5_V4ZMiEog_zs%3D)

| [Hold Biden Accountable](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=37c1822d839d4ee19d8c4fc5024827d2&_e=x1wFQNRA_tGNDZIbxUHiVTmSme0CgO0rf01zyLdtpq2rSKwG22JQg7Vk18Gwwu_SBIas3fONehGUGknpgmvkignFnjeuT8XMzqTafbryk6gEQFLU0sg3qPjgcI6MPw1UB29xNlipF2q-8mss6C-9OsWfScalX93PiTFP4aSpxO_L-MviMNykEJ85swNiQwwjdinwxKYSMZ0qtglQxjUE37G9ACHHCs7OOIvHpU_xURdxhPgPf9OmSVKddxOSE811C1f1gL0u-RsyLtejvleaWjmhIoMBT8e2tQMnqv2jib2TH-fuuhazYQZlZy7sJJCuvdWNfwS_efcStJgnBfz3tFwAFsOT7JhjB4I58tb33MAEs_k4fOzAIwm0JWpJL3VwVhPbasHjuzI9ZAqeglxBj0nX6VhZeEa-5CHVzWx08ib79y23LEdNz1juxZ-KQOOPg1iEVP7j_b-7LqxWGzQEwRuPZ0NXJft592gtWh2K0c4%3D)

I personally led Soldiers into battle in Afghanistan. **We didn’t fight for our Commander-in-Chief to be vacationing at Camp David while the Country we fought and died for descends into anarchy.** The Biden administration has failed our military personnel, and they’ve failed our country.

Every American and every Veteran deserves answers for this administration’s colossal failure of leadership. [**Help send this Veteran to Congress so we can hold this administration accountable for their abject failure in leadership.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=37c1822d839d4ee19d8c4fc5024827d2&_e=x1wFQNRA_tGNDZIbxUHiVTmSme0CgO0rf01zyLdtpq2rSKwG22JQg7Vk18Gwwu_SBIas3fONehGUGknpgmvkignFnjeuT8XMzqTafbryk6gEQFLU0sg3qPjgcI6MPw1UB29xNlipF2q-8mss6C-9OsWfScalX93PiTFP4aSpxO_L-MviMNykEJ85swNiQwwjdinwxKYSMZ0qtglQxjUE37G9ACHHCs7OOIvHpU_xURdxhPgPf9OmSVKddxOSE811C1f1gL0u-RsyLtejvleaWiRproc2041ITmwq4oVspagrQSFix5t3mOKe4-spfpofHbOKsrIy_PnlyS7N5A5ocHspiqRPkLvWoPeRTdyGHBSq4yp1FRqCa6Gn99q36Dn1a1xG34Y0lT_weNUYnUf_IrNxw-a2DdLkquVn0vqfHdeMVbL7vw2dN8q7p8FvVdf0O1dk__cBG5Ki3aGFcAcpYxLAbzkzg9Qx8YeEbO44_sI%3D)

body:
Can you join me in support and help us elect more moms like Katie? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34400186/301863286/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OTA4ZGQwLTE3MDItZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rw3iA997oMZEYmYEW2ru9X7C3fDRasOgnDKVwC4gtiA=&emci=f6b73d90-1402-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d7908dd0-1702-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, Hey--Simona Grace here, **California Mother of the Year 2020** and Founder of Moms in Office. I was humbled and honored last year when[ **American Mothers**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34400187/301863287/804087270?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OTA4ZGQwLTE3MDItZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rw3iA997oMZEYmYEW2ru9X7C3fDRasOgnDKVwC4gtiA=&emci=f6b73d90-1402-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d7908dd0-1702-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) named me Mother of the Year for the work that I do to champion mothers in my state of California and beyond. In 2018, I was inspired to start an organization to help elect more moms like Katie Porter so single moms like me can have better representation in Congress. **[I am reaching out to you today to help us fund our Katie Porter Childcare Fund so that we can pay for our candidates' childcare. Can I count on you today to chip in?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34400188/301863288/600483780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OTA4ZGQwLTE3MDItZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rw3iA997oMZEYmYEW2ru9X7C3fDRasOgnDKVwC4gtiA=)** While many campaigns consider non-election years to be “off-years,” our work to achieve real progress for moms never stops. We have seen an unprecedented number of women run for office during the last election cycle, because of women's organizations like us who were there to support their campaign**.** **[Will you make a $5 contribution today to support our Childcare Fund as we lead this work to elect more moms to office?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34400189/301863289/600483780?refcode=0812&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OTA4ZGQwLTE3MDItZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rw3iA997oMZEYmYEW2ru9X7C3fDRasOgnDKVwC4gtiA=)** Moms in Office is working tirelessly to provide targeted support programs for candidates with caregiving responsibilities that will make it possible for them to win big. We are the only political organization supporting moms paying for childcare while running for office. Our PAC made a significant investment by establishing a Childcare Fund that our candidates can use to pay for their caregiving expenses. [**Be one of the 12 or more supporters needed from your area by chipping in what you can and help us fully fund our Childcare Program for 2022.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34400190/301863290/600483780?refcode=0812&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OTA4ZGQwLTE3MDItZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Rw3iA997oMZEYmYEW2ru9X7C3fDRasOgnDKVwC4gtiA=) Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms. Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Katie Porter **#momsquad** |

PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
clean_body: Can you join me in support and help us elect more moms like Katie? Hi Peter, Hey--Simona Grace here, California Mother of the Year 2020 and Founder of Moms in Office. I was humbled and honored last year when named me Mother of the Year for the work that I do to champion mothers in my state of California and beyond. In 2018, I was inspired to start an organization to help elect more moms like Katie Porter so single moms like me can have better representation in Congress. = While many campaigns consider non-election years to be “off-years,” our work to achieve real progress for moms never stops. We have seen an unprecedented number of women run for office during the last election cycle, because of women's organizations like us who were there to support their campaign. = Moms in Office is working tirelessly to provide targeted support programs for candidates with caregiving responsibilities that will make it possible for them to win big. We are the only political organization supporting moms paying for childcare while running for office. Our PAC made a significant investment by establishing a Childcare Fund that our candidates can use to pay for their caregiving expenses. = Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms. Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Katie Porter #momsquad | I will chip in to pay for childcare! = = = = = | | | | ---|---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . body:
I know how Republicans can take back the House Majority in November 2022. I know how Republicans can take back the House Majority in November 2022. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=616cae3defa643128897f645ea9f6588&_e=eyP55yvx_mgtQEJykG7SsNLHzszKa5SNyOpwY0SjiTJD0Ej_eomV_q-Jorg3dHheCS8lcKU3kfaPE1g4rcivBqwUE7ubfNoZBWUCsHbjUZrVRh0wz9vXVmFzsCChDsgJtPzYpiAMl4vrguvEpAp_9utLZ1CV1C9VlT9oCCAu6h7x41-kdbHhGDpKdWxdO3jRyY0HX1kr-t81K9srtjSeN9CRS_7lReMN-vjXRrjvdR-zA4dM0zaPh1iLW-TeZbI1wWhApfUwfEQTN9myK1lg6llTC--wWZ-Dt5vmsTAaWIxkXTIhVI9b2cb0Ya68Bmr64WUDQZU5zKVubEfq1cC0aiv-pcRhcVqSltmW887BApDy_pS3SAjCfWwnSH1CRF9r)

Friend,

Today I wanted to let you in on a little secret... I know how Republicans can take back the House Majority in November 2022.

Republican women are at the forefront of our effort to end the Pelosi majority. There's one particular GOP member that is leading the charge, and she needs our immediate help to succeed - Congresswoman Debbie Lesko out in Arizona.

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, This week, we saw Joe Biden’s weak and ineffectual leadership laid bare for the country – and the world – to see. The absolutely disastrous execution of the withdrawal from Afghanistan and the finger pointing from Biden in the aftermath is yet another stain on his administration. America must project strength, America must protect its own citizens, and America must not abandon its allies and those that stood with our soldiers abroad. While Joe Biden continues to hide from the American people in hopes this will go away, it makes absolutely clear why we need America First leadership from Jane Timken in the U.S. Senate. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Jane Timken on the Spectrum** On Sunday, Jane joined Colleen Marshall on NBC Columbus’ the Spectrum. Jane talked about the campaign’s ever-growing momentum and spoke to the issues she hears from Ohioans as she travels the state. She also used the opportunity to respond to baseless, sexist attacks from her opponents. Watch the full video here: [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f32dc225316943e9b3f2667e259bc3a2&_e=i5xFJeHTohLcEDoFLhYm62hCIEvnVVnhO84F0E3c6Vd0UHFN3MjSYT4rM3zcTa1rkNDrN52Z6-UJQBInlThcfvL3sCttToYrnjdfm1h1G0h3sP7Vsnlc_FEfFyX4qCYFuoAQwomOYK1YPA3XIO3Ed3x9BCpCr0D7Dx9m9js-M_xmtJ74Noz-0TuIsfKE6eoogmgfSic2nFIBL51t-rs5uqNFU2OymGo4AuEn0FvG9SiHs6RzrjuSUy8Iljl1X4WVXxml52EK9axBc5W3lybqFQ%3D%3D) **400,000 Voter Contacts** With over 250 days until the primary, our great field team has already surpassed 400,000 voter contacts during the campaign. Thanks to our amazing volunteers and interns, we are spreading Jane’s America First message far and wide at the doorsteps of Ohioans across the state. Jane firmly believes that campaigns in Ohio are won on the ground and that’s exactly what are team is doing every day: winning it on the ground. And the bad news for our opponents is we’re not slowing down! [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f32dc225316943e9b3f2667e259bc3a2&_e=i5xFJeHTohLcEDoFLhYm63j5eh3dI_aeGuQyGEvcbZxl-5mXTXHYRQSqeiVwyQweDaE-HVlXD0sn2044VDCOUNnf2qmJJQ3HICswnYixjCD-WCM6rIo69sV1us2p4Q6DwpL8qy4cNIQYwaXSs9kX7-jSGh3avNi_5_2x-TITe2_tLWL1QsHYxdMZM0Wryl2D7to77Ai3CWQo-kmwesDRkTeTWMty8QjjWJ2yz6TcVwjIUU44Q5UhV-4JiEKIJFVVTHd25ddmPElzn9e9eX0ePfoyaiPbHo-ui7RsnYBdV4JYEOCr4PewDBpqaQ7z6IRC) **Latest Endorsements** This week, the campaign announced yet another round of endorsements from Ohio conservative leaders, school board members, and law enforcement. Jane is proud to have the endorsement of so many leaders from across the state who understand the needs of their communities and know that Jane Timken is the right person to serve those communities in the U.S. Senate. "Jane has continued to show that she is a strong supporter of law enforcement in our state. I know that she will go to Washington and fight every day for our men and women in blue. She has always backed the blue and now it's my honor to back her." - **Brian McLaughlin, Columbiana County Sheriff** "I know Jane as a fighter. She fought for our conservative candidates during her time as Ohio Republican Party Chairman and now she is fighting for our children as Critical Race Theory slowly becomes the norm in classrooms all over the country. I am supporting her because she will protect our kids as our next United States Senator." - **Lori Sanders, Pickerington Local School District Board of Education** ** ** _**Full List of This Week’s Endorsements**_ Branden Meyer - Fairfield County Clerk of Courts Lori Sanders - Pickerington Local School District Board of Education Jim Armeni - Columbiana County Recorder Brian McLaughlin - Columbiana Couny Sheriff **Women for Jane** Next week is the kickoff of our Women for Jane group in Powell. With special guests Rep. Laura Lanese, Rep. Sara Carruthers, Rep. Jean Schmidt, Rep. Tracy Richardson, and more conservative female leaders from across the state, it’s going to be a great event. clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, This week, we saw Joe Biden’s weak and ineffectual leadership laid bare for the country – and the world – to see. The absolutely disastrous execution of the withdrawal from Afghanistan and the finger pointing from Biden in the aftermath is yet another stain on his administration. America must project strength, America must protect its own citizens, and America must not abandon its allies and those that stood with our soldiers abroad. While Joe Biden continues to hide from the American people in hopes this will go away, it makes absolutely clear why we need America First leadership from Jane Timken in the U.S. Senate. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. Jane Timken on the Spectrum On Sunday, Jane joined Colleen Marshall on NBC Columbus’ the Spectrum. Jane talked about the campaign’s ever-growing momentum and spoke to the issues she hears from Ohioans as she travels the state. She also used the opportunity to respond to baseless, sexist attacks from her opponents. Watch the full video here: 400,000 Voter Contacts With over 250 days until the primary, our great field team has already surpassed 400,000 voter contacts during the campaign. Thanks to our amazing volunteers and interns, we are spreading Jane’s America First message far and wide at the doorsteps of Ohioans across the state. Jane firmly believes that campaigns in Ohio are won on the ground and that’s exactly what are team is doing every day: winning it on the ground. And the bad news for our opponents is we’re not slowing down! Latest Endorsements This week, the campaign announced yet another round of endorsements from Ohio conservative leaders, school board members, and law enforcement. Jane is proud to have the endorsement of so many leaders from across the state who understand the needs of their communities and know that Jane Timken is the right person to serve those communities in the U.S. Senate. "Jane has continued to show that she is a strong supporter of law enforcement in our state. I know that she will go to Washington and fight every day for our men and women in blue. She has always backed the blue and now it's my honor to back her." - Brian McLaughlin, Columbiana County Sheriff "I know Jane as a fighter. She fought for our conservative candidates during her time as Ohio Republican Party Chairman and now she is fighting for our children as Critical Race Theory slowly becomes the norm in classrooms all over the country. I am supporting her because she will protect our kids as our next United States Senator." - Lori Sanders, Pickerington Local School District Board of Education Full List of This Week’s Endorsements Branden Meyer - Fairfield County Clerk of Courts Lori Sanders - Pickerington Local School District Board of Education Jim Armeni - Columbiana County Recorder Brian McLaughlin - Columbiana Couny Sheriff Women for Jane Next week is the kickoff of our Women for Jane group in Powell. With special guests Rep. Laura Lanese, Rep. Sara Carruthers, Rep. Jean Schmidt, Rep. Tracy Richardson, and more conservative female leaders from across the state, it’s going to be a great event. Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a076b4e5d6584e0dbe78ba15ad1653ab&_e=52Owcjk7TvBQfmSp8t1s62xM1XC0Ti0vxXPPjQVg9bCcUtI7-JO_Epew5PPDMVMEavxN25Lg88CJuZaC_b3TjJZa6KNVQv1DZfKWL-IWxOqn8VBw9GHDzE0fBqjud3PAVQvH3R5xAripPAxZd5tv8c1DCtxy0d9ExyahPj9XZhHLE1PhurCsJjF6MvVpQmjmYjCDDcJ46nBM1kugnTKl8Vll6JuWPYHkvkwwJYOXsCrJ8s0GZWn3HVJOdGrDBWjj1zKs_E2O5kWlYXzGTlqFTcZMlEBf-HHhSSykX9bp1iS8rW5GZJ-bDt0viLP8fxS1EEJ-qnkNZHb3XOrGKAzEE-Tr_1HNghF2VTaGrVW5sA0Y1jUtUY06wuzSlanB8kjakPfHpHob7HTmhMRMYDO-kmVIfyfUp7LlRnq-HT2XCjf1e_trWISa66FtxVno_87se4GxMwd4V5B7WgtgxYSr3Qiyom-oqpiRn8l-k7loGVI%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a076b4e5d6584e0dbe78ba15ad1653ab&_e=52Owcjk7TvBQfmSp8t1s62xM1XC0Ti0vxXPPjQVg9bCcUtI7-JO_Epew5PPDMVMEavxN25Lg88CJuZaC_b3TjJZa6KNVQv1DZfKWL-IWxOqn8VBw9GHDzE0fBqjud3PAVQvH3R5xAripPAxZd5tv8c1DCtxy0d9ExyahPj9XZhHLE1PhurCsJjF6MvVpQmjmYjCDDcJ46nBM1kugnTKl8Vll6JuWPYHkvkwwJYOXsCrJ8s0GZWn3HVJOdGrDBWjj1zKs_E2O5kWlYXzGTlqFTdqBorvIXFBhN-7j-RnQlAVL6m9TPgK4awa1THNNprRzrohYqanPZeRxgaSQ3A5ikun2RxjUa11AU9JWFP7yk30TwHhNeBsygDFAhX2wn0AZg61fpEw0agh3GiMvOLE7wwWP0o6mwOKLQvHUNLY1dKYt_SioLcwxoa4xVGJvGf7mfyM9sa8xPYSLuRzedH72SaB1GFv22O3iD4f_yBu2nzY%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a076b4e5d6584e0dbe78ba15ad1653ab&_e=52Owcjk7TvBQfmSp8t1s62xM1XC0Ti0vxXPPjQVg9bCcUtI7-JO_Epew5PPDMVMEavxN25Lg88CJuZaC_b3TjJZa6KNVQv1DZfKWL-IWxOqn8VBw9GHDzE0fBqjud3PAVQvH3R5xAripPAxZd5tv8c1DCtxy0d9ExyahPj9XZhHLE1PhurCsJjF6MvVpQmjmYjCDDcJ46nBM1kugnTKl8Vll6JuWPYHkvkwwJYOXsCrJ8s0GZWn3HVJOdGrDBWjj1zKs_E2O5kWlYXzGTlqFTa5vuZ_aMhtc82RXLLxUMnaxa3cIQrIaGI_cd0WDIZjebrkWvPYlI6TS9e1MpeC5yY5CckGi8QDZIj5TWudE9ZOo1tlfIAQvQC1ei0YB8DhL0TfnL2dB6CliG881X0euInu6xezy7dFGE3OLb7Zhy95ox9VFqcaqB9ZQlm8bhPMogbl2I0bSsbsGHOFyy1ESkgqPv-Cd2oBY7CDjZcm8Pno%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a076b4e5d6584e0dbe78ba15ad1653ab&_e=52Owcjk7TvBQfmSp8t1s62xM1XC0Ti0vxXPPjQVg9bCcUtI7-JO_Epew5PPDMVMEavxN25Lg88CJuZaC_b3TjJZa6KNVQv1DZfKWL-IWxOqn8VBw9GHDzE0fBqjud3PAVQvH3R5xAripPAxZd5tv8c1DCtxy0d9ExyahPj9XZhHLE1PhurCsJjF6MvVpQmjmYjCDDcJ46nBM1kugnTKl8Vll6JuWPYHkvkwwJYOXsCrJ8s0GZWn3HVJOdGrDBWjj1zKs_E2O5kWlYXzGTlqFTVBC8SJi6tFbqfcgKhssSctj-WZzRRiT82iZ6s8HmtcQh82Z0o-RO8aXfL1xuZKjiMQNivN5a4iqve-gtOR_8s9eHwLgvu7BSPsEFqNyWXyR5u6OwLhgKaH5y4pWX8e3MxssuclXBOzGFKQ_rUu3hZ4ABLHsbdNy8ys6OZIxl_kdXycZURXLBQVBk1kH7C52Khx5NLfw7o1xitoh_NhyCeQ%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a076b4e5d6584e0dbe78ba15ad1653ab&_e=52Owcjk7TvBQfmSp8t1s62xM1XC0Ti0vxXPPjQVg9bCcUtI7-JO_Epew5PPDMVMEavxN25Lg88CJuZaC_b3TjJZa6KNVQv1DZfKWL-IWxOqn8VBw9GHDzE0fBqjud3PAVQvH3R5xAripPAxZd5tv8c1DCtxy0d9ExyahPj9XZhHLE1PhurCsJjF6MvVpQmjmYjCDDcJ46nBM1kugnTKl8Vll6JuWPYHkvkwwJYOXsCrJ8s0GZWn3HVJOdGrDBWjj1zKs_E2O5kWlYXzGTlqFTdxjnyhGV-A0VZu0lwrSktDtO1bXBGIcEClb94sn3m2OoZVX0GGIvG4x56naAKJ4fOkve_pR6esvz4qvIdRtwhFTA71q39_LC9dQPe3DNN1P0wgts9b8-WzUrzn7YMOo3h_ZGVxA1E0N1NNFZ-P5V8eT5MNBYVbJtXBUjBuK8oOqR_qkwvEwYk1925zWQNbjCEThS_w1yvtt90HYIOy45UE%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a076b4e5d6584e0dbe78ba15ad1653ab&_e=52Owcjk7TvBQfmSp8t1s62xM1XC0Ti0vxXPPjQVg9bCcUtI7-JO_Epew5PPDMVMEavxN25Lg88CJuZaC_b3TjJZa6KNVQv1DZfKWL-IWxOqn8VBw9GHDzE0fBqjud3PAVQvH3R5xAripPAxZd5tv8c1DCtxy0d9ExyahPj9XZhHLE1PhurCsJjF6MvVpQmjmYjCDDcJ46nBM1kugnTKl8Vll6JuWPYHkvkwwJYOXsCrJ8s0GZWn3HVJOdGrDBWjj1zKs_E2O5kWlYXzGTlqFTe2WA7u5Mi_KIysz6nENJUrSgFkvFKOCvp8MdzavFtEzEo3uGIR47hJvp7P2mA1291lGJjGfehJEGvWZXtXBrrHgV6VzXVmzXiSs0xp3JtVm0iH9fojUl2eAvl50ndpnwbGSnkNO0ptRQbxweuahAIQZXImPfd4OKViufiAvAFrpvonktSG436XJnR6YxlgI7OMFZlxpAaIYWNlGnp3UXVE%3D)

Friend,

Did you see Joe Biden on TV? What an absolute disgrace.

Joe Biden's administration is a DISASTER and he is nowhere to be found.

**Biden's attempts to deflect blame on President Trump are the actions of a failing president.**

It's clear that we need a STRONG Commander-in-Chief in the White House again -_someone who keeps their promises and PROTECTS our allies. _

We're reaching out to you, Friend, to ask you to join us in DEMANDING Joe Biden be held accountable for his FAILING administration. This is your chance to take a stand. _We cannot allow him to get away with this._

subject: The Biden Admin's botched pullout from Afghanistan,
body:
Radical Nation endorsed by Newt Gingrich and more... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c26601ab6aff/the-biden-admins-botched-pullout-from-afghanistan?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## Biden administration’s botched pullout from Afghanistan...
This week the Taliban has taken over Afghanistan and the Afghan government has [completely collapsed](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6d1a681dc8&e=f6564bbe3b). This came 11 days after Biden pulled all the remaining US troops out.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b95bc72762&e=f6564bbe3b)
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=bcd821b08f&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | |
## Pre-Order _Radical Nation_ ...
Thank you to everyone who already pre-ordered Radical Nation, it hit number 1 in a several categories because of your support.“ _**RADICAL NATION**_ is a must-read. Spicer presents a clear and concise understating of the direction we are headed and provides the tools and tactics necessary to combat it.“ **— NEWT GINGRICH** Check it out and get your pre-orders in now and if you want to host an event on the book tour send an email to [contact@seanspicer.com](mailto:contact@seanspicer.com).|
---
[Pre-order here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=81d5dc3b49&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5998e942ff&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[As Taliban terrorists take control of Afghanistan, the world is witnessing in real time the dire consequences of President Biden’s weak and failed leadership](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f83e3831e7&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via Townhall by Tommy Hicks
|
---
[Kamala Harris plans Vietnam visit – just as Afghanistan draws comparisons to fall of Saigon](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=67d0004942&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox News The VEEP writers could not have scripted this better.
|
---
[Intelligence Warned of Afghan Military Collapse, Despite Biden’s Assurances](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=67473234f7&e=f6564bbe3b) — via NYTimes This story was inevitable. The INTEL Community was not going to get thrown under the bus by the WH.
| | | |
---
Last week I asked if the military should be required to get the vaccine, even though its still only approved under emergency use, the answer was pretty [clearly no](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e74366adfd&e=f6564bbe3b). Now I want to know:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6b3482b677&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=154d5d44df&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## What I’m reading this week...
This book is very relevant to our current climate, when it seems like every company is making a political statement - how do we move forward. Interesting read, check it out. |

[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e0f0c8c3a9&e=f6564bbe3b)

body:
| | | **[We're over the moon!! A new report just revealed Georgia has one of the HIGHEST voter registration rates in the nation -- all thanks to our Democratic hero, Stacey Abrams! But Stacey knows we can't afford to take our foot off the gas for even a moment. Republicans are only FIVE seats away from taking over the House and pushing their voter suppression agenda on a NATIONAL scale. Will you stand with Stacey and rush in $3 before midnight to PROTECT our House Majority and DEFEAT anti-voting rights House Republicans across the country? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)**

Did you hear the news?!?!

**FIRST:**

Stacey Abrams spent YEARS registering voters and building an unbeatable grassroots movement in Georgia -- _and now the state has one of the HIGHEST voter registration rates in the country!_

**THEN:**

Stacey made it clear we must bring the same fight to every state all across the country to SAVE voting rights and defend our democracy.

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)

**NOW:**

[**We 're calling for an overwhelming wave of support from grassroots Democrats all across the country -- _including 1,250 from your state_ \-- before midnight to join Stacey in the fight to elect pro-voting rights House Democrats everywhere.**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)

We need you to understand:

Republicans are DEAD SET on attacking our right to vote to **AVENGE** Donald Trump and rig the system in their favor.

And Stacey is fighting with everything she has to STOP them and PROTECT our democracy.

**But she can 't defeat them alone. She needs our House Democrats and this INCREDIBLE grassroots team by her side.**

**[So will you stand with Stacey and rush $3 to defend our House Majority and defeat Trump's anti-democracy House Republicans?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45492901&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2NDY3Nzg3MwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45492901&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2NDY3Nzg3MwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

clean_body: | | | Did you hear the news?!?! FIRST: Stacey Abrams spent YEARS registering voters and building an unbeatable grassroots movement in Georgia -- and now the state has one of the HIGHEST voter registration rates in the country! THEN: Stacey made it clear we must bring the same fight to every state all across the country to SAVE voting rights and defend our democracy. NOW: We need you to understand: Republicans are DEAD SET on attacking our right to vote to AVENGE Donald Trump and rig the system in their favor. And Stacey is fighting with everything she has to STOP them and PROTECT our democracy. But she can 't defeat them alone. She needs our House Democrats and this INCREDIBLE grassroots team by her side. | | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | Thank you, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Team -

Welcome back to our Newsletter! Obviously one story has been dominating the news and that is the current crisis in Afghanistan. On Monday, I released a statement which you can read below:

President Biden's disorganized policy regarding the withdrawal of American troops from Afghanistan has directly led to the rapid rise of the Taliban's control in Afghanistan. The complete failure of his leadership is highlighted by the images of Taliban fighters seizing American weapons and supplies that were "left" for the Afghan army. While he promised that no American would need to be airlifted out of Kabul, images of airlifts from the embassy harken back to Saigon.

The women of Afghanistan now face a dark, horrific future with reports of threats from the Taliban to erase all the progress that has been made for the past 20 years. I am outraged and so should anyone who claims to be a proponent of Women's rights, but it should be no surprise that the Taliban were able to mobilize and seize power this rapidly. The American public deserves answers as to how this staggering defeat was possible. Where are our elected leaders?

I urge all who know a veteran or a Gold Star family from the war in Afghanistan to reach out and offer any type of support.

|
---

clean_body: Hot off the press, we have another edition of the Scheller for Congress Newsletter! We have new updates from the campaign for what has been a very b Scheller for Congress Newsletter | | | ---|--- Team - Welcome back to our Newsletter! Obviously one story has been dominating the news and that is the current crisis in Afghanistan. On Monday, I released a statement which you can read below: President Biden's disorganized policy regarding the withdrawal of American troops from Afghanistan has directly led to the rapid rise of the Taliban's control in Afghanistan. The complete failure of his leadership is highlighted by the images of Taliban fighters seizing American weapons and supplies that were "left" for the Afghan army. While he promised that no American would need to be airlifted out of Kabul, images of airlifts from the embassy harken back to Saigon. The women of Afghanistan now face a dark, horrific future with reports of threats from the Taliban to erase all the progress that has been made for the past 20 years. I am outraged and so should anyone who claims to be a proponent of Women's rights, but it should be no surprise that the Taliban were able to mobilize and seize power this rapidly. The American public deserves answers as to how this staggering defeat was possible. Where are our elected leaders? I urge all who know a veteran or a Gold Star family from the war in Afghanistan to reach out and offer any type of support. | Now, Susan Wild is on Fox News defending Joe Biden's refusal to answer questions from the American people over his failure. Check out our response by clicking below. | Lisa in the News! | RSVP for "Shooting with Scheller" by August 27th! There will be prizes for the best shot! Included with your ticket is a rental gun, ammo, and dinner! Don't hesitate, sign up today!! | Lisa on the Radio! Click on the picture below to listen to Lisa's interview on WWDB-860! | Photos From Around the District! Blue Valley Farm Fair NEPA Leadership Golf Outing to honor the memory of Patrick Solano Lehigh County GOP's 101st Anniversary of the 19th Amendment! Queenship of Mary Parish Festival! Southern Lehigh School Board Meeting! Ron Beitler for Commissioner Fundraiser! Other Photos from around the District! | Where to find me! mailto:duttforcommissioner@gmail.com?subject=September%2011%20Fundraiser%20RSVP "duttforcommissioner@gmail.com" | As always, be sure to keep an eye out for future updates from the campaign and future events! Onward to victory, Team Scheller | Check out our Social Media Pages! | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

**Florida is one of the states most likely to determine Senate control, Derek, but I'm still falling $22,532 short of my $300,000 fundraising goal.**

**\-------------** **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIcXRMJC7kjiRBfLzRSBCdhWeAO_01bhnqME4G2UKE4K_i38Ox8X5z_8GS1yFBmw4KZHGlnbruGotEpMfb3ZiXWInXcyyh9rTNJfMP5WxCo2LJrDYbC33Y8PGMmOsCubACTdEOdmB1BUva7jFvbrxX1htAOsEs1CZP07POoQwQ0Z3MbFdWrlqi3Rb56X-_NzBKaSnmeN9JdJ97B0cpr3V2gJB-S0PSeMQ5QgvcISCJBosXOsRcDzdU1l2X7f38xwidQ/3em/0852KIbCSDiVdSOIVXqfqw/h1/YFHmK5fuJKakUNTaFGaeecyBUL9DQyZwq44hKZ3R5zU)** This is the worst time for me to fall short of my can't-miss goal. The Florida GOP is preparing to launch a massive voter registration drive with the goal of flipping Florida red _permanently_. And between the Senate Republican campaign arm and Marco Rubio himself, the GOP has hauled in more than $32 million to flip the Senate for Mitch McConnell.

So even though The Cook Political Report increased my chances of winning, I have a steep mountain to climb to catch up to the GOP's advantage in Florida.

Since this grassroots team is so strong, I know that if we muster our willpower and dig deep, we will flip Florida blue. And right now, digging deep means hitting these grassroots fundraising goals today and all the way to Election Day.

[**So please, Derek, I urgently need you to help me make up this shortfall before the month is up. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: If the election wasn't stolen...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Elections matter! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=edbf8150e3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud America-First Patriot and I am leading the charge in America’s audit in Maricopa County, Arizona, and I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona to preserve Election integrity in Arizona for the next Presidential election to ensure the Democrats cannot steal it from us again!

**I am writing you today to let you know that very soon the results from the Audit will be released. **

_And these results are more important than ever. We have seen the price in blood from the Democrats stealing the election._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0765aaa443&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **If the election was not stolen, then we would not be evacuating Americans from the rooftop of the US Embassy in Kabul.**

**If the election was not stolen, then we would not be ceding an area almost the size of Texas to Islamic Radical Terrorists.**

**And if the election was not stolen, we would not have the “President” of the United States get on national TV and defend the WHY of the exit, and not the WAY it was botched.**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=edb6b0151d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Radical incompetence on a massive scale. That’s what Americans got because Democrats wanted to play dirty and couldn’t accept a few mean tweets from the President.**

_There is a direct line from fraud in Maricopa to blood in the soil in Afghanistan. This is why we must finish the Audit in Arizona and expand the audit to every state in America._

**I am disgusted and sleepless over what has been a direct result of massive incompetence of the current administration in carrying out the specific and well-hedged and protected plan of President Trump. **

**_And if the election had not been stolen, we would not be in the terrible predicament we are right now. We would not be sending more Americans off to risk their lives in the deserts and mountains of Afghanistan._**

There is no excuse. There is only guilt. And the best chance we have of reversing this catastrophe and bringing competence back to the White House is through a strong finish of Arizona’s audit and an expansion to other states.

Like Pennsylvania...

**And I will tell you this, from what I am seeing on the ground every day through my interactions with America first patriots, this is a wildfire that will spread only bigger, especially as countless Americans join the movement disgusted by what the worst administration in history has “accomplished” in not even its first year!**

name: Team AOC
subject: Where we’re at with the Senate’s “bipartisan” infrastructure bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This group of bipartisan Senators say that their plan focuses more on “core infrastructure,” but what it actually does is perpetuates the climate, housing, and health care crisises and upholds racial inequity in our country.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210820-2365-header&t=1&akid=2365%2E2526796%2EF3FkJS)
The House returns to D.C. next week to move forward on the infrastructure bill and reconciliation plan.
If you’re confused on what’s happened and where we’re at between the infrastructure and reconciliation debates, you’re not alone. Here’s a review from where we started and where we are now:
**__FIRST__** President Biden drew up a $2.6 trillion infrastructure bill earlier this year that would not only fund the repairs of over 20,000 miles of roads and 10,000 bridges, but would also prioritize funding for urgent priorities like climate, affordable housing, eldercare, and more.
**__THEN__** a group of corporate-backed Senators, Republicans and “moderate” Democrats, got together and stripped out the funding for our key priorities — putting forward what they’re calling a “bipartisan deal” that’s less than a quarter the size of President Biden’s proposed plan. **The Senate’s “bipartisan” plan fully eliminated funding for:**

* **In-home care** — which would have raised wages for workers who provide health care for older adults and people with disabilities;
* **Innovation** — cutting investments in U.S.-based manufacturing and funding research on climate change and energy;
* **Buildings** — cutting funding for public housing, child care centers and community colleges, modernizing public schools, and upgrading federal hospitals.

This plan passed in the Senate earlier this month, and must be passed by the House next before it can be signed into law. But Alexandria and her progessive colleagues aren’t going to let go of these priorities just so we can label the plan as “bipartisan.”
**__NOW__** Alexandria and her colleagues have vowed to withhold their votes on the bipartisan infrastructure bill unless a budget bill that addresses the scope of the climate crisis, invests in care work, tackles homelessness, expands Medicare, and addresses immigration reform passes at the same time — by a simple majority vote through a process known as budget reconciliation.
Republicans and conservative Democrats want Congress to vote on the infrastructure bill now — independent of the budget reconciliation package. But Alexandria and our movement won’t stand for it.
The progressive caucus has enough votes to ensure our priorities end up in the final reconciliation package, and they won’t vote yes on the infrastructure bill until it’s official.
[A $3 contribution from you today would send a powerful message to Congress that the people are united behind a joint infrastructure and budget package that meets the scale and scope of the crises we’re in. Can we count on your $3 contribution today so that Alexandria can keep up the pressure as the House resumes next week?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210820?refcode=em20210820-2365-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2365_2526796_F3FkJS&akid=2365%2E2526796%2EF3FkJS)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210820?refcode=em20210820-2365-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2365_2526796_F3FkJS&akid=2365%2E2526796%2EF3FkJS)**
Thank you for taking action today,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210820?refcode=em20210820-2365-P_FND_EXP_LEG&t=22&refcode2=2365_2526796_F3FkJS&akid=2365%2E2526796%2EF3FkJS)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210820-2365-P_FND_EXP_LEG&t=23&akid=2365%2E2526796%2EF3FkJS)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=2365%2E2526796%2EF3FkJS) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=2365%2E2526796%2EF3FkJS) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=2365%2E2526796%2EF3FkJS)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
